clean_body: | Team, Check out recent headlines to gain further insight into the alarming actions taken by extremist gerrymandered legislatures like in North Carolina: = All On The Line has a plan to end extremist gerrymandered legislatures like North Carolina’s that are manipulating maps to maintain political power and impose anti-democratic agendas on the people they represent.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The North Carolina legislature is the exact body that drew gerrymandered maps to benefit themselves and pushed a fringe legal theory to escape accountability. These extremists' push for anti-choice legislation is just the most recent example of how gerrymandering is a major contributor to injustice and inequity in our democratic processes. Gerrymandering enables legislatures to pursue harmful policies, depriving Americans of justice and undermining reproductive freedom. = = The impact of gerrymandering cannot be overstated, team. Our work is to ensure every voice is heard on issues like reproductive choices by having access to fair representation. Thank you for your support in safeguarding the rights and liberties of all people. \-- Bri Brough Regional Organizing Manager All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They’re probably making you feel terrible if you don’t contribute too, aren’t they?

At Team DeSantis we’re taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program’s foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can’t afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That’s what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxkkUGPnCAYhn8N3jT4IcjFQ7fGNtm0p02a9mI-4XOGraCLGDP_vtHMzKF75OHN-z4B9MvkxlvD6hcGcHV2ZQBMfGEAH793H7d3__ot339Q_qF-enlcwlcGkG4LPZP3koI8uumgdZvZBhWOZDNqSqUlCKikyq6NkcYqKnWlSeihkmikIolGDKoeykpkrgEOgkvQnPNalAVXRo-DVlJjhWokVvFzqMByxxjn2Rdm9tnUXFNa1tOoY9CtZLZIxe5CJHskGHSWVgzJrQy6SyRMOXqKzmDIzexpQPM3n6ebX5xhotuS79d5i4aYaHsG6gCerNs8Ey35frkzg35BdwlMtId6zmUOqu_vTf0V-2ifp-_z_ositW4cKVJIn8Fp9hB7ePVjfCgkiofAHh_zc0gUEhNtMFPu_etbWN_f4shA9WFylon2P3h-s2j1ixw5_tFZbOyyu2lyq6pZxS_n65rZ_wsAAP__O1mygQ "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President |

name: Team Lucas
subject: Five reasons why you should donate $5 toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Holiday weekends are notoriously slow for fundraising — and we need your help to stay on track.
#
Peter — here are 5 reasons why you should donate $5 or more toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat:
1. **Lucas Kunce is our best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024** — and after he launched his campaign to defeat Josh Hawley earlier this year, _National Journal_ even said our movement “represents one of the Democratic Party’s better offensive targets” this cycle.
2. **Josh Hawley’s cowardice on January 6th made him the GOP’s most vulnerable senator.** His support base in-state is crumbling and a recent report showed an “intensely negative sentiment” about Hawley growing among Missourians.
3. **Lucas’ bold message is already resonating with voters.** Whether it’s calling out Hawley for being a fraud or corrupt politicians for failing to actually serve the people they were elected to represent, Lucas has earned in-state and national media attention for speaking truth to power.
4. **National Republicans are attacking Lucas relentlessly.** Hawley’s campaign and GOP insiders at the NRSC know Lucas has the message + momentum to flip this seat — and they’re doing whatever it takes to tear him (and our grassroots movement) down before it’s too late.
5. **Major holiday weekends like these are notoriously slow for fundraising** — so if you chip in right now, you’ll help us stay on track to meet our upcoming end-of-month goal.

**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you chip in $5 or more toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce so we’ll have the resources to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33505?refcode=em20230527-3181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3181%2E614464%2E2fFrEm)**

[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33506?refcode=em20230527-3181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=3181%2E614464%2E2fFrEm) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33506?refcode=em20230527-3181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=3181%2E614464%2E2fFrEm) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33506?refcode=em20230527-3181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3181%2E614464%2E2fFrEm) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33506?refcode=em20230527-3181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3181%2E614464%2E2fFrEm) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33506?refcode=em20230527-3181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3181%2E614464%2E2fFrEm) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33506?refcode=em20230527-3181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3181%2E614464%2E2fFrEm) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33505?refcode=em20230527-3181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3181%2E614464%2E2fFrEm)

| | **BREAKING: Congressional Republicans Attack DC Sovereignty as Democrats Renew Push for Statehood**
---
The MAGA GOP knows that DC Statehood would almost certainly mean TWO more Democratic Senators, so they’re doing everything in their power to KILL the bill!

If we’re going to have any chance of fighting back, we need to demonstrate MASSIVE grassroots support for DC Statehood! **Please, respond now:**

[**Do you support DC Statehood?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20230527_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=7973%2E878179%2Ei1qu0d)

*** PLEASE RESPOND BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT OR YOUR ANSWER WILL AUTOMATICALLY BE MARKED “ NO.” ***
* * *
Listen, not only would DC Statehood give hundreds of thousands of people much-needed representation in Congress, _it could SAVE our slim Senate majority!_

Republicans are TERRIFIED — so they’re launching vicious attacks to shut down any chance we have of making DC Statehood a reality.

**We need 5,000 loyal Democrats to respond by MIDNIGHT:**

| | Rep. Jack Bergman recently applauded a [Supreme Court decision](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/75OXVYDZS/c?w=sSc2nK1HUvgBp3IXyuJZXrDxT7aXY1IaIN3QJCGt5b0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy9zdXByZW1lLWNvdXJ0LWVwYS1jbGVhbi13YXRlci1hY3QvIiwiciI6ImZkNTI0ODkxLTFhNzQtNDlhYS1hNmEyLTU4YTIxNWU2N2I5YSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) that severely limits the protection of our wetlands. All those who care about clean water, water quality, pollution, and flood control are encouraged to [add your name by contributing as low as $1](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/75OXVYDZS/c?w=TEBPWxZOfn2KmkRvohx2r_2RRgFUSoBHrdS4nZs_7X4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JlcmdtYW52c2N3YSIsInIiOiJmZDUyNDg5MS0xYTc0LTQ5YWEtYTZhMi01OGEyMTVlNjdiOWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ) or write, call, text, or email our Representative immediately and tell him how wrong he is. The Clean Water Act has been safeguarding our wetlands since 1977, during both Republican and Democratic presidential administrations. By a 5-4 decision, SCOTUS reversed this decision. Even conservative Justice Brett Kavanaugh joined the dissent stating "significant repercussions for water quality and flood control throughout the United States" would result from this decision. [Voice your opposition first](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/75OXVYDZS/c?w=TEBPWxZOfn2KmkRvohx2r_2RRgFUSoBHrdS4nZs_7X4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JlcmdtYW52c2N3YSIsInIiOiJmZDUyNDg5MS0xYTc0LTQ5YWEtYTZhMi01OGEyMTVlNjdiOWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ), and a final copy of Lorinser's letter will be e-mailed to you in 5 days for approval.

| | Applauds Supreme Court WOTUS Ruling Washington - This week, the U.S. Supreme Court unanimously ruled against President Biden’s Waters of the United States (WOTUS) rule finding the EPA overstepped its authority. In March, Rep. Bergman voted in favor of H.J. Res. 27, a resolution to overturn this regulation. Following the Supreme Court’s decision, Rep. Jack Bergman issued the following statement: "Conserving our water is not a partisan issue and can be accomplished without personal property rights infringement – I will continue working to protect both. This victory through the unanimous Sackett v. EPA Supreme Court ruling is critical to ensuring common sense and states' rights are preserved. I am optimistic that this decision will finally end the nearly decade-long fight against the extreme and overbearing WOTUS rule and give much-needed clarity to American farmers and landowners. This ruling is a testament to the power of standing up for our rights and freedoms in the face of power-grabbing bureaucrats."
---

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: More Biden Corruption Exposed (New Documents)
body:
We have major news to share with you...

| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziianllp0jp984n4h66e4fedcja6h425mvs5fmoo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot,We have major news to share with you... The corporate mainstream media, of course, **REFUSES** to cover it.The Biden family is utterly corrupt – it is more than perfectly clear now that they've been engaged in high-level influence peddling for years upon years. And now my team at America First Legal has uncovered more evidence they tried to hide. _**We’re exposing the**_ _**BIDEN FAMILY GRIFT**_ _**and we’re not going to let up!**_[**_You can support the work of America First Legal HERE >>>_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt6qc2ecrfm0o00gt41mbbdkcgj18jksbmhs8ieo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o35c9h2bs)**Background:** On March 3, we filed a Foreign Agents Registration Act (FARA) Complaint against Hunter Biden, based on information we found in the first set of documents we obtained after we sued the National Archives and Records Administration for its refusal to release Joe Biden’s Vice Presidential records._And earlier this month, we released a third tranche of emails we uncovered._**These provide yet more clear evidence that _Hunter Biden’s shady overseas business activities were completely commingled with Joe Biden’s official business_ all the way back in 2009, his first year in the White House. **
**Here is what is revealed in this latest batch of emails:** · Vice President Biden’s closest advisors held confidential discussions about Hunter Biden’s consulting firm, Seneca Global Advisors;· Hunter’s foreign travel and personal business and financial matters involved discussions with White House staff and other Obama administration appointees;· On the same day that a CCP official was addressing allegations of political retaliation against an Anglo-Australian mining company, Hunter’s business partner involved with CCP-backed mining deals was reaching out to the Vice President’s advisor about that CCP official’s upcoming visit;· And the National Archives continues to unlawfully withhold records through improper and partisan applications of the Presidential Records Act.This is obviously only scratching the bare surface of this scandal. And we intend to aggressively and thoroughly challenge the National Archives’ improper concealment of evidence that reveals the full extent of the Biden family’s influence peddling.**Joe Biden’s exploitation of his position of power to enrich his family and associates is wrong and is truly a National disgrace...** __They viewed the Office of the Vice President as an ATM!__ The Biden family grift was brazen. They _must_ be held accountable.[**Please rush a secure donation today to fuel our fight >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8reg7b7ubh0gfgj1gnh41btc4n5il17on453s88_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o35c9h2bs) _Thank you so much for all your support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal
|

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14767%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NSgrgrXwVM9YqKifoNCptw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14768%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8YBkPN%2f6Y%2bJlC06YVsqJgw&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14769%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPcLmAG9Lu7blaDVgYLwsw&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14767%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NSgrgrXwVM9YqKifoNCptw&sysid=1)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14760%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6J9gJ2N8pcm9zimM9okkXQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14769%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPcLmAG9Lu7blaDVgYLwsw&sysid=1)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14761%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ry6jHldU7EvxAXrAhw94IA&sysid=1) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14762%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zVyOVtj1D6ANTSsqEUQnTw&sysid=1)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14767%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NSgrgrXwVM9YqKifoNCptw&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14769%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPcLmAG9Lu7blaDVgYLwsw&sysid=1)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8741%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=7nCUBvOOTU0LebDPbDji3w&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14763%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YhBOm2b2cne3sQmH7%2foTBA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14764%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8z8%2b%2b0IowkhLEWuloG4d%2fQ&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8741%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=7nCUBvOOTU0LebDPbDji3w&sysid=1)

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1uslu66h51rsrkoe2uqt2247gsekvicddbeedt8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o35c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1456gchtl57v1uticeupaop9eutupcivcnfckm0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o31cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqc8asgd7kc4kfs32lc3e0p64p6jh0prg8fmeh40_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o31cjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc77u2at8602irvr4err6cs1qpopnc1d62j2vuog_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o31cjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zahmap1m7q1j661u2fmp02tjsun53pad45ia1tto_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu4f539gutqalc0h2mack9nkj9u2jhn5s73a1ifo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdkdq0t0peamop2prbcotqrftdkb8udb90bgd3fo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zon63nn6900pdge6v8k2t5jptb78nac9ch4irspo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqb3d3k0fkcsff2qagtlq8cv2ae4ihto20fbni40_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5nclal3gva32iuotnjl37iop6ms8imce49q9rk8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjf08f72o5odhf6pna60iudiv25ime96kj98ktr8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5a11d20mhmqt81898vojvctfik3lj00mhe2lfq8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6iokb31920tme119ll6ju77fokrmtgq5ib31mmg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9bj8iel7ar8hknno3lqi2sfr3b4jq55g7oifboo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqqg4f1n3gllcfmbeqv41mrhih9p324ij89ng1i0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34chh60p74c8gq48bi4bh28or0slh66o70cdh649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziiv0pp2fsrdjucqjenh05v75p01lc0oltck9ah8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9hm1o33c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9l9262d3edhdrvrs0vla48vi97rntd05ec6qde8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0slh66o70cdh649fg)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Everyone has asked me the same question…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkvc2hkb2q3p9sigmcuu8hrq6h0g58i1tme908c8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze36rsgkve7f5koj5n731nqhknbnas4vdb2iltlg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It’s because he HATES what we’re doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we’re fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That’s why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zamtd7m8fh8oqlg7p5b29rufc5nbgq6b33ad7mu0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zef867cl2jcdqoj0h17kdafujs9qpp664vnje978_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I’M READY TO WIN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znte8hjdlb5vetslb5gcbr12rgmusgo6ipacvor0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won’t be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I’m excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here’s why I’m writing you today, Friend:[I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z88s3ld7mspkrv7ek4to4kudo9s0uqpiajdbv9lg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6po65ev7gvnijtnihh7013r731tsm05be01usdo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zde46o6jdi7idgv79frfre9rd55e8daulvv9f83o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6lk9mqgqb2hjnos588t09m7fc62qsspb7ga7h80_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It’s why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we’ll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze2qi280lhokqjr82utm7fiidmp7q72r4vfip0v8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9h3bjgo0860dsr0of8b6gkuq1mvm7j773v576vo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Brandon Williams
subject: Breaking Alert: Debt Ceiling Negotiation Wins Announced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon for Congress NY 22** ](https://d2z3Y104
body:
|
---
Peter, As you may have seen, we made a significant breakthrough last night by [reaching a deal with the Biden Administration on the debt ceiling](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/VX54RF6rTxz8W5X4TpR25yxRRW8JC1R54_56ybN5GS5RN3q8t3V1-WJV7CgZzCW1gRwWh6l6xF_VkLQWk5l1K48W3wDNq_3d27WcW7hSm3Z2S-HGHN6BpyQndRp_9W8rM-14954r_8W7G2Tvs4Y2n16W33Kwnh1B7vScW1hHDtl8HqsdjW8b-dQP84_mrtW7Zcgyd919Yp_W4BQp9r5r-b2HW78Xrc37ZF2kfN7bPXnmVtbGYW24BWp-1yZJ2_W74VFq61Pb-wHVynD_N8_8-zhW8Zxmnr86MYSKW50H5Hb62t0prW8c-_8y4Vts653pty1). Republicans stood our ground on demands for fiscal sanity and behind Speaker McCarthy as he led tough negotiations to ensure that we not only fund our government, but also reduce frivolous spending and begin to address the out of control national debt. The new agreement includes conservative, pro-America wins such as:
* No new taxes
* Work requirements for SNAP
* Increased spending for veterans
* Reducing non-discretionary spending below 2022 levels
* Rescinding $1.9 billion from new IRS agent hires

Republican leadership has worked throughout the night on the final language to release later today, giving us 72 hours to read the entire package before voting. This is transparency and preparedness that never happened under Pelosi. Republicans are doing things differently because the current economic climate underscores the necessity for decisive and reliable leadership. [Can you pitch in $50 today to help us in this crucial fight?](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/VX54RF6rTxz8W5X4TpR25yxRRW8JC1R54_56ybN5GS5Sm3q8tGV1-WJV7CgXTnW5_mZ-L68Qy8JW7KShwp8RKRGbW803sgN6DzJw8W8824WT4K2sdkW3Vh9rQ483WjMW8QvG-14q4zG4N7LkGlrnBMdxW4q111J5lmgGsN5kTqptXGMKMW54zwfz6v0ZZ7MG_tq8FK_DpW2BB12h3jdHbPVLbw_L2R06h0W8xfh8b5LRNwBW6BWlRP1d4lZCV4x-dK7r4NvkW8bBbqk1KSBFDW1L0Vns3MGmCmW4v_zdN1LTQsZN749Ql6RDzTtW1x4cxv2hXbBNW4r-y896MQXgyW5TL_yt2ZYw3FW20RDm13T7JLZ3n3q1) Leadership for America is more crucial now than ever before. Our GOP leaders are stepping up and meeting this demand, working tirelessly to navigate our nation to fiscal stability, and laying the framework to preserve financial sustainability for future generations of Americans. While last night was a big win, the fight isn't over. We will be voting this Wednesday on the new plans and I'm certain the radical left will be fighting us every step of the way. [Can I count on you to pitch in $50 today to help us in this fight to restore fiscal stability for American families?](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/VX54RF6rTxz8W5X4TpR25yxRRW8JC1R54_56ybN5GS5Sm3q8tGV1-WJV7CgJFsW4bHbsR1WjWR6W8xz84877ng-mW9b1D6M3mj3YdW14VjnB1NN6JMW5Vv0d851dW4dW3Bdh9j3s8lwjW9jv-D84DWlc_W1t27ml6BtKNZN4vqQjNYBqQKV5h-0C4qlLLkV_PkSM3w9mysW8bs8zZ3NwB_TW6d6g5581hZqCW5BKQVF2rwYvPW2Gxd5Q82fG92W6v4KlM99RWcmVCgnsv3pvjL5W5Wcncs7ySbxZW7wnCmr1-l8bVW6dL03S4FNMXqW35mbxB4JFmd3W22xfDv6NPNH2W2wcLzc3mHRLbW6YVyTq6DgNVF3fp51) For a stronger future, Congressman Brandon Williams www.letsvotebrandon.com

The new agreement includes conservative, pro-America wins such as: No new taxes Work requirements for SNAP Increased spending for veterans Reducing non-discretionary spending below 2022 levels * Rescinding $1.9 billion from new IRS agent hires Republican leadership has worked throughout the night on the final language to release later today, giving us 72 hours to read the entire package before voting. This is transparency and preparedness that never happened under Pelosi. Republicans are doing things differently because the current economic climate underscores the necessity for decisive and reliable leadership. Leadership for America is more crucial now than ever before. Our GOP leaders are stepping up and meeting this demand, working tirelessly to navigate our nation to fiscal stability, and laying the framework to preserve financial sustainability for future generations of Americans. While last night was a big win, the fight isn't over. We will be voting this Wednesday on the new plans and I'm certain the radical left will be fighting us every step of the way. For a stronger future, Congressman Brandon Williams www.letsvotebrandon.com | Brandon for Congress NY 22, 628 N Main Street, North Syracuse, NY 13212, USA, 315-220-0121

subject: How our campaign is doing things differently

This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6uq48kqtd3bkumo6jghr71up4fm2oe5efk8k938_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)
---

Hello Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7svripu0lm2cfncppbok9hh98o4btvu54cuilj0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.")_**

**Meet Ron DeSantis**

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg09bjlj4hbqn457ob7neaqrd5isj8oa4hlfcuq0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or4c5h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here.

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvc3d7mmiam74ap7keos24edgh41689ev14fjqj8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zclfbfr8vnrtvk21pub0rcvbsf2nnejdjcdqsd3g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zash62nfdfvh9tlinvhje2iobr6cs4u71ba1r3ko_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z69mgkchnf8v3rh8r032df45j5tapedjbf5vhaq0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhm8snru2mh3nk5gru298jrn1786ulep1mn0velo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm4k83hk64d53ajnkgnf4ldnclclbj6c2r7ski8o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zohuk5de9rbedhbi8d883i2mfapmtm0aje12ac1o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zidpqv51at2t8f6qcliclq96ji49nmigkiebk3r8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztiskfdrs65j522s6vm4jul4d112oupuk3p2bqoo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5m74314mr0cm2tasnvoa4uicb1bcrti1kv37a00_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgbmdci30abosc5g7q0oiu2jjhvcadve9g8dcjj0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34c9i60o324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc2doht7uee7v7m57c2vfjpnkr1jbpee441esct8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbj7b9l4docrn702grih4g0afa8e031h60dasd78_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm8or2c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Action News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z87lokjv1kiml2c9a0lfnkpaurtmaoehj35rqcv8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jmcob2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqrv8dmgk1mhhestti7e5dl3430bb8u10qbi5aqg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jmcob2c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9d9t22818fk8hn6e4gv3hri05efo3jh0pipq6k8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jmcob2c3h2bs)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14778%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPgXtUZ0DD1HkwNtCGFpig&sysid=1)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14779%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lBQfeDvSsorgtA5c5j0SDw&sysid=1)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $25.59?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14770%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lC18hX3J0wkXpZSahNBvJA&sysid=1)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14771%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OAAZHftLuEwN2Q0M2YcgJg&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14772%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=haneq2ejc%2b2Ip8i1DZ5LPw&sysid=1)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14773%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dMXlEAjfW6qdbIgU4XKo8Q&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $25.59 ➔](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14774%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D53IwlBOE%2bGB%2fSFI%2fm14xQ&sysid=1)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14785%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F9ngJxq7%2fvzPcK0grF48Jg&sysid=1)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14786%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zQRK3Ib2BTd%2bWL7AeBllDQ&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14787%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=92d2UhsEdwRuRlcRDqfBpg&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $25.59 → **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14788%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SAsfbz1bdQfDskfnjtsv4A&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14789%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZxpkOg%2bemGShUpWTJeAfTg&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14780%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qaODm6ZBcqcaaSjf4402BA&sysid=1) | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14781%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4n7kuNzvJmDRM2mMk7eLJw&sysid=1) | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14782%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uT71o6uw8xTjV%2f5o3Q4jgg&sysid=1)
---|---|---

subject: let me be 100% honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you know anything about me

| |

---
| | | This is Jim Jordan.

If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush. If I'm worried about something, you'll hear about it. Immediately.

So let me be 100% honest with you right now.

I just spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he told me we're in quite a bind: **1)** _Inside Elections_ released their first set of House Ratings and they have us TIED with the Democrats for control of the House **2)** The latest FEC reports show Democrats OUTRAISED Republicans by $12,000,000+... **3)** _**[We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeqgi8u79an548k7hki0luebm2rjnp7eogve5920_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jmaoj6clh2bs "We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.")**_
---
| | | [I'M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5gifnsl62ep9h7q6r5lgn9ptc7h9mb56ssa0od0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jmaoj6clh2bs "I’M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?")
---
Listen, House Democrats exploited every ounce of their power to cover for Joe Biden and misled the public during every crisis they created together.

_If they outraise us and manage to destroy our Majority, the American People will never get ..._
* **ANSWERS** on Biden's weak response to Chinese aggression
* **ANSWERS** on President Trump's corrupt indictment
* **ANSWERS** on how Big Tech interfered with our elections
* **ANSWERS** on Democrats colluding with Big Tech to silence critics
* **ANSWERS** on Biden officials treating parents as domestic terrorists

The American People deserve answers, but getting them depends entirely on Republicans holding the House Majority. If we lose our Majority, we will lose all of the progress we made.

We need the support of our grassroots donors to prevail. **Without it, we might as well throw in the towel.**

_**[As I write this, we're falling critically behind the Democrats' fundraising efforts. I'm counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt92upu5ktnatp04dnjru9cnhk454me8jccd40ho_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jmaoj6clh2bs "As I write this, we’re falling critically behind the Democrats’ fundraising efforts. I’m counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.")**_

Time is of the essence and I'm really counting on you.

For America,

Jim Jordan

subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsYJnSJDNS

Perhaps no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of
tyranny than Winston Churchill

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osYJnSJDNS

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

Perhaps
no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny
than Winston Churchill.

Not only
did he diagnose the threat of modern technology, but he also
spoke most effectively against the idea of socialism.

So, it
should come as no surprise to learn that so many "academics" and
activists are working to smear Churchill's legacy. That's why
studying an accurate account of his accomplishments is more
important than ever.

And right
now, you can do just that when you get a copy of one of Hillsdale
College's most popular online courses, "Winston Churchill and
Statesmanship," on DVD.

Thousands
of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its
release, and now you can add it to your personal library or give
it as a gift.

When you
view this close study of Churchill's words and deeds, you'll
learn timeless lessons that teach:

The
principles and virtues required for great statesmanship.
How
to deal with the threats and opportunities presented by modern
technology.
How
to confront the threat of socialism.
How
to serve the cause of our own country as it appears today.

I am so
excited to offer you this powerful DVD set. And it can be yours
today when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more to
Hillsdale College.

You can
reserve your copy using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61849558:sYJnSJDNS:m:3:2532013465:623FF0BD9F2B779658F0C9DA8E0E2211:r

As a
student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill
will teach you more about this subject than many other books and
videos available today. And they will reveal profound lessons
that apply to today's urgent problems.

Only a
limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll
take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give
it as a gift-before they're gone.

You can
use this secure link to reserve your copy of "Winston Churchill
and Statesmanship" on DVD right now:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61849558:sYJnSJDNS:m:3:2532013465:623FF0BD9F2B779658F0C9DA8E0E2211:r

Please
enjoy this essential study of Churchill's words and deeds.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: How our campaign is doing things differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14706%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TFN4PQuzLQzyy5a5CMrOIw&sysid=1)
---

Hello Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They’re probably making you feel terrible if you don’t contribute too, aren’t they?

At Team DeSantis we’re taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program’s foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can’t afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That’s what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14707%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cyaEJCKoM%2bYcYHIiBN4doQ&sysid=1 "please join Team DeSantis today
by chipping in any amount you can afford. ")_**

Chip in today to join Team DeSantis.

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14715%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PtemAF6MIdT2X5HP0MpOwg&sysid=1)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---

PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

"The report of special counsel John Durham is, or ought to be, devastating for anyone who has put any credence in what has now been definitively revealed to be the Russia collusion hoax." - Michael Barone READ MORE ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6csmpqrjbiaq9k6148666mst9n9uicl7gq1q3rg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm1o74cdh2bs)

Entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy is obviously a long shot presidential candidate, but he’s refreshing. Unlike most politicians, he speaks clearly and seems smart. He probably “is” smart. He went to Harvard and Yale and then founded a biotech firm that creates drugs that treat prostate cancer, endometriosis, fibroids and more. That made me ask him, since he clearly helped people as a medical entrepreneur, why go into politics, when most politicians are useless or destructive? “I am in this race to speak truth,” Ramaswamy says in my new video. - John Stossel READ MORE ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs6audjtsrcvhpg9kjc3q0984jj59elh3me6a788_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9jm1o74cdh2bs)
