name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Join me in powerful worship and prayer
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._qGUoLtcS_ClTQ)
---
Fellow American I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social climate that is stacked against Christians. Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum based on critical race theory. As Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and bad, true and false. Yet, our nation's children are being shaped by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our beliefs. **_America needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into our schools, communities, and culture._** That's exactly why **TPUSA Faith** launched **Kingdom to the Capitol** \- a series of live worship events in **_ALL FIFTY state capitals_** to ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country. **As a fellow believer in Christ, I want to invite you to attend Kingdom to the Capitol when we're in your state capital.** [**But whether or not you're able to attend, I hope you'll support TPUSA Faith with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100 to enable us to bring hundreds more people to each of our FIFTY worship events.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._Ywq-1QuoqrCkWI1sDHwuA)
---
Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful. TPUSA Faith is on a mission to empower Christians who care about our nation's children and public education to go to school boards, classrooms, and city councils to boldly ask our leaders to do what is right. Right now, we have **Kingdom to the Capitol** events scheduled in Texas, Wisconsin, Virginia, and more, and we are planning future events in additional state capitals. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. [**Will you please pray for the success of our REVIVAL tour and support this mission for the glory of God, for the good of our nation's children, and the future of our nation?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) I believe this is a season for revival for our nation. These are desperate times in America. Whether we're talking about public education, the spread of socialism, gender ideology, or abortion, you don't have to look far to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. With the generous partnership of followers of Jesus - like you - TPUSA Faith will promote these powerful worship events far and wide, fill local church buildings with worshipers, and send an army of believers back into their communities. I pray that by coming together as believers in Christ, we will renew the hope of Christians and bring much-needed revival to our nation. [**As Christians, it often feels like we are being ganged up upon, which is why it's critical that we come together in powerful worship and prayer in EVERY state capital. But we can't do that without you. Will you please make a much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-dfc2wFUV4Q) Our educational system should be filled with the Spirit as it teaches our children how to discern God's will, how to live in society, and how to be wise. But you and I both know that our current public education system has strayed as far as possible from this purpose. TPUSA Faith is working to engage, equip, and empower Christians to change the trajectory of public education - and our nation - for the future of our children. **Kingdom to the Capitol** is our most ambitious and historic revival tour yet, visiting every single state capital in America with the hope of restoring American Biblical values in schools and communities across our nation. [**Whether the Lord leads you to give $35, $50, $100, or some other amount, I hope you can support our FIFTY worship events during a desperate - and dark - time for America. In order to reach EVERY state capital, and save our nation, it's critical that we have your support today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._R7sBSuw)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Together, Fellow American, we can spark REVIVAL in our beloved nation. God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[Support TPUSA Faith](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-TUqfEESXV3nXNAzZhsQ)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQ4LWQ3ZDdlNmFiZDdiODQ1NGY5NjAxMmY1Yzc0ZmY5ZDM5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/EsKSLZw_nk2192Z7YslPEA) to unsubscribe.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79422%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qOVGvIjPdw%2bNZug%2fOmrwDA&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79423%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RHx438SzCs9UAk1gBuZ3fQ&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to \- is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79424%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wDT7EQIJusk1Ca2jwFOPpg&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79435%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aMz5nrUGOcA9ky9XPaiw2g&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79436%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VWvf2izpAQ2RU%2fFVNs%2fXVw&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79437%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f0i2unVZUbC0MleL9112Hg&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79438%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=njHkh3rntPWNrRY9RQ%2fh8g&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79439%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b90b%2fedxXqo4Z40lgt1s2A&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79430%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gdT02GfLLVJH2oRHtbK%2fsg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79431%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VvlkM1i%2fNMBvjz%2fE6NbT1A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79432%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T6w4xBZkD0ATt6xLOCjY7w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79433%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3sMMskf6WG0awYjTvUn7Dw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79434%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E1K%2bWHDR2aghokwT%2bseotQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79445%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gT1Gq4TelwyLAqcVtT5Hhw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79446%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bqVYfjSPZ9f6HMHuypZzaQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79447%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jA8YLh0oh4lwAwASo2ZHXg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79448%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mV07Um7raYw%2b8VwFSV8f2g&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79449%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JVVf0qoSry%2bpE6nrbHqheQ&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

Great American Update
---

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: If ifs and buts were candy & nuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

| |
---
| | | **THE 1ST ANNUAL SPEAKER'S SURVEY
MAY 2023**
---

Patriot,

I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert wants control over her life, including the right to divorce, even though she’s called the separation of church and state, “junk.” We agree that she should have those rights … and so should the rest of us. That’s why we’re asking you to support Democratic congressional candidate for CO-03, Adam Frisch, who’s stepped up for a rematch after he came within less than 600 votes of defeating her in a 2022 race that was mostly ignored by national pundits.
body:
National pundits dismissed this race in 2022
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tadb20956-eb11-408c-af86-f4991dcea72a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **" I'm Tired Of This Separation Of Church And State Junk"** _That's what Lauren Boebert said in a speech to the Cornerstone Christian Church in CO. Attacking our Constitution, which provides for separation of church & state, while looking to Saudi Arabia as a governing model._ **_Boebert's a self-proclaimed Christian Nationalist who believes her Bible should determine how we live. And Cornerstone believes the Bible's the written word of God, and must be followed as written._** _So it must have been a bummer for the church when the hypocrite, Boebert, filed for divorce from her husband this past week. It_ _wouldn't seem to fit the part where Matthew quotes Jesus saying divorce makes one an "adultress._" _To be clear: I think divorce is a healthy part of a free society where we all have choices. _**_But, _****_Boebert's tired of that "junk." She wants to tell us who to marry, when to marry and how we must remain married. Except Boebert doesn't count, because she's special. Her theocracy's only for us._** [**_Boebert's a moral abomination & hypocrite. Adam Frisch only lost to her by 546 votes in '22. Since then, she's grown more unhinged, he's gotten stronger: With a real presence on the trail and great fundraising. Will you join us in giving Frisch $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can, NOW, because freedom of (and from) religion is not, and has never been, negotiable._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tced01a65-52e6-452e-8a29-804288b7af8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your dedication to freedom for all Americans. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e7b3f55-15bf-4291-82e1-fc3435505f55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: BREAKING - Trump exonerated, and the FBI makes it to number 1 on the FBI’s most wanted list
body:
The FBI launched the investigation with ZERO justification.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znaidc1rakt9qt3r2ltb5qj5f0ev3ct8lp120rs8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c9ge0or4clh2bs)

Hello Friend,

The Durham Report reveals what we knew all along - **Russiagate is a political crime syndicate, the FBI rigged our elections, and they unlawfully targeted President Trump.**

_The FBI launched the investigation with**ZERO justification**._ Even CNN has to report that on their fake news website.

It was 5 years ago that I led the House investigation into Russiagate with Devin Nunes. Our report from then says the exact same thing as the Durham Report. The FBI had ZERO justification for going after President Trump. But for 5 years, the fake news media lied to the American public.

**Make no mistake:** The DOJ and FBI conspired with the fake news media to bury the truth.

America cannot let this happen again.

After serving under President Trump, I created the Kash Foundation. **The Kash Foundation provides legal aid to veterans, American-first patriots, and whistle-blowers fighting to expose the Deep State corruption.** We fund litigation grants for individuals who have been wronged, release documentation exposing government corruption, and call out each government operator that betrayed their oath of office.

I am on a mission to _**defeat**_ the Government Gangsters who robbed the American people of justice.

Now more than ever, I am counting on your support.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13289229ad4442eb923d4378063b3d46&_e=jN7MGCqTNSWYLI6-DIplXJV1hVlxL-a12SqLaegGrA_3wxaPahDauc-OZNNs8XyaFEqFuhyR8rKyiqCcy7_iIS39uuydzyw-mhDwN0131IQMnxPANIQsCV3yY9je-32LRr62CxkxsTECUM0byuXqVGGOepQKDa-6aNKFdq5To60OgnE6UB9UUV9zrsAvapvwhHTUgSDZhScTCwwhM-xHE_LEcV_CkC9LdwezWWH78jv6A28ehKDINtpAWV_yuEh61OE6T9rHlk2UOrNK19FxI-I7y3m75MtVy4ad_k79MAE%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13289229ad4442eb923d4378063b3d46&_e=jN7MGCqTNSWYLI6-DIplXJV1hVlxL-a12SqLaegGrA_3wxaPahDauc-OZNNs8XyaFEqFuhyR8rKyiqCcy7_iIS39uuydzyw-mhDwN0131IQMnxPANIQsCV3yY9je-32LRr62CxkxsTECUM0byuXqVHVKvcrrdrYMYnccCF4kfNXHuX0KN5rZdP63D2wFBD9uQSkKoKvV3x9jgODNenHUtWI5UDm3yHq6G500-IYiPTEIbQDeztTdbWvYKxwDrZFfBg1h-PKZYI8yX0Xf9_RY5vgclN5MRrIYeJk29xZZVqk%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13289229ad4442eb923d4378063b3d46&_e=jN7MGCqTNSWYLI6-DIplXJV1hVlxL-a12SqLaegGrA_3wxaPahDauc-OZNNs8XyaFEqFuhyR8rKyiqCcy7_iIS39uuydzyw-mhDwN0131IQMnxPANIQsCV3yY9je-32LRr62CxkxsTECUM0byuXqVKvTSad-nyG4L8a5YViUA_m53BchxM66jyzB6JjL4vVHL4ym9Ezhaop2eFoY7i0wFqXQR7dC3ZGNN75-DwVv3-CPPFAooiB8HQW0ca9HjqfoFTt60ktGLLnUs0ZNoee5Tba-gob_MW_mPxrlRzpBy4c%3D)

But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b113c21cc534666b859e8920d398078&_e=o3FmMOrrL11iad03vqeru8NPgODK6FtActQwNcwGfE57t9dFK-tYMXDLzMNEjkY9ZOYKv7leaG3VmLP-xI_wVODTOf75wXu4cXggqHlg9Pa7B0fjf5UykBj-2n80olzqBfwbwOvSWs3UR5yB-ZYPVnyw3TyHtSgBUXLTQlkf-qJ_SuvDsJVgdok1cbABazyV3SjwXZjNupV9FGsONf_keRU6kA_A0c-52SmMzlt1IpUNI6Ova8BM4RRlrZwjoZR0ODwFU2njPkzijGv51ksCC8u8jgBFrocshxAU60ahIPBMui8HiXc9gH4C4Zg89PBT)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b113c21cc534666b859e8920d398078&_e=o3FmMOrrL11iad03vqeru8NPgODK6FtActQwNcwGfE57t9dFK-tYMXDLzMNEjkY9ZOYKv7leaG3VmLP-xI_wVODTOf75wXu4cXggqHlg9Pa7B0fjf5UykBj-2n80olzqBfwbwOvSWs3UR5yB-ZYPVnyw3TyHtSgBUXLTQlkf-qJH4ueJ6FUo2Q10NAJG1-OqYZkdjnPHWR3xmVwp7O1pPe6Kw6MOU_4gzpRqICloafOzNs7H83eR9QBdBaU2fjLIJpktnbhKaQJCNrWedEniZeKMWS3Bs7mGng7jH1h_hMnJ5aHZ3eqRW4EVVw8dul3d)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b113c21cc534666b859e8920d398078&_e=o3FmMOrrL11iad03vqeru8NPgODK6FtActQwNcwGfE57t9dFK-tYMXDLzMNEjkY9ZOYKv7leaG3VmLP-xI_wVODTOf75wXu4cXggqHlg9Pa7B0fjf5UykBj-2n80olzqBfwbwOvSWs3UR5yB-ZYPVnyw3TyHtSgBUXLTQlkf-qIbxMpFQ9Mqe-_rAFwbg12_bEmZ508ZQWQOZ7oalVsd0fktVtmudIcQ4DwSn0OVHniT6odh6C5AzNFvNWmrUGU_cQmKP0oeLpDecpr8JfZZCaTnhzBFfVS8rLaAt9Zgw0RK13WnjkdF_fSOCZErxRkg)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b113c21cc534666b859e8920d398078&_e=o3FmMOrrL11iad03vqeru8NPgODK6FtActQwNcwGfE57t9dFK-tYMXDLzMNEjkY9ZOYKv7leaG3VmLP-xI_wVODTOf75wXu4cXggqHlg9Pa7B0fjf5UykBj-2n80olzqBfwbwOvSWs3UR5yB-ZYPVnyw3TyHtSgBUXLTQlkf-qKd7gkMJZq4m3IM969-o5AoYJoz0aqnLcgMnGcNgZ2Hp6h4c7K3KLe2MihIYGbgerKD7XFI-dRzVov2TOrxzv9gdODr0qW1JEppdsZMqWqVtsXCM1--oZh6xwhPtUBahORSKl1TJDIFHPOVcGUjTeSW)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation 's heroes deserve.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b113c21cc534666b859e8920d398078&_e=o3FmMOrrL11iad03vqeru8NPgODK6FtActQwNcwGfE57t9dFK-tYMXDLzMNEjkY9ZOYKv7leaG3VmLP-xI_wVODTOf75wXu4cXggqHlg9Pa7B0fjf5UykBj-2n80olzqBfwbwOvSWs3UR5yB-ZYPVnyw3TyHtSgBUXLTQlkf-qKyc_5WBnQFgLLajvULm9TsvckjhvLs66gnQKNHQEL1geq81QDobHzlTXcK6drXqp9nF1263kvXIQNZS8ZrEtdvYW44C1sr3R8mu33QBwWzH_mqAPEfP-nTVJ9ndurgQLsFBIij1WHYTG6_d6hErhY-)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b113c21cc534666b859e8920d398078&_e=o3FmMOrrL11iad03vqeru8NPgODK6FtActQwNcwGfE57t9dFK-tYMXDLzMNEjkY9ZOYKv7leaG3VmLP-xI_wVODTOf75wXu4cXggqHlg9Pa7B0fjf5UykBj-2n80olzqBfwbwOvSWs3UR5yB-ZYPVnyw3TyHtSgBUXLTQlkf-qL-Txu3obv_fh1J4Vg6ffpAubzuc991Bw7_u6vhI-4uH22i2uBcNSJfiChFRGnYIN0kujimnDsEtKR_26quqa0f8KmYOYzovNQZCO148kbi6KfT7eycQhURx74zCMUuEKK06JLFTDLJo5Y6CvxDuaVg)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b113c21cc534666b859e8920d398078&_e=o3FmMOrrL11iad03vqeru8NPgODK6FtActQwNcwGfE57t9dFK-tYMXDLzMNEjkY9ZOYKv7leaG3VmLP-xI_wVODTOf75wXu4cXggqHlg9Pa7B0fjf5UykBj-2n80olzqBfwbwOvSWs3UR5yB-ZYPVnyw3TyHtSgBUXLTQlkf-qL6Tu5meaAchaEl4-iCj15EYQc8AcoS8OcF17WfD6_Fk8FOgtH9WMIxNiDxEk1VAIsoFR7O6F6sMfoeDTC82pEG10xzNGLwEFZ8l0W1Wv8DnmEoOROUWlMHNNrxbVWOikbRJs4rTfcEDm-K2Q41Yokn) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2b113c21cc534666b859e8920d398078&_e=o3FmMOrrL11iad03vqeru8NPgODK6FtActQwNcwGfE57t9dFK-tYMXDLzMNEjkY9ZOYKv7leaG3VmLP-xI_wVODTOf75wXu4cXggqHlg9Pa7B0fjf5UykBj-2n80olzqBfwbwOvSWs3UR5yB-ZYPVnyw3TyHtSgBUXLTQlkf-qI200IXXYLoH3vepHFt7D7YKwXYFAmf4DXSvx6F2bJqcz9FNxp_2hRbaZnyejMkbWeEZ6usUeQheU6S6vQUsdMJPa9CZ93Sk7DEgm3Wk9OrJQezm3ajVmMaJXkrWIPKCKLkF8PVxoscDqbfboWjV9bw)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebe19f405f5d4b4db452bda32d7e889e&_e=HVASeCk0gHBYGcPuZTC3lf1zFgrgElVpSxBUG5zJdtj8HHx6eaUYauH9Tk703DViwEYEFrsvCQkqNXIjutexE4uW2OEoW2vZNLEn88eQGe3__dt4hdO2RTtPypZRqTLtz5-nVp0dq53lRYprT8Rg3OuBmTbMc0p0sHjaRGStf49IYRRCExnUidW-tb-g0jSfpuMuF6AFeacIBQzqzHnzG0MsvcD0S7UmrOrXtyNUc7XwWipp_Zo_IHYkI0m6QaA5XViclzoUAG4kt1Wnn39CW_awqZG49myR5sYzg9SszmP8xNX71pTYwJcTzKfLXVBjzSLIMweNcmtYNx0dS58SFekKYHoNO5eNj4BGiFeQU2FIHU9JGbSrHnZub-qs0DQW3W0FSDAFR-5KPGrSKy4TDprv2vHnUhOn9SwtZenv-Ec%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebe19f405f5d4b4db452bda32d7e889e&_e=HVASeCk0gHBYGcPuZTC3lf1zFgrgElVpSxBUG5zJdtj8HHx6eaUYauH9Tk703DViwEYEFrsvCQkqNXIjutexE4uW2OEoW2vZNLEn88eQGe3__dt4hdO2RTtPypZRqTLtz5-nVp0dq53lRYprT8Rg3OuBmTbMc0p0sHjaRGStf49IYRRCExnUidW-tb-g0jSfpuMuF6AFeacIBQzqzHnzG0MsvcD0S7UmrOrXtyNUc7XwWipp_Zo_IHYkI0m6QaA5MpIEXGkxhbt79_en3EYFRu-Jx-lp7QZLZEBxrLx01qAQl7wxMznDCyBzjgSwTJgORYbmLlf6oGzou9Flwv43GTmmP6hkEwy90iKaY6e_Ji1EK3g2Q5db-A5DgkekuDeYQh_iF2_BETTcbLai-BZBc4ndNm6U6ECee2wFNlvW03E%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebe19f405f5d4b4db452bda32d7e889e&_e=HVASeCk0gHBYGcPuZTC3lf1zFgrgElVpSxBUG5zJdtj8HHx6eaUYauH9Tk703DViwEYEFrsvCQkqNXIjutexE4uW2OEoW2vZNLEn88eQGe3__dt4hdO2RTtPypZRqTLtz5-nVp0dq53lRYprT8Rg3OuBmTbMc0p0sHjaRGStf49IYRRCExnUidW-tb-g0jSfpuMuF6AFeacIBQzqzHnzG0MsvcD0S7UmrOrXtyNUc7XwWipp_Zo_IHYkI0m6QaA54FwZRVY0g2vnwg24iZ4yi_yslTMzCJfa-aOwHOuVhNfirc95IsNt5rNi6KVuwVmxlpiukfAQ-WsWfSQ5k91KCmhutjVwLbrUOuL5H4UJmlHSl4Wredbv88tdv2D7r2KxP8UZfYo3AF99Aot_vUlo1f83WkEWiHcfZ8MYDtno0sA%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Jim Jordan
subject: let me be 100% honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
\
If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush.

| |

---
| | | This is Jim Jordan.

If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush. If I'm worried about something, you'll hear about it. Immediately.

So let me be 100% honest with you right now.

I just spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he told me we're in quite a bind: **1)** _Inside Elections_ released their first set of House Ratings and they have us TIED with the Democrats for control of the House **2)** The latest FEC reports show Democrats OUTRAISED Republicans by $12,000,000+... **3)** _**[We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93dcf88da73c43b588ed726140337b17&_e=NxTdbeMkA___i6MSyPrAaDgUDXL4uj3ZaWbkW_x7b7mQck7F88JaXjKv1i6UBnVt3lwwU8z6Ke86ci0sb74Q5v71Hv3Vl6rZc81eYoUHlPw9vRyoOd-9Ff2y2fHCxe6vXdX_qWdx1-VCMB_3vjEHuaWhYHVJd4vgCkw7N-nP0li6_YlhKUUntTRON7DWNTI-ZwC6iLUE1EsJFmNVA_n3c1d47a3_UNF4r5qeAPA-DsL5ETVSWj3fpFLQ2Qh4jxUqUnHjTgxfoy3y9yPWnMJ7D3v0rk_M93pZLtvCODIlV0s7JlBY3BLYXYm3Xiyt5KCOIv4fymGBGKTM7nWL62nOENM5ulIHmL8gEhq79rTE9nmQLpxtEt4_5c1uD7h8elDTvyuOSrl0GukXx9guaYVUqqtPkpNMCVtRloocj9JinHUvC8fcM5934MiMScSs9oZH "We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.")**_
---
| | | [I'M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93dcf88da73c43b588ed726140337b17&_e=NxTdbeMkA___i6MSyPrAaDgUDXL4uj3ZaWbkW_x7b7mQck7F88JaXjKv1i6UBnVt3lwwU8z6Ke86ci0sb74Q5v71Hv3Vl6rZc81eYoUHlPw9vRyoOd-9Ff2y2fHCxe6vXdX_qWdx1-VCMB_3vjEHuaWhYHVJd4vgCkw7N-nP0li6_YlhKUUntTRON7DWNTI-ZwC6iLUE1EsJFmNVA_n3c1d47a3_UNF4r5qeAPA-DsL5ETVSWj3fpFLQ2Qh4jxUqUnHjTgxfoy3y9yPWnMJ7D3v0rk_M93pZLtvCODIlV0s1kaAb3a80f5H08M3cKADjL5fCcx4TRirx5GF7pYk1jYKdgRkHc4dhBk5y-fy-mIaWVV7mlihANCICNRgBGo6fILtiE7Mv7FHPUBu4HtWCRJymjYzf4U-XhRktBzNJ8_s11vzVFiZEiXbwflUU4l1u "I’M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?")
---
Listen, House Democrats exploited every ounce of their power to cover for Joe Biden and misled the public during every crisis they created together.

_If they outraise us and manage to destroy our Majority, the American People will never get ..._
* **ANSWERS** on Biden's weak response to Chinese aggression
* **ANSWERS** on President Trump's corrupt indictment
* **ANSWERS** on how Big Tech interfered with our elections
* **ANSWERS** on Democrats colluding with Big Tech to silence critics
* **ANSWERS** on Biden officials treating parents as domestic terrorists

The American People deserve answers, but getting them depends entirely on Republicans holding the House Majority. If we lose our Majority, we will lose all of the progress we made.

clean_body: \ If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush. | | | | | This is Jim Jordan. If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush. If I'm worried about something, you'll hear about it. Immediately. So let me be 100% honest with you right now. I just spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he told me we're in quite a bind: 1) Inside Elections released their first set of House Ratings and they have us TIED with the Democrats for control of the House 2) The latest FEC reports show Democrats OUTRAISED Republicans by $12,000,000+... 3) "We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY." | | | "I’M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?" Listen, House Democrats exploited every ounce of their power to cover for Joe Biden and misled the public during every crisis they created together. If they outraise us and manage to destroy our Majority, the American People will never get ... ANSWERS on Biden's weak response to Chinese aggression ANSWERS on President Trump's corrupt indictment ANSWERS on how Big Tech interfered with our elections ANSWERS on Democrats colluding with Big Tech to silence critics ANSWERS on Biden officials treating parents as domestic terrorists The American People deserve answers, but getting them depends entirely on Republicans holding the House Majority. If we lose our Majority, we will lose all of the progress we made. We need the support of our grassroots donors to prevail. Without it, we might as well throw in the towel. subject: Election Day Check!

body:
Biggest race in Virginia!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m_tuA1fsZyEOhyJN61M7s_v1KKijL7T6b3OutSvlC9kLaZ2zaoPRunMtfqAmmMT23BjG2b-B0i-72O6fg5K880-iYEqZRZG2pkXRRqQ7wxrTRhL5HqGRmUFTNvZ-1DB8GD6-25B9RgadfMHGKPjO8z_T-YPiWys-osFFQZAL73U=&c=Z1jTruRccgi-PtiuR4yDqq_dYPYi_0MhtZf8_SuG1hUtZir6-XrupQ==&ch=Myvsvbo9uggaSQqaeMPEct-75N_P2t75qM4uDgClZ6JAGPwtthr7lw==)

| |

| |

My name is Senator Amanda Chase, and I am running for Senate in Virginia's 12th District. You know me as the Patriot that is out there fighting for family values, election integrity, and Conservative principles. I haven't disappointed you, and I won't start now! There is a reason I have a perfect rating with the Family Foundation, an A+ rating with the NRA, 100% rating from VCDL, and I am considered the most Conservative Senator in Virginia, with the best voting record in the State Senate. Some politicians think that accolades like this don't come easily, but they do when you listen to your constituents. However, there is poison in the water, and two RINOs are taking advantage of the newly drawn district lines to try to push me out of office. When we are in a fight for our lives to regain control of the Senate, my primary opponents will stop at nothing to get a tried and true Conservative out of office! Well, I won't let them, but I NEED your help! My opponents have made deals with all the shady leftist organizations for campaign dollars. I refuse to do that. Instead, I am counting on Patriots like you to help me fight for what is right! [We have just a few weeks left before my primary on June 20th. This is the last end-of-month deadline, and I NEED a big showing. Can you dig deep one more time and rival the leftist companies like Pearson and Dominion Energy's money?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m_tuA1fsZyEOhyJN61M7s_v1KKijL7T6b3OutSvlC9kLaZ2zaoPRunMtfqAmmMT23BjG2b-B0i-72O6fg5K880-iYEqZRZG2pkXRRqQ7wxrTRhL5HqGRmUFTNvZ-1DB8GD6-25B9RgadfMHGKPjO8z_T-YPiWys-osFFQZAL73U=&c=Z1jTruRccgi-PtiuR4yDqq_dYPYi_0MhtZf8_SuG1hUtZir6-XrupQ==&ch=Myvsvbo9uggaSQqaeMPEct-75N_P2t75qM4uDgClZ6JAGPwtthr7lw==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m_tuA1fsZyEOhyJN61M7s_v1KKijL7T6b3OutSvlC9kLaZ2zaoPRunMtfqAmmMT23BjG2b-B0i-72O6fg5K880-iYEqZRZG2pkXRRqQ7wxrTRhL5HqGRmUFTNvZ-1DB8GD6-25B9RgadfMHGKPjO8z_T-YPiWys-osFFQZAL73U=&c=Z1jTruRccgi-PtiuR4yDqq_dYPYi_0MhtZf8_SuG1hUtZir6-XrupQ==&ch=Myvsvbo9uggaSQqaeMPEct-75N_P2t75qM4uDgClZ6JAGPwtthr7lw==) [-> Donate $100 <-](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m_tuA1fsZyEOhyJN61M7s_v1KKijL7T6b3OutSvlC9kLaZ2zaoPRunMtfqAmmMT23BjG2b-B0i-72O6fg5K880-iYEqZRZG2pkXRRqQ7wxrTRhL5HqGRmUFTNvZ-1DB8GD6-25B9RgadfMHGKPjO8z_T-YPiWys-osFFQZAL73U=&c=Z1jTruRccgi-PtiuR4yDqq_dYPYi_0MhtZf8_SuG1hUtZir6-XrupQ==&ch=Myvsvbo9uggaSQqaeMPEct-75N_P2t75qM4uDgClZ6JAGPwtthr7lw==)
We have made so much progress in Virginia and proven this is not a blue state, don't let the RINOs ruin our chances of maintaining control!

body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e58a34e9e0747419e0468056b0f7ca5&_e=ZI2xFNn2xsQojpgONu9Nr44TPUizJM9mmDh_BXBBp4ipMxtxi1dugSe3ReGrk0vOHm__bUSPf8Z3f3dkhum9oBMSfml7evieKGDf8zQEnFL7k8YGrAaZGeu3WH_m_2JbiV18rbnsxkiN6Ova8AUEI_0bu3y-leE9WDHd1strHhZZx3qPHpTZ0k6Vd2FjFJ9U4bTmsptrWs3cbO0hQU80i4APbW_KUb4xzlQ1RFQZ4tUsA3aIUFIPvpYdsJzwaUE97RzXfAIic3Ci6zzG5mY7_O9S4aGooCsYXu6C3C7eyDD96Q-trkdCuxuez4tQfQIBGMoOKKJd-e6ro4v18uZJGqLuLZqXidmiPw0E5km17kGJOlPkVKy6_Qx5-XHv5nFb3iRKxna3muKHiL9eGa1gVDYQAz2vVhe9rA82qr2GNRSvS8eT55Ov9UjMhoriTvTl)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e58a34e9e0747419e0468056b0f7ca5&_e=ZI2xFNn2xsQojpgONu9Nr44TPUizJM9mmDh_BXBBp4ipMxtxi1dugSe3ReGrk0vOHm__bUSPf8Z3f3dkhum9oBMSfml7evieKGDf8zQEnFL7k8YGrAaZGeu3WH_m_2JbiV18rbnsxkiN6Ova8AUEI_0bu3y-leE9WDHd1strHhZZx3qPHpTZ0k6Vd2FjFJ9U4bTmsptrWs3cbO0hQU80i4APbW_KUb4xzlQ1RFQZ4tUQYbTPpclObp7LPCtyGodsvaIzGqeYcl2gLlmhdKg_hUT8omhJloHNJX04sE5nHePb_fopWue-THP0E9CO-QyE1iZ1b8o0giGm540bRoe5vBK5QY1xyhYTTej1tDOR8vHb3hhg01f3_LYbxRIkhzjNzw88_FR5GzteK3qPI5yMSuCxMTu9KLiwRLe3eMo8fGg%3D)**

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e58a34e9e0747419e0468056b0f7ca5&_e=ZI2xFNn2xsQojpgONu9Nr44TPUizJM9mmDh_BXBBp4ipMxtxi1dugSe3ReGrk0vOHm__bUSPf8Z3f3dkhum9oBMSfml7evieKGDf8zQEnFL7k8YGrAaZGeu3WH_m_2JbiV18rbnsxkiN6Ova8AUEI_0bu3y-leE9WDHd1strHhZZx3qPHpTZ0k6Vd2FjFJ9U4bTmsptrWs3cbO0hQU80i4APbW_KUb4xzlQ1RFQZ4tUQYbTPpclObp7LPCtyGodsvaIzGqeYcl2gLlmhdKg_hRKS-SPn5Qh1vuUCh4YoxtYy-SZhujWX95Xwb0EgVl-yn5ADm3IOGuXjoc7dUjCncPNe9KoSKMZ66wSFWb2-PYSi-94HjSnpDgkRKJP240mffbLQFuMr-cGhbyzHFp0huzALXeRbmBNOFgvoKmU8Eco%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you. | That was our average donation in April, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Socialism vs. Free-Market Capitalism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vskKl4JDNR

The debate about socialism and free-market capitalism is growing
louder across the globe.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oskKl4JDNR

The
debate about socialism and free-market capitalism is growing
louder across the globe.

While
proponents of capitalism celebrate the economic growth that is
created by private enterprise and individual freedom, advocates
of socialism claim they have a more compassionate system because
of its egalitarian nature.

But which
one has a more positive effect on human flourishing?

To answer
this question, the Hoover Institution gathered a
multi-disciplinary group of its world-renowned scholars to
investigate the historical record and assess the outcomes of both
systems.

And the
results are eye-opening.

From what
I'm told, you are someone who would be interested in hearing
these results, and that's why I'm emailing you today.

We
recently launched a new two-part online course called Socialism
and Free-Market Capitalism: History and Outcomes to outline the
findings of the project. And I want to invite you to take it for
FREE as my guest.

Inside
these 7 lessons you'll discover:

Why
communism failed and liberal democracy prosperedWhy political
freedom and prosperity go hand in handHow nations in the
Indo-Pacific region view China and why many are seeking their own
paths between socialism and capitalism.
You can
activate your free online course right now by using this secure
link: https://resources.hoover.org/hp-history-and-outcomes-signup

When you
do, you'll receive Lesson 1 by email within minutes. Subsequent
lessons will be emailed to you every 5 days until the course is
completed.

Please
use this link to get instant access to your free online course
today!

Thank
you,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

body:

---

Hello Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68686188720f4d28ae1e51d01d482dfc&_e=HqRc9gjsCUIPUqt4RZAonSnreOInCYNs_OzjpIl2lUnjkAQgboT9qvUihJHUWWwXisQIh_oY4Sy8febAfwb2KXzaZvW5DwV4oOfxjMpfNzjpUkoYKhZ0UGZzgN5NOfLHiDPlmJfMSpVvqVENUMoBl9qtsaoDWfCNB876Q1IJ3yQtrNGYT3PEQ0nPvuM7ObFvI5dCkEM7SnBENNuKG-42oPwM1DWSe3eTl86_nHOQd6riDGzbHDnjiB_-vBPjz_jgFh1578yZBNsR55pkxUl2NrIwtBREdshAIxORNxNEv-VkF8qxQgu6pjeBkEj_oYKUhlpFesi-8hKgPUYkSkmQC9gAGzP3FIgrp6sCrUZz34UjOasXUXe20LvUsNS9Daih66aIfreeMq0ceV5zeut24CxWzL4L4-XGOM62HPvg2OFWJBC9FpCrEf9cg6zPM92tUGBPPqu6RN7viTPImTMUVg%3D%3D "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

clean_body: This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team. | | | | | | | | | | Hello Friend, A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they? At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach. Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank. Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it. You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies. That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House. body:
Stand with us to protect our democracy!
|

Team,
We are facing a critical moment in our fight to protect our democracy. The monumental decisions of the Supreme Court that we eagerly await have our team feeling **anxious but determined.**
At All On The Line, our mission has always been to ensure fair representation for every person and to combat gerrymandering. The Supreme Court's upcoming rulings on two crucial cases hold massive significance for the future of voting rights, the fight against racial gerrymandering and the integrity of our system of checks and balances. **The outcomes will shape the very foundation of our democracy and have far-reaching consequences that will be felt for generations to come.**

clean_body: Stand with us to protect our democracy! | Team, We are facing a critical moment in our fight to protect our democracy. The monumental decisions of the Supreme Court that we eagerly await have our team feeling anxious but determined. At All On The Line, our mission has always been to ensure fair representation for every person and to combat gerrymandering. The Supreme Court's upcoming rulings on two crucial cases hold massive significance for the future of voting rights, the fight against racial gerrymandering and the integrity of our system of checks and balances. The outcomes will shape the very foundation of our democracy and have far-reaching consequences that will be felt for generations to come. = = We firmly believe that progress is within our grasp, but we cannot reach it alone. That's where you come in, team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = Amplify our advocacy efforts: We'll raise our voices to advocate for fair maps in every corner of our nation. Mobilize communities: We'll support our grassroots organizing, engaging with communities most affected by voter suppression and working to ensure their voices are heard loud and clear. We must remember that progress is not always linear, but together, we will make it happen. Every step forward, no matter how small, contributes to the larger journey toward a fairer and more inclusive democracy. = In solidarity, All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Peter, This week, I issued a subpoena to FBI Director Christopher Wray for an FD-1023 form that a whistleblower said links Joe Biden to a criminal scheme.
We’ve been wondering why so many foreign nationals paid the Bidens so much money, and we could be very close to finding out.
**This FD-1023 form that the FBI has links Joe Biden himself to a criminal scheme involving money for policy decisions during his vice presidency.**
It is with a heavy heart that I fear our Commander-in-Chief may be compromised by foreign actors, and I’m going to do everything in my power to deliver the whole truth to the American people.
These revelations destroy the Democrat’s and media’s false narrative about Joe Biden and his family, and they are going to fight until the end to stop me from exposing their lies.
I am under constant attack, and they are only going to intensify as I get closer to providing Americans the facts. **[My only defense is fighting back and defending my integrity and credibility, and I rely on grassroots conservatives to help me do that. ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9d50aca98a2c407999a28c259041a4f5&_e=klMQuJ9p46IsDIbi4AZBkOzlUO24sn583--Oj-uJt8BWsavfWDZDxdDLAapAsS4zj0tIzG5QIcGBcWI7f9x3_qe_x1CLlSfjBxf3saNVXycjZFP1tL0SpZcfqS3c3xH2KT-OceS09Af9qpu-m6sA6ZlMVITKcgsbSWmxVMuutv0zRPZrr6DA8NLjs_Tl0QVGzudaJW7pxY__Nx3baO7MTuxqnc4xJLLUBQbugaKdlKiPvaIlkXlP7HV4rhFEy1fobrU3olA6dVgqCv1MOc6SFHB-L0Lw8DaKaOk3or4n2tIc42ME2RBy0BkRzPkovIV15Su134-Az5Kmm4umxX_HGCYn0aEbKuzyLJ0VVlfhrIUDuUqEZOFkK8BdILmh8Smn97iE3YqbIY1DHSonqwVKcA%3D%3D)**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9d50aca98a2c407999a28c259041a4f5&_e=klMQuJ9p46IsDIbi4AZBkOzlUO24sn583--Oj-uJt8BWsavfWDZDxdDLAapAsS4zj0tIzG5QIcGBcWI7f9x3_qe_x1CLlSfjBxf3saNVXycjZFP1tL0SpZcfqS3c3xH2KT-OceS09Af9qpu-m6sA6ZlMVITKcgsbSWmxVMuutv0zRPZrr6DA8NLjs_Tl0QVGzudaJW7pxY__Nx3baO7MTuxqnc4xJLLUBQbugaKdlKiPvaIlkXlP7HV4rhFEy1fomM5m8Tthgbf_IDmpSiXNo6SfeslDOE-PxEhHO2kzwpydQta4Rr1s2E_dhEKbPd7ms9Tuao6f-AwsFLr2gKgmhliN7pLM1L7EVGWKUBJ2nNGkCMqcn5TFyy0JScaUeh3eSvG_Ym1jwb1F434o4hdh3Q%3D%3D)

Like I’ve said before, county boys from West Kentucky are a tough breed, _**we don’t back down and we don’t cave to pressure from high and mighty big city liberals on cable TV.**_
But that’s not going to stop the folks in the mainstream media from attacking me and trying to destroy the credibility of my work and the good name I’ve spent an honest life building.
**[So please, if you’re able, chip in a couple bucks so my team and I can mount a defense to the onslaught of attacks that have already begun.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9d50aca98a2c407999a28c259041a4f5&_e=klMQuJ9p46IsDIbi4AZBkOzlUO24sn583--Oj-uJt8BWsavfWDZDxdDLAapAsS4zj0tIzG5QIcGBcWI7f9x3_qe_x1CLlSfjBxf3saNVXycjZFP1tL0SpZcfqS3c3xH2KT-OceS09Af9qpu-m6sA6ZlMVITKcgsbSWmxVMuutv0zRPZrr6DA8NLjs_Tl0QVGzudaJW7pxY__Nx3baO7MTuxqnc4xJLLUBQbugaKdlKiPvaIlkXlP7HV4rhFEy1foIN8Cwy4bZWYVLZPnGfpNPOEC6l7q6pVOY5owL89C8_oX0aKWj9-ZtoiytViU14-BElJU4h8SrUGExg17KCOCgDL3AjhDDL8lmD75QtVEBsAkyuyZm-jKRUS6gBRwxHS7tWnGeeb523y683fiAkvDtQ%3D%3D)**

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New York Sun
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW5AJ5JDXN

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced
first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad
journalism....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW5AJ5JDXN

FROM THE
DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear
friend,

In over
sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand
the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly
the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things
right.

In
today's media landscape there are far too many publications that
get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New
York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over
politics and people over party.

Its
in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President
Trump serve as a case in point.

When I
defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an
avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to
fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's
deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky
and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the
Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be
first rate.

It will
be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can
be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that
its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments
in American journalism.

I've been
impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an
uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's
success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of
truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage
you to join the Sun today.

Join the
Sun Now →

Every
person matters in this effort.

Don't
wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

Alan
Dershowitz

Columnist, The New York Sun

Join the
Sun Now →

clean_body: In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism.... FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ Dear friend, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Join the Sun Now → Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. Alan Dershowitz Columnist, The New York Sun Join the Sun Now → Paid for by the New York Sun. This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. name: Peter Thomas
subject: 🚨The CWA is under attack!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
,
I need your help. Our congressman celebrated a decision that takes protection away from over half of America's wetlands. His democratic challenger, Dr. Bob Lorinser, is sending a letter of disapproval [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bergmanvscwa] on behalf of everyone concerned about this attack on the Clean Water Act.
Will you please sign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bergmanvscwa] Dr. Bob wants at least 100 names by the end of the day.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bergmanvscwa [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bergmanvscwa]
Please consider - after you add your name [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bergmanvscwa] , will you for ward this to your environmentalist friends? Let's show Jack Bergman he cannot celebrate wrecking havoc on the environment without hearing from hundreds of us.
SIGN YOUR NAME WITH $1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bergmanvscwa]
Join Dr. Bob Lorinser in a letter of disapproval to Rep. Jack Bergman's recent celebration of the SCOTUS ruling attacking the Clean Water Act.
Bergman claimed he supports conserving our waters after applauding the a Supreme Court decision that severely limits the protection of our wetlands with a misleading press release. It's an absurd position. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bergmanvscwa]
The Clean Water Act has been safeguarding our wetlands since 1977. By a 5-4 decision, SCOTUS lifted its protections of nearly 6 million acres of wetlands. Even conservative Justice Brett Kavanaugh joined the dissent stating, "significant repercussions for water quality and flood control throughout the United States" would result from this decision.
We have to do something. Bob Lorinser will always speak up. Will you join him?
Thank you, . This is important.
-Peter Thomas
Friends of Dr. Bob for Congress
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bergmanvscwa [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bergmanvscwa]
Dr. Bob Lorinser is the Democratic challenger vying to unseat Jack Bergman in the 2024 election in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. Lorinser is an environmentalist, family doctor, former State Dept. diplomat, and a public health medical director with over 40 years of experience in public policy and administration.

clean_body: , I need your help. Our congressman celebrated a decision that takes protection away from over half of America's wetlands. His democratic challenger, Dr. Bob Lorinser, is sending a letter of disapproval [] on behalf of everyone concerned about this attack on the Clean Water Act. Will you please sign? [] Dr. Bob wants at least 100 names by the end of the day. [] Please consider - after you add your name [] , will you for ward this to your environmentalist friends? Let's show Jack Bergman he cannot celebrate wrecking havoc on the environment without hearing from hundreds of us. SIGN YOUR NAME WITH $1 [] Join Dr. Bob Lorinser in a letter of disapproval to Rep. Jack Bergman's recent celebration of the SCOTUS ruling attacking the Clean Water Act. Bergman claimed he supports conserving our waters after applauding the a Supreme Court decision that severely limits the protection of our wetlands with a misleading press release. It's an absurd position. [] The Clean Water Act has been safeguarding our wetlands since 1977. By a 5-4 decision, SCOTUS lifted its protections of nearly 6 million acres of wetlands. Even conservative Justice Brett Kavanaugh joined the dissent stating, "significant repercussions for water quality and flood control throughout the United States" would result from this decision. We have to do something. Bob Lorinser will always speak up. Will you join him? Thank you, . This is important. -Peter Thomas Friends of Dr. Bob for Congress [] Dr. Bob Lorinser is the Democratic challenger vying to unseat Jack Bergman in the 2024 election in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. Lorinser is an environmentalist, family doctor, former State Dept. diplomat, and a public health medical director with over 40 years of experience in public policy and administration.

name: Carole King
subject: Hi, it's Carole King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi – It’s Carole King. I hope you and your family are doing well.

Thanks to your support in ’20 and ’22, Democrats have been able to make so much progress for families that were struggling. Neighbors no longer have to forego buying shoes for their kids to afford insulin, and millions more Americans are now bringing home a regular paycheck.

Real, tangible progress like this never would have happened if you hadn’t shown up, contributed, and voted when it mattered.

**But if we come together to expand our _vital_ Senate majority again, it will matter even more.**

[**That's why I’m personally asking: Will you join me and pitch in $5 -- or whatever you can afford -- to help Democrats expand their majority in the Senate?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230528-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot2v1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230528-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot2v1-Pros-sl1&akid=10899%2E9716520%2E9aRg3C)

**Let's be clear: For Democrats, helping people is the point.**

Democrats have a tangible record of voting for laws that have lifted Americans up. And that’s why it's so important to contribute TODAY to make sure that we elect even more Democrats in 2024.

[**Will you join me in contributing $5 (or whatever you can afford) to the DSCC RIGHT NOW?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230528-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot2v1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230528-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot2v1-Pros-sl1&akid=10899%2E9716520%2E9aRg3C)

Thank you so much for all that you do.

– Carole

| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230528-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot2v1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230528-CaroleKing-CaroleKingReboot2v1-Pros-sl1&akid=10899%2E9716520%2E9aRg3C)
