name: Jon Tester
subject: coffee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Montanans for Tester
body:
|
#
Hey Peter! My team and I will be having a meeting tomorrow morning to lay out our campaign strategy for the coming months, and I want to make sure I know where your head’s at. I want this campaign to be a team effort — and that means making sure your ideas and priorities are heard by me and my staff. I wish I could grab a cup of coffee with every one of you to hear about your concerns firsthand, but there just aren’t enough hours in the day. So, my team helped me put together a quick survey that will just have to do instead. I know it’s not as good as sitting and chatting over a cup of coffee, but [_**will you take a moment to let me know what issues you want me to prioritize on the campaign trail?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63954679/408551998/-161408955?refcode=AU_RJT_EG_GEN_SUR_INau_20230528_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MThkNmY0OC03ZGZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f9AWAComxHkebi1YIc9lJ2POTI0cWJrY9K83GJUXNuM=&emci=1c50452a-f2fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=518d6f48-7dfd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26274988) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63954695/408552007/-161408955?refcode=AU_RJT_EG_GEN_SUR_INau_20230528_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MThkNmY0OC03ZGZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f9AWAComxHkebi1YIc9lJ2POTI0cWJrY9K83GJUXNuM=&emci=1c50452a-f2fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=518d6f48-7dfd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26274988)
---
I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection next year, and the only way I’ll survive Republican attacks is if voters know I’m listening to their concerns. That’s why it’s so important I get your feedback today.
Thanks, Peter!
Jon

Paid for by Montanans for Tester

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
But what you helped us create might be a little magical.
#

Peter -
We are not living in a fairytale right now. 🧚
We won’t magically win the Senate race in Arizona without hard work, tireless grassroots organizing and thousands of folks chipping in what they can.
And it seriously won’t be a fairytale situation if we lose this race, with abortion rights, voting rights and stopping gun violence all on the line in 2024.
But you know what might be some kind of magic? Thousands of people just like you believing in our shared vision for a better future.
That’s powerful, and maybe even a little magical.
What’s more, a strong grassroots base of working people fighting powerful special interests and going toe to toe with the GOP millionaires and corporate donors funding our opponents. **Now THAT is real life magic.**
[**We can make it all real, if you stand with us today and donate to Ruben Gallego for Senate before our May deadline. Please.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230528-1-f&t=1&akid=666%2E734936%2ET_Uf5P)

body:

| |

_**HOUSE REPUBLICANS SECURE THE BORDER ACT**_

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I'm humbly asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I don't fund my campaigns for Congress the same way that a lot of my colleagues in Washington do.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=206%2E791427%2EvagukV)
Friends —
I'm reaching out this morning to humbly ask you to contribute $5 to my re-election campaign. Let me explain:
As you might already know, I don't fund my campaigns for Congress the same way that a lot of my colleagues in Washington do.
Instead of relying on corporate PAC money and max-out checks from the wealthy and powerful, we do things a little differently — we count on lots and lots of small-dollar contributions made by grassroots donors, from all walks of life and from all across the country.
That means I cannot do this alone.
If we're going to have the resources necessary to fight back against the bigoted, targeted attacks the right wing will throw our way, we have to be ready, even this early in the campaign cycle.
So from time to time, I have to ask. And with just a few days to go until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, today is one of those days.
So please:
**[Can you make your first contribution — of $5 or anything you can — to stand with our people-powered campaign today? Every donation, no matter how big or small, means so much in our fight.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230528-1-t2&t=2&akid=206%2E791427%2EvagukV)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-may23.LgMmv-&refcode=em230528-1-t2&t=23&akid=206%2E791427%2EvagukV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-may23.j8FXst&refcode=em230528-1-t2&t=24&akid=206%2E791427%2EvagukV)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-may23.d29nmU&refcode=em230528-1-t2&t=25&akid=206%2E791427%2EvagukV)**

****

As always, thank you for everything. Not just for the donation you make today, but for your passion, your encouragement, and for all that you bring to our movement's fight for justice.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: Colin Allred
subject: Peter, this race is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
| Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.

I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63945681/408517339/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230528_FR_EOM.1.5_0_3MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDM0NmM1YS02MWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vay1x7ugKsSVhB5-RZeMaZX4A3BfGywJyA-ZHd2pOak=)
Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63945683/408517341/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230528_FR_EOM.1.5_0_3MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDM0NmM1YS02MWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vay1x7ugKsSVhB5-RZeMaZX4A3BfGywJyA-ZHd2pOak=)
After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights.

I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and Brown voters.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63945685/408517343/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230528_FR_EOM.1.5_0_3MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDM0NmM1YS02MWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vay1x7ugKsSVhB5-RZeMaZX4A3BfGywJyA-ZHd2pOak=)
**It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help._[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Democrats Win Seats today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63945687/408517345/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230528_FR_EOM.1.5_0_3MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDM0NmM1YS02MWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vay1x7ugKsSVhB5-RZeMaZX4A3BfGywJyA-ZHd2pOak=)_**

We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate.

**Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. But I’ve learned that even the most difficult task can be accomplished with the right team and the right plan of action. if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, we can get this done but I need you with me.

_[So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Democrats Win Seats to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63945689/408517347/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230528_FR_EOM.1.5_0_3MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDM0NmM1YS02MWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vay1x7ugKsSVhB5-RZeMaZX4A3BfGywJyA-ZHd2pOak=)_**

Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning.

Colin Allred
| | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63945690/408517350/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230528_FR_EOM.1.5_0_3MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDM0NmM1YS02MWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vay1x7ugKsSVhB5-RZeMaZX4A3BfGywJyA-ZHd2pOak=)**
---
* * *

clean_body: | Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. = Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. = After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and Brown voters. = It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help.= We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. But I’ve learned that even the most difficult task can be accomplished with the right team and the right plan of action. if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, we can get this done but I need you with me. = Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred | | = | = | = Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC Democrats Win Seats PAC 315 INSPIRATION LANE GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878 United States **

body:
I’m proud to fight for Medicare for All. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvwZrwFz3uTYMhA0XrEjlEiaRg27fQ2814v8ourWYI6y-sozUb-nJCUuyDADJUQcEKOEgEx96_IrOrYcxIlUvGJjdVlN5Wu2mkXotAvNF4H-931E8QZg7D1SliISaTT6aoDMUh3Hh_1UkHKhs_7bgT61AFZoeDvGnheb4ktWQ_qI4/3wk/GwxiI0daTZiY6IZ9ti62Qg/h0/7yAp8k3nKQkok36-1eZGlyBCQO96M14ie62jELufRSY)

Friend, No one should have to die because they can’t afford care. No one should be forced to choose between putting food on the table or receiving life-saving treatment. But this is happening to millions of U.S. residents, even though we live in the wealthiest country on Earth. It’s outrageous. No family should ever face financial ruin because they got sick. But 20% of families are weighed down by medical debt in this country, and it’s one of the major reasons people file for bankruptcy. Our profit-driven health care system is killing us while enriching Big Pharma and health insurance CEOs. We urgently need to take the profit motive out of health care. **That’s why I joined my colleagues in reintroducing the**** _Medicare for All Act_****.** [**Add your name to tell Congress: Support Medicare for All and ensure that everyone is guaranteed free, quality health care.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKcyDIgFY0YNF1KFW7DPf0w_BsCvPGRNPZTiJjwOtPRueehMKdhoZtVYlO3CxmFPK0_X9uqe1y0AiuV62hUxhKGBhriXp3USPVeFSIbBP5L8wHPDWfAkkrKkTrTrBeAmNbEYT521WTseXTze6qUn1WiiGYYDjak--kUM0hV9HB3p8HuMwrfwQFbDn0Miga5d0VyM0aIlIqAa7VRpfoFS7S0W6A1uv15BQKiaU6WKo24t4ypTiMiFLHu_wLMi5ndMkupsmBvaCnIzIFzubvw8k7VjNgZ6_CHleD-U1IsEqj3r0Y0kHXnB1Z8bBaQwnyrPsg_Y8_9QqvJ2FpDEMe2F09nidvXOQFStjr90d8r751iX379OnjBKGviQFPP3vs3gOIXPtFJPyMSLR2Z5R90sgoui5yqcjJshYAgLGEStyQ4Z5-55kANfnW6X8YMHfIJ-2uw/3wk/GwxiI0daTZiY6IZ9ti62Qg/h1/L6pzfPBDxD-ia5Hm56yfBg7QqxCDCzaD-uCVRdJ-mic) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKcyDIgFY0YNF1KFW7DPf0w_BsCvPGRNPZTiJjwOtPRueehMKdhoZtVYlO3CxmFPK0_X9uqe1y0AiuV62hUxhKGBhriXp3USPVeFSIbBP5L8wHPDWfAkkrKkTrTrBeAmNbEYT521WTseXTze6qUn1WiiGYYDjak--kUM0hV9HB3p8HuMwrfwQFbDn0Miga5d0VyM0aIlIqAa7VRpfoFS7S0VA0CkvrlDG6UD5rqGtSrQ4pFs6PqhLPc8hsXft4v8m_ZcvAYKCwythgGckh1WXquOoOH6wmenw1AZvrMWUicwdzd3LyPUDci48yK1FH7TJYJImcF3Pkl7ynPgrIWqm1MsnRFmEIGxg5OUD3rC0Bfi4DEDxznLi16BgRLB7NghDFpQuc9k8ncpqmcsidv59pgh6VH3torPIH3RV9Zu_E58IffyHK5a-lDXUsH3b6exmWQ/3wk/GwxiI0daTZiY6IZ9ti62Qg/h2/4aesfxiSaLzDpExzRN6TVJoACLOXconHwGfrxUgWJjI)

Friend,
It’s outrageous that the wealthiest country in the history of the world cannot guarantee health care for its people.
**Health care is a human right, not a privilege. That’s why we just reintroduced Medicare for All, to ensure that everyone can access the care they need.**
**[Please sign now to tell Congress: Pass Medicare for All!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKcyDIgFY0YNF1KFW7DPf0w_BsCvPGRNPZTiJjwOtPRueehMKdhoZtVYlO3CxmFPK0_X9uqe1y0AiuV62hUxhKGBhriXp3USPVeFSIbBP5L8wHPDWfAkkrKkTrTrBeAmNbEYT521WTseXTze6qUn1WiiGYYDjak--kUM0hV9HB3p8HuMwrfwQFbDn0Miga5d0VyM0aIlIqAa7VRpfoFS7S0XRCwC6xNCARQgTgM2dXGGlbfy6Ue7b1_gyVep2VbPytvoHALWcXNQILTwj8pURFayMefi-TIHyoNYkLsMbr_9kp_fKHl4AXz1IpPIjYiRaczQekoTsc4rPnUyfVoyD0Bzo0aKBXIjHXEHy1esOuxzfkcYB4GlkyzJs0xhnZSqbDDWWb1xIuExHXU8OQbmZElCfGUa0b4En4OMylygUlb968Xi1IvwO2cjnINwrRHrOnQ/3wk/GwxiI0daTZiY6IZ9ti62Qg/h3/P0Wb0iSCE5NiqRDzRtcsfRZ-lbtIU9wYf_V9xarXZ4g)**

In the richest country on earth, thousands of people die each year because they are unable to afford the care they need.
No one should have to die because they can’t afford care. No one should be forced to choose between putting food on the table or receiving life-saving treatment.
No family should ever face financial ruin because they got sick. But 20% of families are weighed down by medical debt in this country, and it’s one of the major reasons people file for bankruptcy.
Our profit-driven health care system is killing us while enriching Big Pharma and health insurance CEOs. We urgently need to take the profit motive out of health care by passing Medicare for All.

clean_body: I’m proud to fight for Medicare for All. | | | Friend, No one should have to die because they can’t afford care. No one should be forced to choose between putting food on the table or receiving life-saving treatment. But this is happening to millions of U.S. residents, even though we live in the wealthiest country on Earth. It’s outrageous. No family should ever face financial ruin because they got sick. But 20% of families are weighed down by medical debt in this country, and it’s one of the major reasons people file for bankruptcy. Our profit-driven health care system is killing us while enriching Big Pharma and health insurance CEOs. We urgently need to take the profit motive out of health care. That’s why I joined my colleagues in reintroducing the Medicare for All Act. | Thank you for taking a stand for health care justice for all. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Sat, May 27, 2023 Subject: Sign if you agree: We need Medicare for All. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, It’s outrageous that the wealthiest country in the history of the world cannot guarantee health care for its people. Health care is a human right, not a privilege. That’s why we just reintroduced Medicare for All, to ensure that everyone can access the care they need. In the richest country on earth, thousands of people die each year because they are unable to afford the care they need. No one should have to die because they can’t afford care. No one should be forced to choose between putting food on the table or receiving life-saving treatment. No family should ever face financial ruin because they got sick. But 20% of families are weighed down by medical debt in this country, and it’s one of the major reasons people file for bankruptcy. Our profit-driven health care system is killing us while enriching Big Pharma and health insurance CEOs. We urgently need to take the profit motive out of health care by passing Medicare for All. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In just three days, we’re facing our May end-of-month fundraising deadline
#

Team -
We’ll get right to it: in just three days, our May fundraising drive comes to an end. Right now, we’re still not where we need to be to close our fundraising gap.
[**Will you rush your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us get to where we need to be by Wednesday at midnight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230528-1-15&t=1&akid=5790%2E3935704%2EhyHRWY)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230528-1-15&t=2&akid=5790%2E3935704%2EhyHRWY)**
We’re hoping that today is the day you join the folks who have made an online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC this month.
The truth is, we can’t work towards a future free from gun violence without the support of folks like you who care about ending our nation’s gun violence epidemic.
[**What do you say? Can we count on you to contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today before our monthly fundraising deadline on Wednesday?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230528-1-15&t=3&akid=5790%2E3935704%2EhyHRWY)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may23.NkeOir&amount=3&t=22&akid=5790%2E3935704%2EhyHRWY)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-may23.9ZfwpO&refcode=em230528-1-15&t=23&akid=5790%2E3935704%2EhyHRWY)**
---

| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-may23.VbphPI&refcode=em230528-1-15&t=24&akid=5790%2E3935704%2EhyHRWY)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-may23.xompaR&refcode=em230528-1-15&t=25&akid=5790%2E3935704%2EhyHRWY)**

Thank you. At critical deadlines like these, your support is especially important.
\- The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=5790%2E3935704%2EhyHRWY) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| It’s not worth Adam responding directly to his MAGA critics, who supported the most corrupt president in history and apparently don’t know what “corrupt” really means.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2351%2E5257348%2ENEfrYZ)
Derek, check out this recent headline from one of the leading far-right publications:
**_“In a town teeming with corruption and liars, Adam Schiff ranks first”_**
— _The Washington Examiner_ , 5/22/23
It’s not worth Adam responding directly to his MAGA critics, who supported the most corrupt president in history and apparently don’t know what “corrupt” really means. To borrow a quote from _The Princess Bride_ — “You keep using that word. I do not think it means what you think it means.”
Donald Trump, George Santos, Kevin McCarthy, Clarence Thomas...the list of corrupt actors and outright liars in Washington is quite long. And it tilts hard to the right.
**[Derek, if this headline looks as absurd on its face as it did to us, chip in $10 to help Adam fight back against the far-right’s relentless and relentlessly _bogus_ attacks.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230528_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2351%2E5257348%2ENEfrYZ)**

Clarence Thomas and his wife accepting gifts valued in the hundreds of thousands of dollars and not reporting it on his Supreme Court disclosures is corrupt.
George Santos being indicted on 13 felony counts, including lying to Congress, is the rare liar who has lied so frequently that he’s achieved international disgrace.
Donald Trump...well, he’s the personification of lies and corruption. And the model to whom the rest of the MAGA wannabes all aspire.
**[Derek, with 3 days left until Adam’s end-of-month fundraising deadline, we need your help to fight back against far-right attacks — no matter how absurd they are.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230528_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=2351%2E5257348%2ENEfrYZ)**

— Team Schiff

name: President Donald Trump
subject: Will you take the 2023 Election Poll?

The race to save America from the radical Left is in full swing. Senate Republicans asked me to reach out to see if you would help with a QUICK favor, Peter. With the fate of our country at stake, we can only trust our top supporters to help Senate Republicans and our Party WIN, and I’m proud to say YOU are one of them. **_In fact, we have so much trust in you, you have been selected to represent EVERY patriot within 50 miles of you._** Can you take a few minutes to complete the critical [**2023 Election Year Poll?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2fdaafa7f6184c76b1e80435609db437&_e=yvUC78JqJo67PDvbsHrIOZWDGXVXBM2_X138RjpYbM6h6WhmKEqDH_A0cNN_gH6ZBkwDQM8UZ11o8wV5V2CRM4Q5a77tFMRUKXuOUV2hqcXfjlnpkXXh60a4al3MGYJmPlYTnaq8skoFJlQY-pExy_lq3SN2sTtaFEfGb2o9hDyb9uIs16NQYbKzPO0eAx_CkykSYLM61kM9ZzB4NSFU-UDKYxZ_L91Fja7jreV-tYRP2Dx5LANNizsULJH_o0g_ibYobUs_V5AhmplglnPBZKjo_wUNNQbmi3SFajc5T-E-AROU3ZnXYK8fnJ9n8RkodhSLe0rpwZLUvZkffxFaAqgIqbKMsgT65-iet7nLaj14-i7pn1chHxXbTUpx14lzbtv6cG9n-his7WR5rXNeI2LHE2BmFtuOgwt09Ni2awDcj_YxLRK4kcLeFQePTIq-) I don’t care what the “consultants” and the Washington Swamp have to say; I care what YOU think, Peter. **[Please submit your response to our Official 2023 Election Year Poll As Soon As Possible to save America from the far-Left. >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2fdaafa7f6184c76b1e80435609db437&_e=yvUC78JqJo67PDvbsHrIOZWDGXVXBM2_X138RjpYbM6h6WhmKEqDH_A0cNN_gH6ZBkwDQM8UZ11o8wV5V2CRM4Q5a77tFMRUKXuOUV2hqcXfjlnpkXXh60a4al3MGYJmPlYTnaq8skoFJlQY-pExy_lq3SN2sTtaFEfGb2o9hDyb9uIs16NQYbKzPO0eAx_CkykSYLM61kM9ZzB4NSFU-UDKYxZ_L91Fja7jreV-tYRP2Dx5LANNizsULJH_o0g_ibYobUs_V5AhmplglnPBZLPEa61aupnmzT5nnUixDSFeGygEyo7CHUjRacYF6pamA3CKGZBESh60dHRuwhMGhqVuuk809tpsUzBhJApmRleciAoBN-TgdUWyO2SqDMEd0cDnTPMfX5v6aMUyFatovXASuXo1WWgJM7FWRRpP4-waKzULgTMADawWziPVd_HC)**

Thank you,

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: Yes: I’m running for president, and this is why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36d940736f674cd789d8006d9ae56c66&_e=riuSigdBkR6zDsmXeiB8JZx7IPwUkwcGEma4KYbDIBy-xXBVLQtaXf2yq9NRZ7-X3hoY61aeECkaBLQRtu72nZPb2bb7pjSuEpXL-OLIdKIdMsk4N6WhX9j0D3YwJc34RxFJI22KCf28aku_6ynYtPjdODiOmOSU_KnXH3-sjf5s_oepd7uYW8y5ZTZNT1JVodqNrDHH75DD49YtPYIcY3_D0XVGrtAva3_7A9LADtoUw7ZZ4p9xHrT2sHWSL6D7UXOdTYrewRgCt9ZHpDaPAXSNDAz_NfyKpKQNfIuryn1ivc6u_lB1Pk7LG_-fJITY2GNktzup9u9hgs4rcO4UabuzH7Eu-sRPgRsutl9D8x7fmFDVTl5jgLZNnaUG8eWBmbI-ecZkWtQeJoES50FM3nyIDaq7cfG_KhvVsFjs5xYuCgAWun-S8eorDfaMVDvI)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36d940736f674cd789d8006d9ae56c66&_e=riuSigdBkR6zDsmXeiB8JZx7IPwUkwcGEma4KYbDIBy-xXBVLQtaXf2yq9NRZ7-X3hoY61aeECkaBLQRtu72nZPb2bb7pjSuEpXL-OLIdKIdMsk4N6WhX9j0D3YwJc34RxFJI22KCf28aku_6ynYtPjdODiOmOSU_KnXH3-sjf5s_oepd7uYW8y5ZTZNT1JVodqNrDHH75DD49YtPYIcY3_D0XVGrtAva3_7A9LADtoUw7ZZ4p9xHrT2sHWSL6D7UXOdTYrewRgCt9ZHpDaPAVlWeQsWR-yYmXAAo85O42g4VlWydj_xWOzbMkfWmUNRdONh8nmFacSia4TIkdwS-8kEJEa1IjBKa6RdskJ-EteibngesPSfk_VV_UUF0MBxEpvryFAkQt9-c3pxcKO9y1Fqf6vs8isTdxqsStANUd4wJcvECE3-J6-JLtQsf3kF)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36d940736f674cd789d8006d9ae56c66&_e=riuSigdBkR6zDsmXeiB8JZx7IPwUkwcGEma4KYbDIBy-xXBVLQtaXf2yq9NRZ7-X3hoY61aeECkaBLQRtu72nZPb2bb7pjSuEpXL-OLIdKIdMsk4N6WhX9j0D3YwJc34RxFJI22KCf28aku_6ynYtPjdODiOmOSU_KnXH3-sjf5s_oepd7uYW8y5ZTZNT1JVodqNrDHH75DD49YtPYIcY3_D0XVGrtAva3_7A9LADtoUw7ZZ4p9xHrT2sHWSL6D7UXOdTYrewRgCt9ZHpDaPAT553cWCbC-brUCSK4U6faA85a9ulYG5FWG1Pvp0C5lJ1_FeM9wUYnOALHF_gtCGcS54oNjarBzLYtpcDMiw9AvZvYa8IzpJFy-4EsNRvm2dHvd_1UGIKSJ-ArzgN0dLSzjEbf9QuBYseykDhXDfj-Qgubr6yHsg2_r123V4VHuK)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36d940736f674cd789d8006d9ae56c66&_e=riuSigdBkR6zDsmXeiB8JZx7IPwUkwcGEma4KYbDIBy-xXBVLQtaXf2yq9NRZ7-X3hoY61aeECkaBLQRtu72nZPb2bb7pjSuEpXL-OLIdKIdMsk4N6WhX9j0D3YwJc34RxFJI22KCf28aku_6ynYtPjdODiOmOSU_KnXH3-sjf5s_oepd7uYW8y5ZTZNT1JVodqNrDHH75DD49YtPYIcY3_D0XVGrtAva3_7A9LADtoUw7ZZ4p9xHrT2sHWSL6D7UXOdTYrewRgCt9ZHpDaPAcBR49brOPuyaEKrmpLKiOVINw3ZkE95rKQsm9lDtsGhgArLrWj3Pu3dAI4OiQyz7FrrO1uNn0ZSy54cZ_mGaleAsM_ukfDNY6IIX2iJqgO-IqLQvgCqq_R9IvGxSzzz4x_vXmLwyzbjml_pyvmFZ6sovvhEi8IFI-3mD54LEK2n "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36d940736f674cd789d8006d9ae56c66&_e=riuSigdBkR6zDsmXeiB8JZx7IPwUkwcGEma4KYbDIBy-xXBVLQtaXf2yq9NRZ7-X3hoY61aeECkaBLQRtu72nZPb2bb7pjSuEpXL-OLIdKIdMsk4N6WhX9j0D3YwJc34RxFJI22KCf28aku_6ynYtPjdODiOmOSU_KnXH3-sjf5s_oepd7uYW8y5ZTZNT1JVodqNrDHH75DD49YtPYIcY3_D0XVGrtAva3_7A9LADtoUw7ZZ4p9xHrT2sHWSL6D7UXOdTYrewRgCt9ZHpDaPAaHX34p27nK23ra3m4QhpdcHU6VCRsY9aZylRFnAP0Drt_yZzhkKN-qF10nz-R6E_ibmwTXr5LTSKdJQMqrhzVR25Ah33wQRcjeG_L8Gzai2Z1OLXgqVnByS2L_YLL6vA26Im6JzFOg3NgoH3-SX-d0rbcKnmJemgSmHF-UHGpuu)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Friend: [I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36d940736f674cd789d8006d9ae56c66&_e=riuSigdBkR6zDsmXeiB8JZx7IPwUkwcGEma4KYbDIBy-xXBVLQtaXf2yq9NRZ7-X3hoY61aeECkaBLQRtu72nZPb2bb7pjSuEpXL-OLIdKIdMsk4N6WhX9j0D3YwJc34RxFJI22KCf28aku_6ynYtPjdODiOmOSU_KnXH3-sjf5s_oepd7uYW8y5ZTZNT1JVodqNrDHH75DD49YtPYIcY3_D0XVGrtAva3_7A9LADtoUw7ZZ4p9xHrT2sHWSL6D7UXOdTYrewRgCt9ZHpDaPAfo-oTB92TyqNATTZPls-z6dI0r7qBxYOroDUjOoI69KMhHnh7tIiUOoFMwuPmEeNBB12IqcX8l5eDU5vWTLGoQ0Ls39OCK4jX5a3AEPxKn2b_uMdtlD5QRRwEdkoaa2p99gGJGTspZZ8sHlp6awDOLDhiLBav9BYQ0JGpp1hzmK "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: | Folks, I’m going to make this quick. Ron DeSantis just launched his presidential campaign. Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans have been holding the full faith and credit of the United States hostage. Donald Trump is campaigning on — and taking credit for — all abortion bans across the country. MAGA extremism is now mainstream in today’s GOP. This is exactly why protecting our Democratic Senate majority is so important. But it won’t be easy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Our crises do not discriminate based on weekends or holidays

body:
The best way to fight back against the right-wing attacks on our democracy is by building our momentum and outraising the right at every turn.
#
Peter,
We know it’s a holiday weekend, so we’ll try to keep this short.
**Reaching our end of month fundraising goal of $7,585 before our deadline will put our movement in the best position to respond to the calls for community change — but we’ll need your support to get there.**[**Can you chip in $3 or whatever you’re able to give to help us close the gap and reach our goal?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42250?source=em20230528-2528&t=1&akid=2528%2E420207%2ESioddM)
As a grassroots movement, our fight is entirely sustained by small dollar donations from dedicated supporters like you, Peter. **Instead of relying on donations from predatory corporations or billionaire donors with personal interests, Pramila knows that the real power lies with the people.**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42250?refcode=em20230528-2528&t=20&akid=2528%2E420207%2ESioddM)**
The best way to fight back against the right-wing attacks on our democracy is by building our momentum and out-raising the right at every turn. And your support is pushing us to victory.
Thank you,
Jayapal HQ

body:
Our Republic needs you - Act now!

| Peter, the very values that define us as Republicans - and as Americans - are under immediate threat. **[The Radical Left is pushing an agenda that completely undermines our principles, and we urgently need your support.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9jqV8kkGs0UdGU5BlgPkuwol0W8lDcP9ifQbQYkUmOWeEF8TvKTKwUch0yrSSYHL_aMJcV7S4Lh-DdY9Tu5odcZuJ5EOL3TzxIQbLa6PYLCo2yV9gZrdmrWRNUqatBOhojIszLKsCk9nzw3lCHjyy_2xEhAO1NJxNAIhmZXEsEp1OdxuPmvxecIi2l_2tsNRM1lFr-67SKnEspQzOWvKyeVQvxwOmLQMXwI6qnLu3ogDYV4TgYR4GSbqkD2CuvRzZ2U1X93RJJmL9spiEIe__M4tTe-0NvX5FwzDNVh312s3WeATiD4HTAZ0Ts-RaptuibpWyuWN4IPKQVJpYV65gflCoclYTQxfatkpfK_3wwTlcAlr5_7UWzLYCkgrbHljy5ZgRvnvhnXXXrykSoC0t4mVsTrq8H3FxkAQh4Sam1Y89aoBjpz5n1CcTswCfoNaP&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230517_hd_confronting_82_955&n=1)** Look at what just happened here in my home state of North Carolina. [The Radical Left attempted to bully those who disagreed with their extreme stance on abortion. But our bold Republicans stood up for what was right, overriding a veto that protected life after the first trimester in North Carolina.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9jqV8kkGs0UdGU5BlgPkuwol0W8lDcP9ifQbQYkUmOWeEF8TvKTKwUch0yrSSYHL_aMJcV7S4Lh-DdY9Tu5odcZuJ5EOL3TzxIQbLa6PYLCo2yV9gZrdmrWRNUqatBOhojIszLKsCk9nzw3lCHjyy_2xEhAO1NJxNAIhmZXEsEp1OdxuPmvxecIi2l_2tsNRM1lFr-67SKnEspQzOWvKyeVQvxwOmLQMXwI6qnLu3ogDYV4TgYR4GSbqkD2CuvRzZ2U1X93RJJmL9spiEIe__M4tTe-0NvX5FwzDNVh312s3WeATiD4HTAZ0Ts-RaptuibpWyuWN4IPKQVJpYV65gflCoclYTQxfatkpfK_3wwTlcAlr5_7UWzLYCkgrbHljy5ZgRvnvhnXXXrykSoC0t4mVsTrq8H3FxkAQh4Sam1Y89aoBjpz5n1CcTswCfoNaP&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230517_hd_confronting_82_955&n=2) We stood up against Governor Cooper and the Democrats' out-of-step values, and we won. This is not a time for complacency. The Radical Left's relentless assault on our values continues, and we must take a firm stand. **[I am calling on you today, Peter, to add your name immediately in support of our cause. The deadline is 11:59 PM TONIGHT, and we cannot afford a moment's delay.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9jqV8kkGs0UdGU5BlgPkuwol0W8lDcP9ifQbQYkUmOWeEF8TvKTKwUch0yrSSYHL_aMJcV7S4Lh-DdY9Tu5odcZuJ5EOL3TzxIQbLa6PYLCo2yV9gZrdmrWRNUqatBOhojIszLKsCk9nzw3lCHjyy_2xEhAO1NJxNAIhmZXEsEp1OdxuPmvxecIi2l_2tsNRM1lFr-67SKnEspQzOWvKyeVQvxwOmLQMXwI6qnLu3ogDYV4TgYR4GSbqkD2CuvRzZ2U1X93RJJmL9spiEIe__M4tTe-0NvX5FwzDNVh312s3WeATiD4HTAZ0Ts-RaptuibpWyuWN4IPKQVJpYV65gflCoclYTQxfatkpfK_3wwTlcAlr5_7UWzLYCkgrbHljy5ZgRvnvhnXXXrykSoC0t4mVsTrq8H3FxkAQh4Sam1Y-wXTo0WB8VrkI5H4hkXu_E&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230517_hd_confronting_82_955&n=3)** | | [ Stand Firm with Republicans ](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9jqV8kkGs0UdGU5BlgPkuwol0W8lDcP9ifQbQYkUmOWeEF8TvKTKwUch0yrSSYHL_aMJcV7S4Lh-DdY9Tu5odcZuJ5EOL3TzxIQbLa6PYLCo2yV9gZrdmrWRNUqatBOhojIszLKsCk9nzw3lCHjyy_2xEhAO1NJxNAIhmZXEsEp1OdxuPmvxecIi2l_2tsNRM1lFr-67SKnEspQzOWvKyeVQvxwOmLQMXwI6qnLu3ogDYV4TgYR4GSbqkD2CuvRzZ2U1X93RJJmL9spiEIe__M4tTe-0NvX5FwzDNVh312s3WeATiD4HTAZ0Ts-RaptuibpWyuWN4IPKQVJpYV65gflCoclYTQxfatkpfK_3wwTlcAlr5_7UWzLYCkgrbHljy5ZgRvnvhnXXXrykSoC0t4mVsTrq8H3FxkAQh4Sam1Y-wXTo0WB8VrkI5H4hkXu_E&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230517_hd_confronting_82_955&n=4)
---
Remember, the fight is far from over. **[Each passing day brings a new threat from the Radical Left, a new challenge to our values.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9jqV8kkGs0UdGU5BlgPkuwol0W8lDcP9ifQbQYkUmOWeEF8TvKTKwUch0yrSSYHL_aMJcV7S4Lh-DdY9Tu5odcZuJ5EOL3TzxIQbLa6PYLCo2yV9gZrdmrWRNUqatBOhojIszLKsCk9nzw3lCHjyy_2xEhAO1NJxNAIhmZXEsEp1OdxuPmvxecIi2l_2tsNRM1lFr-67SKnEspQzOWvKyeVQvxwOmLQMXwI6qnLu3ogDYV4TgYR4GSbqkD2CuvRzZ2U1X93RJJmL9spiEIe__M4tTe-0NvX5FwzDNVh312s3WeATiD4HTAZ0Ts-RaptuibpWyuWN4IPKQVJpYV65gflCoclYTQxfatkpfK_3wwTlcAlr5_7UWzLYCkgrbHljy5ZgRvnvhnXXXrykSoC0t4mVsTrq8H3FxkAQh4Sam1Y89aoBjpz5n1CcTswCfoNaP&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230517_hd_confronting_82_955&n=5)** Your immediate action is not just a show of support - it's a line drawn in the sand against those who would undermine our way of life.
Let us stand united once again. **[Add your name, show the Radical Left that we are strong, we are resolute, and we are ready to fight for our values.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9jqV8kkGs0UdGU5BlgPkuwol0W8lDcP9ifQbQYkUmOWeEF8TvKTKwUch0yrSSYHL_aMJcV7S4Lh-DdY9Tu5odcZuJ5EOL3TzxIQbLa6PYLCo2yV9gZrdmrWRNUqatBOhojIszLKsCk9nzw3lCHjyy_2xEhAO1NJxNAIhmZXEsEp1OdxuPmvxecIi2l_2tsNRM1lFr-67SKnEspQzOWvKyeVQvxwOmLQMXwI6qnLu3ogDYV4TgYR4GSbqkD2CuvRzZ2U1X93RJJmL9spiEIe__M4tTe-0NvX5FwzDNVh312s3WeATiD4HTAZ0Ts-RaptuibpWyuWN4IPKQVJpYV65gflCoclYTQxfatkpfK_3wwTlcAlr5_7UWzLYCkgrbHljy5ZgRvnvhnXXXrykSoC0t4mVsTrq8H3FxkAQh4Sam1Y-wXTo0WB8VrkI5H4hkXu_E&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230517_hd_confronting_82_955&n=6)** Remember, the deadline is 11:59 PM TONIGHT. We cannot - and will not - wait any longer.
| [ Confirm Your Support, Peter » ](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9jqV8kkGs0UdGU5BlgPkuwol0W8lDcP9ifQbQYkUmOWeEF8TvKTKwUch0yrSSYHL_aMJcV7S4Lh-DdY9Tu5odcZuJ5EOL3TzxIQbLa6PYLCo2yV9gZrdmrWRNUqatBOhojIszLKsCk9nzw3lCHjyy_2xEhAO1NJxNAIhmZXEsEp1OdxuPmvxecIi2l_2tsNRM1lFr-67SKnEspQzOWvKyeVQvxwOmLQMXwI6qnLu3ogDYV4TgYR4GSbqkD2CuvRzZ2U1X93RJJmL9spiEIe__M4tTe-0NvX5FwzDNVh312s3WeATiD4HTAZ0Ts-RaptuibpWyuWN4IPKQVJpYV65gflCoclYTQxfatkpfK_3wwTlcAlr5_7UWzLYCkgrbHljy5ZgRvnvhnXXXrykSoC0t4mVsTrq8H3FxkAQh4Sam1Y-wXTo0WB8VrkI5H4hkXu_E&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230517_hd_confronting_82_955&n=7)

Thank you for standing with us. With your help, we will continue to resist the Radical Left and defend our shared values. We are stronger together, and together, we will prevail.

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: Trust me when I say that you are not our piggybank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs8a-UJDNr

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their
self-constructed fundraising deadlines..

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os8a-UJDNr

Good morning friend,

A
lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their
self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making
you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At
Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our
entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on
this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT
our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and
our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you
can't afford it.

You
will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that
promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No
smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's
the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If
that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of
today then please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any
amount you can afford.

Chip in
$15

Chip in
$25

Chip in
$47

Chip in
$75

Chip in
$100

Chip in
$250

Chip in ANY AMOUNT to join Team DeSantis

Let's show the country we love that we're willing to fight for
it.

Chip in today to join Team DeSantis.

Yours in freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked
his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors
and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also
graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard,
he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During
his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a
U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in
Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and
convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and
advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget
amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose
malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their
authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion
conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading
champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the
VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television
host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &

clean_body: A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines.. Good morning friend, A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they? At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach. Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank. Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it. You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies. That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House. If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. Chip in $15 Chip in $25 Chip in $47 Chip in $75 Chip in $100 Chip in $250 Chip in ANY AMOUNT to join Team DeSantis Let's show the country we love that we're willing to fight for it. Chip in today to join Team DeSantis. Yours in freedom, Ron DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. #
Peter, I just checked in with my finance team on our fundraising numbers before next week’s deadline, and this month has been particularly slow.
Take a look at our donations:

We can’t afford a slow month, not when we are preparing for one of the toughest election years yet.

I know the power this team has, and _you_ have never let me down before.
Honestly, Peter, I don’t enjoy confessing we’re behind – but I have no choice here, because we need your help to catch up.

Dick Durbin

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: it's up to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'm about to ask you to endorse my campaign — will you give me 30 seconds to explain why your endorsement is so important to me?
Mitch McConnell just has to flip two seats to take back control of the Senate. And election experts are calling the 2024 Senate map "a GOP dream." Meanwhile, New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in _decades._ They nearly won the race for governor, and they helped flip enough House seats red to give Kevin McCarthy the majority.
**Now, Republicans are _already_ attacking my campaign. It's up to us to stop another red wave in New York next November.** **That's why I'm asking 6,000 grassroots activists to endorse my campaign today and show the GOP that this seat isn't up for grabs.[_You're one of my most committed supporters, friend, so I'm really counting on you: Please, will you sign on before midnight tonight to become a Citizen Endorser?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63949082/408530297/-618528345?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4167-su-nd&refcode=jtk4167-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2M5ZDgwMy02OWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQnqNP4sjv1uJZf3_mcDeqUti6THbPejbryL8m5F2zc=&emci=5e361567-0ffb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e7c9d803-69fd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

During the last session of Congress, I worked night and day to pass legislation to ban gun trafficking, reform how the military handles sexual assault cases, expand benefits for veterans and more. I couldn't be more proud of these legislative victories — and they wouldn't have been possible without strong grassroots support from people like you.
But whether it's restoring reproductive rights to all Americans or finally securing paid family leave, there's still _so much_ work ahead of us. And we simply can't get the job done if we lose our Democratic Senate majority.
I'm fighting to save our Senate majority so that I can continue to deliver meaningful change for families like yours — and I need you with me. **So even though your Citizen Endorsement might feel like a small drop in a big bucket, this is how we build change, friend — one person at a time. [_Please, will you add your name to endorse my campaign before our midnight deadline? Your endorsement would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63949084/408530299/-618528345?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4167-su-nd&refcode=jtk4167-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2M5ZDgwMy02OWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQnqNP4sjv1uJZf3_mcDeqUti6THbPejbryL8m5F2zc=&emci=5e361567-0ffb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e7c9d803-69fd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63949087/408530302/1575385346?code=jtk4167-su-nd&refcode=jtk4167-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2M5ZDgwMy02OWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQnqNP4sjv1uJZf3_mcDeqUti6THbPejbryL8m5F2zc=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63949088/408530306/1575385346?code=jtk4167-su-nd&refcode=jtk4167-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2M5ZDgwMy02OWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQnqNP4sjv1uJZf3_mcDeqUti6THbPejbryL8m5F2zc=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: | | | Friend, I'm about to ask you to endorse my campaign — will you give me 30 seconds to explain why your endorsement is so important to me? Mitch McConnell just has to flip two seats to take back control of the Senate. And election experts are calling the 2024 Senate map "a GOP dream." Meanwhile, New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades. They nearly won the race for governor, and they helped flip enough House seats red to give Kevin McCarthy the majority. Now, Republicans are already attacking my campaign. It's up to us to stop another red wave in New York next November. That's why I'm asking 6,000 grassroots activists to endorse my campaign today and show the GOP that this seat isn't up for grabs. | | During the last session of Congress, I worked night and day to pass legislation to ban gun trafficking, reform how the military handles sexual assault cases, expand benefits for veterans and more. I couldn't be more proud of these legislative victories — and they wouldn't have been possible without strong grassroots support from people like you. But whether it's restoring reproductive rights to all Americans or finally securing paid family leave, there's still so much work ahead of us. And we simply can't get the job done if we lose our Democratic Senate majority. I'm fighting to save our Senate majority so that I can continue to deliver meaningful change for families like yours — and I need you with me. So even though your Citizen Endorsement might feel like a small drop in a big bucket, this is how we build change, friend — one person at a time. | | Thank you, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

.........................................................
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc1u2zAQhJ-Gukmglr8-6NCU8KEGWvSSBLkY9JKy1xApQaLi5u0LGXau3wwW82F9mgbqvzpmXhjAhcLCAJj4wQAO8uX9tz68HVx9_XSvtdNK3rYUfjKA8jXF7-rjShOTp2GjxlWhA7SAWMWu1VaBNVzJ6tIFY7mQJ5DCInpEkD03iEKJnkMreUUdcBBcgW1Va0A16tR7ezJWqh20hgsm-Y1yE8bsh3At85qmBsdUDd2llGm5T9oz2C8R1zk2N8pzDFtjY_4z1j7FmdDX15Fyqfs1h9nTQvlc45gSlRIjg33GYVB9H6zZaQCp40lZJvZrSccUA62JCfcQ1htcxnXGyIRDOvoHQ58mT-fMhHtKPZMxl5gLE27Xas1AH_NAgQn3Ln-Jf_byptUd3l8iXPr4-wf5x-uumrsw3WgYaNGGSX7eFmxy_wMAAP__EHGMfg)
---
Friend,
The truth is: we are not only running against Crooked Joe Biden...
...We are also going up against the entire Deep State.
Entrenched bureaucrats within the federal government have been trying to SABOTAGE our America First movement since the day I came down the Golden Escalator in 2015.
They’ve FRAMED me as a Russian asset, incited countless witch hunts against me, colluded with billion-dollar tech corporations, and even **ARRESTED** me.
_**Some Republican politicians respond to those HEINOUS attacks by saying that we should “APPEASE” the Deep State by running a Swamp-approved candidate instead!**_
These RINOs think that if you compromise with the sinister forces that are actively trying to SUBVERT our Republic that these Deep State agents will simply go away forever and give you your country back and let you be free...
...I can’t decide if these RINOs are cowards or fools.
Friend, there is only ONE candidate who has vowed to NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Deep State – and that’s the man who even got _ARRESTED_ for the sake of our movement.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: A story about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
And how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[make your first donation of any amount toward my grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33528?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt) But first, I want to tell you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33528?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt)
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?
I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**
I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**[We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. If you’re with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today so we can get this message in front of Missouri voters and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33528?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33529?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33529?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33529?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33529?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33529?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33529?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33528?refcode=em20230528-3182&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt)

I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter.
Thanks for being part of it,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230528-3182-footer&t=11&refcode2=3182_614464_QQ9cbt&akid=3182%2E614464%2EQQ9cbt)**

| Fellow activist, after a very busy month of primary elections, our work here at NPP continues as we are the only organization in Pennsylvania conducting year-round voter registration and civic engagement. The Municipal/Local/Judicial Election is next up, and this election is the deciding factor between true representative leadership or far-right anti-democratic control.

The PA GOP has doubled down on election deniers and has sent anti-democratic county election officials back to the ballot this November. We know exactly what we are up against this fall, and now is the time to utilize each and every month leading up to Election Day registering voters, educating communities, and diversifying our electorate.

**Our May end-of-month deadline is in just three days, and we need to ensure not a single goal passes us by.

[With the right resources – and your help! – we can continue to register voters in our centered communities. clean_body: With the proper resources, we have A LOT of people we can reach between now and November. = | Fellow activist, after a very busy month of primary elections, our work here at NPP continues as we are the only organization in Pennsylvania conducting year-round voter registration and civic engagement. The Municipal/Local/Judicial Election is next up, and this election is the deciding factor between true representative leadership or far-right anti-democratic control. The PA GOP has doubled down on election deniers and has sent anti-democratic county election officials back to the ballot this November. We know exactly what we are up against this fall, and now is the time to utilize each and every month leading up to Election Day registering voters, educating communities, and diversifying our electorate. Our May end-of-month deadline is in just three days, and we need to ensure not a single goal passes us by. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. body:
We know exactly what we need to do to protect our democracy in 2024, and it all starts Friday.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63950241/408534853/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230528EOM2_N_ML_90do_3_NG_B_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWYxZTBiNC02ZGZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YUBxZSTL7B9L93OfcZoe4Djd_9s5KRyml-fizXMuvZc=)
Team,
We know exactly what we need to do to protect our democracy against the far right in 2024, and it comes down to building back progressive strength in rural America.
Over the past two decades, the Democratic Party has lost significant support among voters in rural areas — allowing the far-right to establish a serious cultural and political presence throughout our nation.
At the core of this transformation is one key issue: 100,000 races a year without even an attempt to contest Republican victories.
**[That is why we have set a goal of raising $1.5 million by June 2 to help recruit Democratic candidates in the six battleground states where it matters the most — and push the overall vote share 3 points more Democratic while we’re at it. With your help, we can invest in rural progressives, flip these key swing states blue in 2024, and protect our democracy. Chip in $10 or more right now to help us close the gap by Friday! →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63950242/408534854/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230528EOM2_N_ML_90do_3_NG_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWYxZTBiNC02ZGZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YUBxZSTL7B9L93OfcZoe4Djd_9s5KRyml-fizXMuvZc=)**

subject: Can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Every grassroots contribution adds up in a big way.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=92%2E552475%2EHHEn4N)
Peter,
You’re a core member of our team, so you know that Bob Casey has fought long and hard to bring real change to families across the Commonwealth.
There is so much on the line for Pennsylvania’s working families in the next election, and Bob is ready to keep delivering results. He’s working to cut through the gridlock, stand up to powerful special interests, and make the lives of hardworking Pennsylvanians a little bit easier.
The bottom line is, we need to keep Bob fighting for us in the Senate and stop extreme Republicans from taking control and undoing the progress we’ve made.
**[Our end-of-month deadline is approaching fast, and we’re hoping to raise $25,000 before then to keep Bob in the strongest position to win. Can we count on you to chip in toward our goal today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230528-1?refcode=em20230528-1&refcode2=92_552475_HHEn4N&akid=92%2E552475%2EHHEn4N)**

Every grassroots contribution adds up in a big way. If everyone reading this email chips in $5 or more, we’ll reach our goal well ahead of the Mary 31st deadline.
A competitive Senate race like this one will become very expensive, very fast. We are scaling up as quickly as possible to create a strong campaign that can win. But we’ll need your help.
**[Can you help us reach our $25,000 goal by May 31st? Your contribution could be the one that helps us reach our goal before the deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230528-1?refcode=em20230528-1&refcode2=92_552475_HHEn4N&akid=92%2E552475%2EHHEn4N)**

Team Casey

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: The issues survey
body:
We need your help identifying the issues impacting Washington state which you care most about. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61855528:sIjOUJD9N:m:1:2610672541:5859C09108BA55AB5B05431390EC0C84:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, We hope you are taking a moment to remember the ultimate sacrifice paid by our country's men and women in uniform for our uniquely American rights. As always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... ** ** **This week 's Newsmaker Interview...** Kyle Mann, the editor-in-chief of the conservative satirical website Babylon Bee, joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. In his interview, Mann described how the Twitter ban before Elon Musk's purchase increased the circulation of Babylon Bee's material. He also shared his thoughts on Elon Musk, the liberals' constant attack on free speech, and how he decides what issues are appropriate targets for Babylon Bee satire. Mann concluded the interview by humorously stating future plans for the website. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61855529:sIjOUJD9N:m:1:2610672541:5859C09108BA55AB5B05431390EC0C84:r "https://shiftwa.org/babylonbees-kyle-mann-you-have-to-laugh-at-the-absurdity-of-the-situation/"). **This week 's top story...** The mainstream media often helps Democrats by allowing them to brag to their voter base (and donors) about supporting new taxes every year. They also allow them to continue to lie, without any challenge, to the public about the taxes they raise. Consider this whopper from a progressive pro-tax leader claiming that the new state income tax on capital gains is fully funding education: "This news shows what we have said all along - we have the ability to fully fund our education system when we ask the wealthy to come to the table like the rest of us and pay what they truly owe in taxes." [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61855530:sIjOUJD9N:m:1:2610672541:5859C09108BA55AB5B05431390EC0C84:r). **In case you missed it ...** We need your help identifying the issues impacting Washington state which you care most about. We'll use the results of the survey to put together our questionnaire for candidates seeking office. Please take a moment to identify which **three** are the most important to you when deciding who to vote for - or write in your own top issue(s). We'll put the results to good use! [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61855531:sIjOUJD9N:m:1:2610672541:5859C09108BA55AB5B05431390EC0C84:r "http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61848850:s0uP3JDfN:m:1:2610674527:AA83184AD0835535D96501AC9D17F37F:r") ** ** **This week 's wind-down...** This Memorial Day weekend, we honor the men and women in uniform that made the ultimate sacrifice for us all. Let the eagle soar. (Photo credit: former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler) | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61855532:sIjOUJD9N:m:1:2610672541:5859C09108BA55AB5B05431390EC0C84:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14211268&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osIjOUJD9N).

subject: I can’t be any more blunt than this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
This is as important as wings on a plane.

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=12d27c4521d3466da736730e631caabb&_e=VhpYzql6XzgumZJWxhzuNqjXq9hjjd4sYQd-xnoFVNnsaBtEUK2QqRcIZ4AoFtpDHNiAE5i9eK1xyowzdZxImZReUJtDcQNqIC4wAN44jStSjAVthUvweYZmB81r4VKl2XSO-akdb6bQl5PmNHx3kgLZtiJCLOIr1E-8Aqm9mWFnDswvXMpJUQM_w7slZ44ixuHCaDxH85F5oxXJ0zYVHTHVSlnVa5a177n9MOhuPwkhTRe9wKu3wK0IXjc2RjgySQ8irN4WwIs05tr3W89zhQ4PvUGfOO3U2G1pxkwnxjnZkpgzj8NZXNmqW2_MZpRognnsT_V2XxkuLw0UcUqHRky23FcbfWwzYTM_zg4kk1qDf_B_cdNfkHRT8abXcCBFmq6bBnfzTV3JdjApozjYOrHi8xB6f67RI3iV8S1MJ8j4fRNT_8_8PmJ_HRazXUGJgdCn2ZfsXo77--JgUQv2nwEM8IUUl_i_DA-xb6fmI_RDrHIzg3ijtELqfeP6CGCd5ThAz6m1mnR1DldroLFD0if_FO0vfKu9VPuFHNVU4TzEROw5TzKqO1aysvszu8Jm)
---
Folks, I'm not usually one to be dramatic, but I can't help but be a little jumpy reaching out to you today.

The Socialist Left is crippling our country every single day with their open border policies, woke ideology, and letting the greatest cities in our beautiful country be overrun by rampant crime. **_It 's a shame, and it's got to be stopped!_**

name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.
They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.
And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.
Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!
Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Southern Progress before my critical end-of-month deadline to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.
But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.
That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Southern Progress? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let's do this.
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

subject: DACA update
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw this DACA update: | | | Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this update: Judge Hanen, an anti-immigrant judge in Texas who has ruled against DACA before, just scheduled a hearing for June 1st — **meaning a decision could be coming soon in the case that could determine DACA’s fate.** Regardless of the outcome of this case, it’s never been more clear that DACA recipients and all undocumented people need more than just temporary protections. **We’re ramping up our fight for permanent protections before it’s too late. Judge Andrew Hanen is no stranger to the DACA program, Peter.
In 2021, he ruled against DACA which shut down the program for new applicants. 2 years later, the program _still_ isn’t accepting new applications because of his order. The good news is that current DACA recipients are still protected and will be able to continue renewing for now.
**But with everyone from federal judges to far-right governors on a mission to shut down the program for good, we don’t know how much longer that will be true.**
This shows just how important our fight for permanent protections is. DACA was not and will never be more than a temporary solution. We were here long before DACA, and we are here to stay no matter what happens.
In the weeks and months ahead, we’ll continue to put pressure on members of Congress and the Biden administration who promised to protect our communities. Anything less could have devastating consequences for undocumented communities.
**Before it’s too late, will you add a donation to fuel our fight for permanent protections? DACA recipients and all undocumented people are counting on your support.**
