clean_body: I wanted to make sure you saw this DACA update: | | | Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this update: Judge Hanen, an anti-immigrant judge in Texas who has ruled against DACA before, just scheduled a hearing for June 1st — meaning a decision could be coming soon in the case that could determine DACA’s fate. Regardless of the outcome of this case, it’s never been more clear that DACA recipients and all undocumented people need more than just temporary protections. We’re ramping up our fight for permanent protections before it’s too late. Chip in $7 or any amount to join our fight to secure protections for DACA recipients and immigrant communities. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Judge Andrew Hanen is no stranger to the DACA program, Peter. In 2021, he ruled against DACA which shut down the program for new applicants. 2 years later, the program still isn’t accepting new applications because of his order. The good news is that current DACA recipients are still protected and will be able to continue renewing for now. But with everyone from federal judges to far-right governors on a mission to shut down the program for good, we don’t know how much longer that will be true. This shows just how important our fight for permanent protections is. DACA was not and will never be more than a temporary solution. We were here long before DACA, and we are here to stay no matter what happens. In the weeks and months ahead, we’ll continue to put pressure on members of Congress and the Biden administration who promised to protect our communities. Anything less could have devastating consequences for undocumented communities. Before it’s too late, will you add a donation to fuel our fight for permanent protections? DACA recipients and all undocumented people are counting on your support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being an ally in this fight, Juliana, United We Dream Action

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Don’t let “The Freedom Caucus” kill the debt deal and destroy Social Security!
body:
Protect Social Security in the debt deal fight
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1fa1d121-1032-4af3-9789-3743afb9c64c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Joe Biden and driver of the GOP clown car, Kevin McCarthy, have reached a debt ceiling deal. The end result is after all the GOP lies and drama, they maybe got 5% of what they wanted. ** _Yet, a Republican sub-group of soulless goons, "The Freedom Caucus," have enough votes to kill the deal._ _The Freedom Caucus is a collection of angry little white (mostly) guys knee-deep in the attempted January 6th coup._ Economist Paul Krugman's take: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71af1c38-fe83-495c-8242-cd2bebc1aa58/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_As we shared previously, Social Security is the FIRST thing cut if the deal falls through. Yet, as we also told you, we've never seen a group fight GOP attempts to screw us with the success of Social Security Works (SSW)._** **_Even in overwhelmingly GOP districts, voters are scared of losing Social Security, and SSW will fight to ensure every voter in those districts knows their Freedom Caucus Rep is responsible if they dare vote down this deal._** [**_So, we MUST rush Social Security Works resources--even over a holiday weekend--to fight Freedom-Caucus lunacy. Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so they can protect our Social Security?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6bae0a56-6ece-4f22-8b77-6e9924653184/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for honoring all who came before us this Memorial Day weekend by fighting for the freedoms and dignity they protected._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5142d08b-df2b-4996-b1c6-a6095cfb40ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/socialsecurityandthedebtceilingdeal-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te565a035-0bc3-4baa-bbe4-c976f85376a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Urgent Redistricting Update
subject: POLITICO: Republicans planning on “ambitious gerrymandering” ahead of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
it’s central to their strategy to winning the House
|
---

Team, Republicans have a cynical strategy to expand their House majority in 2024 – one that doesn’t involve getting more votes. **_POLITICO:_
"Republicans are readying to plow ahead with ambitious gerrymandering despite previous reprimands from state courts – now that they’ve elected judges who are less likely to thwart their plans."

[_Help defeat GOP gerrymandering: Donate to the NDRC >>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63951765/408541248/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230528_FR_5EE_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlZjUwNmNkLTcyZmQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DPgVex0LwqfmOlTRjzDM38BL3dhtjqlKRhkciecJL9U=)** For years, Republicans stacked courts with judges they believed would help advance their anti-democratic agenda. **Now, they’re hoping the courts will grant them a green light for extreme gerrymandering ahead of 2024.**
* In North Carolina, Republicans asked the state’s highest court to **roll back fair maps and the conservative-majority decided in their favor.**
* In states like Ohio, Republicans are fighting to **defeat challenges to rigged maps.**

[**_Help support fair maps nationwide: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63951766/408541249/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230528_FR_5EE_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlZjUwNmNkLTcyZmQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DPgVex0LwqfmOlTRjzDM38BL3dhtjqlKRhkciecJL9U=) Here’s the good news team: The NDRC has a proven track record of defeating these kinds of attacks on our democracy.

Last November, our strategy helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” If we continue fighting, we can ensure the maps are even fairer in 2024 and beyond – **_but if we grow complacent, the GOP could roll back our progress before the next election!_**

President Obama warned that **“Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.”** [**_Our work is powered by supporters like you. Will you donate today to help the NDRC continue fighting for a strong democracy?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63951767/408541250/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230528_FR_5EE_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlZjUwNmNkLTcyZmQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DPgVex0LwqfmOlTRjzDM38BL3dhtjqlKRhkciecJL9U=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: it’s central to their strategy to winning the House | Team, Republicans have a cynical strategy to expand their House majority in 2024 – one that doesn’t involve getting more votes. POLITICO: "Republicans are readying to plow ahead with ambitious gerrymandering despite previous reprimands from state courts – now that they’ve elected judges who are less likely to thwart their plans." = For years, Republicans stacked courts with judges they believed would help advance their anti-democratic agenda. Now, they’re hoping the courts will grant them a green light for extreme gerrymandering ahead of 2024. In North Carolina, Republicans asked the state’s highest court to roll back fair maps and the conservative-majority decided in their favor. In states like Ohio, Republicans are fighting to defeat challenges to rigged maps. = Here’s the good news team: The NDRC has a proven track record of defeating these kinds of attacks on our democracy. Last November, our strategy helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” If we continue fighting, we can ensure the maps are even fairer in 2024 and beyond – but if we grow complacent, the GOP could roll back our progress before the next election! President Obama warned that “Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.” = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. body:
Hey team – it’s Alex, Greg’s Finance Director. I wanted to take a second to make sure you saw Greg’s note from yesterday.
| Hey team – it’s Alex, Greg’s Finance Director. I wanted to take a second to make sure you saw Greg’s note from yesterday. This truly is a critical time for our campaign.

To keep this seat blue next November, we’re going to have to ramp up our campaign this summer. That means expanding our on-the-ground operation, bolstering our rapid response efforts to dishonest GOP attack ads, hiring additional campaign staff, and more.

**And since we don’t accept a dime of corporate PAC money, our ability to do all of this will stem from your grassroots support this month.[That’s why I have to ask: Is there any amount you can contribute to help our team reach our must-hit May fundraising goal? Even just $1 will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63951930/408542085/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.28_b1_ahvtl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U0Y2Q5Yi03NGZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Eiln1GUWZPow4ma72_bh8Yea3XDCRtvvhbrjiD6djc=)**

Hey there, it's Greg.

I hate to bother you over Memorial Day weekend, but I wanted to reach out personally to let you know why you may be receiving more emails than usual over the next few days.

**This Wednesday at midnight is our May end-of-month deadline, and according to my finance team, we’re still running about $6,500 behind our goal.**_I’ll explain more in a moment, but first:_

[**Since we don’t take corporate PAC money, this grassroots team is the heart and soul of our campaign operation. I know Election Day may seem far off, but the truth is, Washington Republicans have been working overtime this month to try to defeat us.

Just this month, the NRCC launched another misleading attack ad campaign against us, intended to deceive voters and lie about my record of delivering for our district. Plain and simple: if we don’t fight back, we’ll be giving the Republican the upper hand here in Southwest Ohio.

That’s why, over the next month, we have to ramp up our rapid response efforts, combat malicious misinformation, and broadcast our actual message – _the message of change that fueled our historic victory last November_ – throughout OH-01. _And it’s our May fundraising that will allow us to do just that._

[**Everything we do is powered by the support of folks like you. So please, is there any amount you contribute to our campaign before Wednesday at midnight? clean_body: Hey team – it’s Alex, Greg’s Finance Director. I wanted to take a second to make sure you saw Greg’s note from yesterday. | Hey team – it’s Alex, Greg’s Finance Director. I wanted to take a second to make sure you saw Greg’s note from yesterday. This truly is a critical time for our campaign. To keep this seat blue next November, we’re going to have to ramp up our campaign this summer. That means expanding our on-the-ground operation, bolstering our rapid response efforts to dishonest GOP attack ads, hiring additional campaign staff, and more. And since we don’t accept a dime of corporate PAC money, our ability to do all of this will stem from your grassroots support this month.= With gratitude, Alex On Sat May 27, 2023 Greg Landsman wrote: = Hey there, it's Greg. I hate to bother you over Memorial Day weekend, but I wanted to reach out personally to let you know why you may be receiving more emails than usual over the next few days. This Wednesday at midnight is our May end-of-month deadline, and according to my finance team, we’re still running about $6,500 behind our goal.I’ll explain more in a moment, but first: = | = I know Election Day may seem far off, but the truth is, Washington Republicans have been working overtime this month to try to defeat us. Just this month, the NRCC launched another misleading attack ad campaign against us, intended to deceive voters and lie about my record of delivering for our district. Plain and simple: if we don’t fight back, we’ll be giving the Republican the upper hand here in Southwest Ohio. That’s why, over the next month, we have to ramp up our rapid response efforts, combat malicious misinformation, and broadcast our actual message – the message of change that fueled our historic victory last November – throughout OH-01. And it’s our May fundraising that will allow us to do just that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Appreciate you, Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 68033, Cincinnati, OH 45206 www.landsmanforcongress.com = to receive fewer emails. = to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

**The future of Arizona and the country can come down to how well we can hold off DeSantis, Trump or the other far-right figures running in 2024.**

Anything you contribute toward our $10,000 goal will go right to work in holding this state for Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot. We'll use the resources to mobilize voters, expand outreach, and support the campaigns of our Arizona Democratic candidates.

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/36b6c0709807/n41kepo7ku-12605855?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=faedaa849c&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
|
* Legislative Update for Week Ending May 26, 2023
* Tax Relief...Finally!
* The Danger of LB 50 and Voter ID. A Call to Action!
* Opportunity Scholarships Pass!
* Legislative Video Passed!
* The Governor Exercises His Line Item Veto Power
* The Chief Medical Officer Appointment
* Free Flowing Hair is Back!
* Broadband Office Created
* Federal Spending

---
|
---
|
## Legislative Update for Week Ending May 26, 2023
---
| As the session is winding down, we have some very good and some bad legislation to report. However, the BIG things Nebraska Republicans care about continue to go in the conservative "right" direction. We believe there are less limelight bills that did not go in the right direction. These bills will create bigger problems in the future if Republicans take their eyes off the ball at the end of session.

Let’s dig in....
---
|
## Tax Relief...Finally!
---
| After years of campaign promises relating to “Nebraskans need tax relief!”... 2023 Republican Senators delivered property tax relief (via State absorption of local expenditures) and income tax relief on the same day! In total, $6 billion in tax relief for our citizens was sorely needed! The reductions in rates will return our state to being more competitive in the region for both labor and business! This was a signature legislative plan goal for the party we set out to achieve in August 2022. Both missions are on the right track!

We find there is confusion on the “Spending” levels being approved. Remember, the state is assuming a large chunk of schooling expenditures from the local government bodies. Much of the large spending increases at the state is the assumption of local education expenditures being paid via property tax. In turn, Nebraskans should be receiving significant tax relief through your local bodies in the form of property tax reductions (the expenses needed to be covered by your local government bodies will be much less). Spending increases should be viewed in total expenditures on education...not just total state expenditures.

The bigger complaint and concern is WILL YOUR LOCAL SCHOOL BOARDS vote to break the cap that was passed by the legislature? The party IS HIGHLY CONCERNED these boards will break these caps for unwarranted reasons. Nonetheless, if you have a fiscally minded and responsible school board...you should see relief as the local budgets will see SIGNIFICANT expense relief. Many of these measures will go into effect for the 2024 year.
---
|
---
|
## The Danger of LB 50 and Voter ID. A Call to Action!
---
| The Unicameral is literally exhausted from all the battles, long nights, and back and forth in working these bills. The most dangerous part of any session is the last two weeks as people try to slip in amendments or lazily pass a bad bill so they can go home and rest. Unfortunately, we need to stay alert to the finish line and stay diligent to prevent bad legislation from going through.

This appears to be the case with Voter ID and LB 50. Both are less than desirable bills. They should be tabled and brought back next year or in a special session after more examination and adjustments. Make the call to your Senators!

As of Thursday evening, discussions were still occurring on Photo Voter ID. Attorney General Hilgers was looking at Constitutional arguments that Senator Slama was presenting. We are still questioning the Constitutional compliance with the Nebraska amendment of what was discussed. Again, we believe this bill needs to be delayed. Republicans should NOT support this bill if it does not match the intent language of the initiative passed by 65.45% of Nebraskans in 2022. As of Thursday, the language did not match the intent.

Second, LB 50 was a bill we supported at the beginning of session BEFORE THE AMENDMENTS AND BEFORE SENATOR GEIST resigned. This bill deals with criminal justice. We need to be a party solid on law and order.

Most of social media is discussing the softening of parole terms. This is true. This is not good. In 2023, during the age of endless bills being amended, Senators got some good items on their wishlist added into the bill to gain their support. This is not a good way to achieve good legislation. Furthermore, this bill was taken over by Senator Wayne after Senator Geist resigned. Omaha Senators Wayne and McKinney both have expressed a desire to free up jail space since the very beginning of this session. They are on a mission with this goal in this bill. **We do not support an early release of violent offenders.**

The cops in favor of this really want a clause that allows GPS tracking of offenders (organized in a court settlement so as not to be a 4th amendment problem) to make sure a drug offender isn’t wandering back to the houses of supply to deal drugs. A provision for stab resistant vests was also a positive for the cops to provide them what they need. Both are good provisions.

Problem solving courts were also advocated for and have shown progress in solving issues before they become bigger problems for these individuals as well as the correctional system.

While some of these changes in LB 50 are very good, they are combined with a soft on crime parole provision. County Attorney’s were less than pleased with this bill. Senator Bosn expressed her concerns on the bill and she possesses the best Republican experience on the floor in prosecuting criminals in a courtroom. Senator Lowe also gave an alarming speech drawing attention to the problems being cited by trusted sources.

This party paid a heavy price to elect conservative county attorneys and sheriffs to preserve law and order. This was the desire of our body. We will not and should not ignore the advice of those we worked hard to elect; who still need our help. Furthermore, we want to give the resources to law enforcement (like GPS upon a conviction after due process and protective vests) to control crime...but we shouldn’t put criminals on the street early to achieve this.

When you talk to the Senators, there are good things in this bill, but the parole provisions more than stand out. It is a classic temptation to pass the bad to get the good. The main problem is the soft on crime approach with offenders is not something to compromise for.

Finally, we will not ignore the expression of our county parties who would like to support their tough on crime county attorneys they worked hard to elect. LB50 needs to be tabled for 2023. The good provisions of this bill should come back in a single subject bill in 2024. We encourage the Unicameral to address the rules in the offseason and end this dangerous game of combining multiple bills or make deals for a soft”er” on convicted criminal approach.
---
|
---
|
## Opportunity Scholarships Pass!
---
| For years, the opportunity for alternative schooling options and the financial vehicles to fund them have been sorely needed. Unfortunately for years, the leaders of the party could not overcome the school lobbies who desire absolute control over education, your children, and your tax dollars. This year is different. Republicans stepped up and passed opportunity scholarships to benefit the students in need. They overcame well funded school lobbies bent on total control of tax dollars and children. This was a landmark day to aid the future of Nebraska by giving students options if they are stuck in a struggling school. We support students and teachers and the best educational options for all. We believe this plan is just the start. Whether you refer to our legislative plan or Pillen’s educational pledge he ran on in his campaign, we must continue to push for additional school choice legislation to help students and increase the effectiveness of our education system in Nebraska. We have a lot of work to do to return our state to the percentile ranks of the past that gave our students the brightest future with more choices.

On an "unfinished business" note, the legislature did not advance the ability to use a person's educational accounts for elementary or secondary tuition. The education lobbies continue to focus their efforts against private education. We will continue to encourage our educational lobbies to focus on a “For” posture of improving results in public school and to stop emitting endless energy against alternative educational options. Give parents freedom and choice on who will educate the minds of their children and focus on the basics of reading, writing, and arithmetic. It is noted that choice includes the selection of public schools for most Nebraska parents.
---
|
---
|
## Legislative Video Passed!
---
| The Central Committee of the Republican Party approved a desire to have a video archive created of the Unicameral for reference. We are excited about this government reform bill rooted in the desire for transparency. Citizens will have a record of what Senators articulate on the mic beginning in 2025. It's a shame this documentation was not implemented this year as many Democratic Senators have given a wealth of sound bytes for years to come.
---
|
---
|
## The Governor Exercises His Line Item Veto Power
---
| The Governor exercised his veto pen this week after the passage of the budget last week. Medicaid reimbursement rates, child welfare rates, drinking well projects, nuclear site preparations, healthcare cash funds, and workforce housing projects all experienced the red line pen. Over $130 million in cuts were made. A full summary (unedited from the Governor’s office) of what was vetoed as well as his full statement on why cuts were made can be found here.

[https://governor.nebraska.gov/press/governor-pillen-signs-budget-announces-line-item-vetos](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=3793ab8e50&e=25844e23a8)

We are anticipating a push back on some of these vetoes on Wednesday from the legislature. Senators can individually motion an objection to the parts of the veto they disagree with. However, the appropriations committee met on Thursday and have already submitted a committee report that will challenge three of the line item vetoes. Provider rates, housing/housing transfers, and the State Auditor staffing and professional development “Overrides” were formally filed and will be heard next week. We will summarize the results of those “Override” attempts in next week’s letter. We do not have the counts on votes at this time.
---
|
---
|
## The Chief Medical Officer Appointment
---
| Dr. Timothy Tesmer was approved in committee by a 4-2 vote. Appointments often come and go without much fanfare. However, if you recall in the passage of LB 574, the Chief Medical Officer would be responsible for decisions regarding the use of puberty blockers/hormone therapies. Based on this language of LB 574, the committee room was packed with testifiers. Instead of discussing healthcare that 99%+ of Nebraskans use, the Democrats and testifiers continued to make this appointment all about LB 574 and the provisions in that bill. Despite their continued protesting efforts, Doctor Tesmer was confirmed to lead healthcare efforts across the state.
---
|
---
|
## Free Flowing Hair is Back!
---
| The legislature repealed the helmet law to ride your motorcycle. Get ready to see various hair styles blowing in the wind on your local road!
---
|
---
|
## Broadband Office Created
---
| Broadband officially became the responsibility of the Governor and will no longer be the responsibility of the Public Service Commission. He will have the appointment power of who will lead this infrastructure development effort after the approval of this office by the legislature. See past newsletters for the arguments for/against this office. Broadband infrastructure is a priority as passed by the Central Committee of the Republican party.
---
|
## Federal Spending
---
| In a change of tone in DC, the Republicans are now pushing for a smaller budget next year to agree to a debt ceiling limit increase. We are pleased to see the tough tone in these negotiations. DC spending IS out of control. However, we have seen this act of "concern" before. We hope our delegation and all Republicans around this country stand firm this time around. We can no longer spend at this level. The test of true conviction will be seen at the 11th hour when deals are struck. As we have discussed, the Democrats never compromise. It is time to see them (The Dems) compromise or the failure is on their watch. The country cannot sustain these debt and spending levels. This spending and endless printing of money is causing havoc in lending and inflation numbers.

One full week to go.

Until next week...
---
| Todd Watson
Political Director
NEGOP
---

This was a signature legislative plan goal for the party we set out to achieve in August 2022. Both missions are on the right track! We find there is confusion on the “Spending” levels being approved. Remember, the state is assuming a large chunk of schooling expenditures from the local government bodies. Much of the large spending increases at the state is the assumption of local education expenditures being paid via property tax. In turn, Nebraskans should be receiving significant tax relief through your local bodies in the form of property tax reductions (the expenses needed to be covered by your local government bodies will be much less). Spending increases should be viewed in total expenditures on education...not just total state expenditures. The bigger complaint and concern is WILL YOUR LOCAL SCHOOL BOARDS vote to break the cap that was passed by the legislature? The party IS HIGHLY CONCERNED these boards will break these caps for unwarranted reasons. Nonetheless, if you have a fiscally minded and responsible school board...you should see relief as the local budgets will see SIGNIFICANT expense relief. Many of these measures will go into effect for the 2024 year. | | The Danger of LB 50 and Voter ID. A Call to Action! | The Unicameral is literally exhausted from all the battles, long nights, and back and forth in working these bills. The most dangerous part of any session is the last two weeks as people try to slip in amendments or lazily pass a bad bill so they can go home and rest. Unfortunately, we need to stay alert to the finish line and stay diligent to prevent bad legislation from going through. This appears to be the case with Voter ID and LB 50. Both are less than desirable bills. They should be tabled and brought back next year or in a special session after more examination and adjustments. Make the call to your Senators! As of Thursday evening, discussions were still occurring on Photo Voter ID. Attorney General Hilgers was looking at Constitutional arguments that Senator Slama was presenting. We are still questioning the Constitutional compliance with the Nebraska amendment of what was discussed. Again, we believe this bill needs to be delayed. Republicans should NOT support this bill if it does not match the intent language of the initiative passed by 65.45% of Nebraskans in 2022. As of Thursday, the language did not match the intent. Second, LB 50 was a bill we supported at the beginning of session BEFORE THE AMENDMENTS AND BEFORE SENATOR GEIST resigned. This bill deals with criminal justice. We need to be a party solid on law and order. Most of social media is discussing the softening of parole terms. This is true. This is not good. In 2023, during the age of endless bills being amended, Senators got some good items on their wishlist added into the bill to gain their support. This is not a good way to achieve good legislation. Furthermore, this bill was taken over by Senator Wayne after Senator Geist resigned. Omaha Senators Wayne and McKinney both have expressed a desire to free up jail space since the very beginning of this session. They are on a mission with this goal in this bill. We do not support an early release of violent offenders. The cops in favor of this really want a clause that allows GPS tracking of offenders (organized in a court settlement so as not to be a 4th amendment problem) to make sure a drug offender isn’t wandering back to the houses of supply to deal drugs. A provision for stab resistant vests was also a positive for the cops to provide them what they need. Both are good provisions. Problem solving courts were also advocated for and have shown progress in solving issues before they become bigger problems for these individuals as well as the correctional system. While some of these changes in LB 50 are very good, they are combined with a soft on crime parole provision. County Attorney’s were less than pleased with this bill. Senator Bosn expressed her concerns on the bill and she possesses the best Republican experience on the floor in prosecuting criminals in a courtroom. Senator Lowe also gave an alarming speech drawing attention to the problems being cited by trusted sources. This party paid a heavy price to elect conservative county attorneys and sheriffs to preserve law and order. This was the desire of our body. We will not and should not ignore the advice of those we worked hard to elect; who still need our help. Furthermore, we want to give the resources to law enforcement (like GPS upon a conviction after due process and protective vests) to control crime...but we shouldn’t put criminals on the street early to achieve this. When you talk to the Senators, there are good things in this bill, but the parole provisions more than stand out. It is a classic temptation to pass the bad to get the good. The main problem is the soft on crime approach with offenders is not something to compromise for. Finally, we will not ignore the expression of our county parties who would like to support their tough on crime county attorneys they worked hard to elect. LB50 needs to be tabled for 2023. The good provisions of this bill should come back in a single subject bill in 2024. We encourage the Unicameral to address the rules in the offseason and end this dangerous game of combining multiple bills or make deals for a soft”er” on convicted criminal approach. | | Opportunity Scholarships Pass! | For years, the opportunity for alternative schooling options and the financial vehicles to fund them have been sorely needed. Unfortunately for years, the leaders of the party could not overcome the school lobbies who desire absolute control over education, your children, and your tax dollars. This year is different. Republicans stepped up and passed opportunity scholarships to benefit the students in need. They overcame well funded school lobbies bent on total control of tax dollars and children. This was a landmark day to aid the future of Nebraska by giving students options if they are stuck in a struggling school. We support students and teachers and the best educational options for all. We believe this plan is just the start. Whether you refer to our legislative plan or Pillen’s educational pledge he ran on in his campaign, we must continue to push for additional school choice legislation to help students and increase the effectiveness of our education system in Nebraska. We have a lot of work to do to return our state to the percentile ranks of the past that gave our students the brightest future with more choices. On an "unfinished business" note, the legislature did not advance the ability to use a person's educational accounts for elementary or secondary tuition. The education lobbies continue to focus their efforts against private education. We will continue to encourage our educational lobbies to focus on a “For” posture of improving results in public school and to stop emitting endless energy against alternative educational options. Give parents freedom and choice on who will educate the minds of their children and focus on the basics of reading, writing, and arithmetic. It is noted that choice includes the selection of public schools for most Nebraska parents. | | Legislative Video Passed! | The Central Committee of the Republican Party approved a desire to have a video archive created of the Unicameral for reference. We are excited about this government reform bill rooted in the desire for transparency. Citizens will have a record of what Senators articulate on the mic beginning in 2025. It's a shame this documentation was not implemented this year as many Democratic Senators have given a wealth of sound bytes for years to come. | | The Governor Exercises His Line Item Veto Power | The Governor exercised his veto pen this week after the passage of the budget last week. Medicaid reimbursement rates, child welfare rates, drinking well projects, nuclear site preparations, healthcare cash funds, and workforce housing projects all experienced the red line pen. Over $130 million in cuts were made. A full summary (unedited from the Governor’s office) of what was vetoed as well as his full statement on why cuts were made can be found here. We are anticipating a push back on some of these vetoes on Wednesday from the legislature. Senators can individually motion an objection to the parts of the veto they disagree with. However, the appropriations committee met on Thursday and have already submitted a committee report that will challenge three of the line item vetoes. Provider rates, housing/housing transfers, and the State Auditor staffing and professional development “Overrides” were formally filed and will be heard next week. We will summarize the results of those “Override” attempts in next week’s letter. We do not have the counts on votes at this time. | | The Chief Medical Officer Appointment | Dr. Timothy Tesmer was approved in committee by a 4-2 vote. Appointments often come and go without much fanfare. However, if you recall in the passage of LB 574, the Chief Medical Officer would be responsible for decisions regarding the use of puberty blockers/hormone therapies. Based on this language of LB 574, the committee room was packed with testifiers. Instead of discussing healthcare that 99%+ of Nebraskans use, the Democrats and testifiers continued to make this appointment all about LB 574 and the provisions in that bill. Despite their continued protesting efforts, Doctor Tesmer was confirmed to lead healthcare efforts across the state. | | Free Flowing Hair is Back! | The legislature repealed the helmet law to ride your motorcycle. Get ready to see various hair styles blowing in the wind on your local road! | | Broadband Office Created | Broadband officially became the responsibility of the Governor and will no longer be the responsibility of the Public Service Commission. He will have the appointment power of who will lead this infrastructure development effort after the approval of this office by the legislature. See past newsletters for the arguments for/against this office. Broadband infrastructure is a priority as passed by the Central Committee of the Republican party. | Federal Spending | In a change of tone in DC, the Republicans are now pushing for a smaller budget next year to agree to a debt ceiling limit increase. We are pleased to see the tough tone in these negotiations. DC spending IS out of control. However, we have seen this act of "concern" before. We hope our delegation and all Republicans around this country stand firm this time around. We can no longer spend at this level. The test of true conviction will be seen at the 11th hour when deals are struck. As we have discussed, the Democrats never compromise. It is time to see them (The Dems) compromise or the failure is on their watch. The country cannot sustain these debt and spending levels. This spending and endless printing of money is causing havoc in lending and inflation numbers. One full week to go. Until next week... | Todd Watson Political Director NEGOP | | | | | | | | | | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

I’d love to tell you that conservatives are gaining ground in these spaces. Alas, in most of them, conservatives continue to be present in small numbers — ignored if they’re lucky; marginalized, canceled or fired if they’re not. - Laura Hollis READ MORE ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zageiahtdp05uhijoiudbu9isjia73rpdmordufo_rp22sh2s8i66o75cpg6ao75cjh2bs)

No one is supposed to be too old for a job. Yet Dianne Feinstein obviously is too old for her job as a United States senator. Progressives are the first to admit it. -Daniel McCarthy READ MORE ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv70cmhms4rehbgburjch5d87bm23imk1gmtpj9o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cpg6ao75cjh2bs)

name: GA Dems
subject: A 7-2 GOP court majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
The future if Trump or DeSantis wins

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63952944/408545920/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmY4NjkxYS03OWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X56QoE8Jl4t9_CAh07rwx-iD_lQfLtL6f06oCgBapLU=&emci=cf73cf4d-f2fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=22f8691a-79fd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | The current right-wing majority on the Supreme Court has already overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , gutted environmental protections, destroyed the Voting Rights Act, and more, but MAGA GOP extremist Ron DeSantis wants to go even further!

_The New York Times_ reported that DeSantis is _**dreaming**_ of a 7-2 GOP Supreme Court majority, and that would be a disaster for America.

A 7-2 GOP-controlled Court could end marriage equality, further restrict abortion rights, greenlight GOP election interference, and more. A Court even more packed with MAGA extremists like Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito would be terrifying for our country.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: The New York Times targets Chloe Cole
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW-mnOJDTN

The New York Times decided to publish an article directly
attacking 18-year-old Chloe Cole for bravely telling her story
about de-transitioning and fighting to protect children from the
lies and coercion that leftist medical professionals are
peddling.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW-mnOJDTN

Fellow
Patriot,
The New
York Times decided to publish an article directly attacking
18-year-old Chloe Cole for bravely telling her story about
de-transitioning and fighting to protect children from the lies
and coercion that leftist medical professionals are peddling.
That's
right.
The New
York Times published a hit piece on an 18-year-old girl who was
lied to, coerced into surgically "transitioning" before she was
old enough to buy tickets to an R-rated movie.

Physicians at Kaiser Permanente put Chloe on puberty blockers and
testosterone when she was just 13 years old. Then they performed
a radical double mastectomy on her when she was just 15 years
old.
And we're
suing Kaiser as well as the individual doctors that did this to
her - but we won't win without patriots like you.

Will you
consider making a generous, tax-deductible gift to set a
precedent nationwide holding doctors responsible for
experimenting on vulnerable kids?

MAKE
THEM PAY

Chloe
dared to take on one of the most powerful and profitable
institutions in our country, knowing what a steep, uphill battle
was before her.
Instead
of offering a modicum of compassion-a scintilla of humanity-the
New York Times belittled and smeared this brave young woman
dismissing her experience as rare or "few."
But
Chloe's story is becoming less rare by the day as more and more
de-transitioners, inspired by her courage, are now speaking out
too.
I can't
tell you how many calls I get from de-transitioners like Chloe.
But
because of relatively short statutes of limitations across the
country, very few de-transitioners can file a lawsuit against the
doctors and hospitals who "treated" them as minors-a nuance
notably missing from the drivel published by the New York Times.
The New
York Times would like you to believe that our clients Chloe Cole
and Layla Jane are just two isolated incidents.
But this
is pure gaslighting by the New York Times because whether it is
one child or one thousand, no child deserves to have their body
permanently mutilated by medical professionals they should have
been able to trust.
That's
why we're suing Kaiser - and why we have to win.

…Because we believe in the dignity of every person,
including those despised by the radical leftists in legacy media.

…And because we have the opportunity to put a stop to the
performance of these barbaric medical procedures on children
today.
We need
to set an example and show doctors and hospitals in every state
that there are consequences for misleading minors and their
families.
But as
one of the largest providers in the country, Kaiser has millions
of dollars to throw at this lawsuit, and we know this victory
won't be easily won.

Will you
consider making a generous, tax-deductible gift to set a
precedent nationwide holding doctors responsible for
experimenting on vulnerable kids?

MAKE
THEM PAY

My name
is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty
to protect our constitutional rights and to fight for people just
like Chloe Cole and Layla Jane.
You may
think we don't stand a chance against a big corporation like
Kaiser, with more money on hand than we've raised in the history
of our organization, but you couldn't be more wrong.
We've
taken on case after case that no one thought we could win, and we
did.
In fact,
in the last two years we've won THREE cases at the United States
Supreme Court against California Governor Gavin Newsom.
I know we
can declare another crucial victory in Chloe Cole's case too, but
we don't stand a chance without you.
Every
dollar helps!
We don't
get a dime from the federal government, and we take on some of
the most powerful and connected entities in the country.
We depend
on a grassroots movement of patriots giving what they can when
they can, and rest assured every dollar makes a difference.

Which is
why I'm asking you to join the fight with a donation of $25, $50,
or more right now.

MAKE
THEM PAY

We can't
change what happened to Chloe, but we can make sure it never
happens to another child again.
And with
your help, we can make that victory a reality.

Sincerely,

Harmeet
K. Dhillon
Founder &
CEO

P.S. The
New York Times published a hit piece aimed directly at Chloe Cole
because she's been brave enough to speak out and fight back. We
cannot allow the radical Left and its allies in legacy media to
silence women like Chloe and Layla Jane who are trying to sound
the alarm about the dangers of "gender-affirming care" for
minors. That's why our lawsuits against Kaiser Permanente and the
doctors who coerced Chloe and Layla are so important. Please
consider joining the fight with a generous, tax-deductible gift
of $25 or more today.

DONATE

The
Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable
organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech
and anti-civil liberties trends.

© The
Center for American Liberty | www.libertycenter.org

PO Box
2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Al Franken
subject: a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46219?t=6&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4) Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46219?t=7&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46219?t=8&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46220?t=9&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46221?t=10&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46222?t=11&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46223?t=12&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46219?t=13&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4)
This is important to me. And to our nation.

Thanks,

Al

**P.S.** I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! [**DONATE HERE.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46219?t=14&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7975%2E878179%2EwwMWa4)

Friend, with alleged ethics violations by justices Neil Gorsuch and Clarence Thomas, and decisions that undermine fundamental human rights, trust in the Court is at an ALL-TIME LOW.

name: Weston D. Imer
subject: Join me for a nationwide call to discuss the RNC Youth Advisory Council!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved By Weston Imer and was not approved by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
You are invited to attend a nationwide call with Weston Imer, Member of the Youth Advisory Council to the Republican National Committee...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010HnCgmOm1L8wqlPpa0Djq4Ght_1kO0WM4HxpRRUZZ0NocV1k_4hLcbHPd4jLBYWNzNA4jp8e--iycRPkzkn6Nh7A4rrpbQrSSNx2P8qqcSe3ln1eju8Edj-KHtuRXvqFRtFVGNjMLCo=&c=Fa-i2L26v-auA8_pbl3Z77JRgaX8bXHRQ9cUDAyyRPJP2OC7UkWo4Q==&ch=CTYeGxtH3ZneZ4oOcrOn190qFouWPKBrWCc54_74AhhADwKZusbwvg==)
---
| |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I was recently appointed to the Republican National Committee's Youth Advisory Council, Co-Chaired by Congressman Mike Lawler of NY and Congresswoman Kat Cammack of FL. I am proud to represent Colorado and Generation Z on the national stage in an effort to win the youth vote in 2024.
The Youth Advisory Council is scheduled to meet in Washington, DC this Tuesday and I want to hear from you.
While I have many ideas and strategies in mind to help the GOP win the youth vote going forward I want to hear from you, the grassroots of our great nation, in order to provide the best advice and feedback to the Republican National Committee.
I will be hosting a nationwide Zoom call tomorrow night, Monday, May 29th at 8 pm EST to discuss your ideas on how to win the youth vote for the GOP.
If you are unable to attend the Zoom call please feel free to reply to this email with your feedback that you would like shared with the RNC and I will be happy to pass it along.
I encourage you to share this meeting invitation with any young Republicans you know so we can gather as much feedback as possible before the council's Tuesday meeting in Washington,DC!
You can register for the call by clicking the button below.
---
| | | [Register for the call!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010HnCgmOm1L8wqlPpa0Djq4Ght_1kO0WM4HxpRRUZZ0NocV1k_4hLcd7E8ACTdLqENxqe1zkvy1OVAgNF5q5V0N0CVxBKPNyvIyDHy-AR47Ygd1QGIEplNvQFUA6FNVZ6jXC9SNYrdO1Sdbh4SKdnBy9nPYM4rrp8Y3uGp7vsAs0Tms6vlZb7a1KQWcNsKeEKTrPAOSDlg4YxbIOjmLXN9g==&c=Fa-i2L26v-auA8_pbl3Z77JRgaX8bXHRQ9cUDAyyRPJP2OC7UkWo4Q==&ch=CTYeGxtH3ZneZ4oOcrOn190qFouWPKBrWCc54_74AhhADwKZusbwvg==)
---
| I am looking forward to meeting with you and hearing your thoughts on how to take back our country in 2024!
In service,

subject: Dr. Fauci's award! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please, sign our card celebrating this achievement:
| | | **BREAKING: Dr. Anthony Fauci receives _"Public Health’s Highest Honor"!_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14059?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230528-SignTheCard-FauciPublicHealthHonor-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230528-SignTheCard-FauciPublicHealthHonor-Pros-sl1&akid=10895%2E9716520%2E7RNZgb)
| | [SIGN THE CARD](https://go.dscc.org/go/14059?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230528-SignTheCard-FauciPublicHealthHonor-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230528-SignTheCard-FauciPublicHealthHonor-Pros-sl1&akid=10895%2E9716520%2E7RNZgb)
---

Team, after more than **_50 YEARS_** of service to our nation, Dr. Anthony Fauci just received the most prestigious honor in public health!

Throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, Dr. Fauci's hard work combated misinformation and brought hope to millions of families. **We can't think of a more deserving recipient of this award.**

That’s why we're organizing a MASSIVE card to congratulate Dr. Fauci on this honor. But we need 44 more Democrats from Pennsylvania to sign on if we're going to hit our 50,000 signature goal -- and right now, your signature is missing!

**From:[ dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/14059?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230528-SignTheCard-FauciPublicHealthHonor-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230528-SignTheCard-FauciPublicHealthHonor-Pros-sl1&akid=10895%2E9716520%2E7RNZgb)**
---
**To:_Dr. Anthony Fauci_**
**Signature: _Not Received_**

**Our card will close to new signatures at midnight, so please, before it's too late:**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=825481cb709b46008b2a9f40f2103650&_e=B4gUdT1xyhCejuD5vDPhiU9r01zfuMsDO7Wr2ujM_LBe_lr0Y5KyVQHwYb2JkTP7UVm7eIfX_y1wuro6ZDQf182cEyFKom-1Vk_seMILOcfg17mN1XUJU99GGCfO-bJIfZMPlAGTouiaKJwtDQe1Ah0RNuIJvSxC1yJrzeuBpyG928pomw6BKOK_FX-UlKeDbu8Kr_sxkVKDyPuvhJ2tLnqEDQgHwxKmpf_w4DalqpssAJ4MuzWEtw_zofh24-haLPfg-fKzvDFHrtX_CUByntBwyB8p09Lzht8yLtWTjXlwqM_AaocKO91huYAXoF2cxOe3BIBQXRS85q1qhOcOrwOXCg8zFATnWeNcoIjgVH0sxZ9wEsBeUQlGCwMgwGjGX6owInGZj3ZkhHV9X5ndYg%3D%3D)

---

| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=825481cb709b46008b2a9f40f2103650&_e=B4gUdT1xyhCejuD5vDPhicbgU0kIV0Tam40FTriI8eQD42fc1TGxzN7kHPVd_CZpZ0cQWPNtTZd6RmhVNJTIIZ_q2zXqW29GT6bsd-jGDjUDBQxLZlRsHGtaD3wKUcqpnYZ585RHJhWt-Sl7SIf5lpB44k8APK6ZKJP7znLsXYelY8aGTHFLesFWg5fVE69cKCq6b9FzMCn6X9ADOmOfu9caeSmFWBRt0rsnjirUDRs%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=825481cb709b46008b2a9f40f2103650&_e=B4gUdT1xyhCejuD5vDPhif00U4ni9wqmU1uocmtgbmVCAa2SkPkCsNCqDBf9AXBH1v67HeEZO56Q7kDGNwK10a-Mmkv1Gzz98dJZBgYauyFhsNbhYikcI4gPmYSWn8fZJls9DhNgu9-5nVtDtfhTqU_6FPMlf6q10CwogiUtUmYkJNxYaCvvqhZ-92BLRJad29f_bZDQy_H13wOcV_dp_g%3D%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=825481cb709b46008b2a9f40f2103650&_e=B4gUdT1xyhCejuD5vDPhiUtnIOPTI--1yerH5BAl2awR4XvQhRK9zkGThcvM4FBkPa60E70sn5eUy5uDJ8w_st2oYdR5qo98KZjjtVApS4YhFZU1VqmlhCjl6KedoL_ZONGsM2LSkw781Qu-bRUT4vcxpzOWGsPPuKOvFpLkv6gFUMUxCimsegu2JE_0WUzp9qPYBFlvIESzORIvo32JW7Er_A3_r0N4SG-erWd5Jdo%3D)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: 4 things you should do now that you’re on Team DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c1262decaa219b61c7036705a04037d0a21b48e425fa51d5edcf360c1abb2ce2cd5caeb725bbe1857084741ab6b9d59cfdf1813704b231aa729f6d7942f1bdf1e786a5f603168b70e9231c6a458677f5

Peter,

First things first: Thank you for joining Team DeSantis!

Now that you’ve joined the team, here are four quick things you can do next:
1. Sign up for text message alerts: Yes, you’re on our email list – but for the most urgent updates we’ll be sending out rapid response text messages. You can opt-in
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=23dbb1dad94aacafdb8845ca9241080e6d58a108c6ecb2f53d291ccb47eecf4a82b29c8f7034fb310e303d8ceb609e3816240b43c07d365c
HERE or text FREEDOM to 512345 to opt-in.

2. Follow us on social media. Yes, we just asked you to opt-in to receive texts AND you’re on our email list — but for live on-the-ground live updates, join us on social media. Check out our campaign on
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=23dbb1dad94aacaf3a902980e420e61f720fc145480e1290dd5f12915d7b9b1c65bdba136110db2561d9d61cab9ae5e41a4db3eaaa553227
Facebook ,
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=23dbb1dad94aacaf95d5aecc783ef3ab805cd9e2dc6eb11883e3f367c67d60e0ec87207ffd1f1ca1c2bab0eb11ce96a1868a1745f7f3451e
Twitter ,
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=23dbb1dad94aacafe5013d11c2ac125199ddb0e2fa3af157048f8e6dd0626c15d1d97733ca41a9a20c81a9935130e7912d85db7e2c3f344a
Instagram , and
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=896eea1dde4c2a59c84d20304453efde711f1e7fb5d72b708f01eac18aa649ed1542b61f6ba3954fe22084b55329b14e74574d7b33074439
Rumble.

3. Go shopping at our merch store. We don’t believe in slapping our logo on a white t-shirt and calling it a day. We make merch that you want to wear and use.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=896eea1dde4c2a5993514846671831e89237feca53b62e748064f57c789d842098912b000245410181507434f5d5e30e8a2d2e1c31f09769
Check out our latest items in the store today —we guarantee it's worth a look.

4. Spread the word. You are the best advocate we have to persuade your friends and family to support our campaign. Go out and TELL your friends and family why you’re joining Team DeSantis. And if you have a moment,
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=896eea1dde4c2a5914e3f80e0a783f3a948f33d796848f59d4ab37e6503b80942ac1ff910710d4bcd902fbfdbe83a37bf97c3e6496ce8b96
tell us what motivated you to join the team here .
We’re grateful to have you in the movement. We’ll be in touch!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, First things first: Thank you for joining Team DeSantis! Now that you’ve joined the team, here are four quick things you can do next: 1. Sign up for text message alerts: Yes, you’re on our email list – but for the most urgent updates we’ll be sending out rapid response text messages. You can opt-in HERE or text FREEDOM to 512345 to opt-in. 2. Follow us on social media. Yes, we just asked you to opt-in to receive texts AND you’re on our email list — but for live on-the-ground live updates, join us on social media. Check out our campaign on Facebook , Twitter , Instagram , and Rumble. 3. Go shopping at our merch store. We don’t believe in slapping our logo on a white t-shirt and calling it a day. We make merch that you want to wear and use. Check out our latest items in the store today —we guarantee it's worth a look. 4. Spread the word. You are the best advocate we have to persuade your friends and family to support our campaign. Go out and TELL your friends and family why you’re joining Team DeSantis. And if you have a moment, tell us what motivated you to join the team here . We’re grateful to have you in the movement. We’ll be in touch! In Freedom, Team DeSantis Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: What your support means to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| None of this would be possible without you.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=341%2E35263%2EsR-Tjn)
Peter — I know you’ve heard from us a lot lately, so before**[I ask you to make another contribution toward our upcoming end-of-month deadline](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230528_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=341%2E35263%2EsR-Tjn)**, I wanted to explain what your donation really means to our team: When you chip in towards our campaign, you are signaling to Mitch McConnell and his allies that folks want leaders that will fight for their values, not against them. You are telling them this team is not willing to let Wisconsin and our Senate Majority go without a fight. When you make a donation (whether it’s $5, $10, or anything you can) you’re helping us send a message to far-right millionaires and dark money groups — proving to them that all we really need is a group of dedicated folks who are willing to fight for real change. When you chip in whatever you can afford, you are helping us build the groundwork for the uphill battle that will be next year’s election. Donations from emails like these will keep this campaign afloat through all the attacks and hardships we might face. **[So, Peter, if you’re with me, I would really appreciate it if I could count on you to chip in any amount towards our end-of-month deadline coming up in a few days. Thanks in advance for your support. Friend,
I would love nothing more than to see our Party _**UNITE**_ behind the ONE and ONLY campaign that is LEADING by 40-50 POINTS – _us._
Think about how much stronger the Republican Party would be...
...Instead of a drawn-out primary that lasts through the SUMMER of 2024, we could use all of our many, many resources to go after Joe Biden starting _RIGHT NOW._
**_We’d truly be unstoppable._**
But sadly, RINOs have vowed to spend $200,000,000 – yes, $200 MILLION – to try and eliminate our campaign.
If there’s one thing I’ve learned in Washington, it’s that RINOs hate America First conservatives MORE than they hate the Communist Democrats. _Very sad to see!_
Despite all of the attacks, we will emerge victorious and prove that ABSOLUTELY NOTHING can stop our America First movement.
And our upcoming May end-of-month fundraising deadline is our chance to prove it.

clean_body: Let’s wrap up the primary as quickly as possible. | | | Friend, I would love nothing more than to see our Party UNITE behind the ONE and ONLY campaign that is LEADING by 40-50 POINTS – us. Think about how much stronger the Republican Party would be... ...Instead of a drawn-out primary that lasts through the SUMMER of 2024, we could use all of our many, many resources to go after Joe Biden starting RIGHT NOW. We’d truly be unstoppable. But sadly, RINOs have vowed to spend $200,000,000 – yes, $200 MILLION – to try and eliminate our campaign. If there’s one thing I’ve learned in Washington, it’s that RINOs hate America First conservatives MORE than they hate the Communist Democrats. Very sad to see! Despite all of the attacks, we will emerge victorious and prove that ABSOLUTELY NOTHING can stop our America First movement. And our upcoming May end-of-month fundraising deadline is our chance to prove it. Thank you, | Donald J. clean_body: We have to defend and act now!| | | My friend, the Democrats know that any path for them to take back the U.S. House from Republican control has to go through Minnesota. In the first quarter of 2023, the Democrats have stockpiled a war chest of funds totaling nearly $38 MILLION to target Republican districts across America. They want to reclaim the House, but to do that they MUST win seats like MN-01. It's our job to make sure they fail! | | | | | We MUST show Democrats we will not stand for their liberal ideology in Minnesota. They can build their war chest with funds from wealthy out of state left-wing donors, but – with your help – we can push back and show them we are NOT scared of their liberal rhetoric. The Democrat's path to take back the House must lead through Minnesota, but we can stop them by defending seats like MN-01. I've seen first-hand how successful Republicans can be when we unite and fight, Thank you, Brad Finstad | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

Days before his 100th birthday, Wilburn Rowden was honored by the staff at Harry S. Truman VA with a party. As he entered the auditorium, more than 70 employees gave Rowden a standing ovation, cheering as he made his way to the front of the room.

subject: Only 9% will open this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Emails like this one are what power my campaign here in New Hampshire.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956158/408556933/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk2284-fr-in&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGI3YmYyZS04MmZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwinXDYYtBlKI_DKrxrGfTdaX4Y50ixjfATdbvUOGyw=)
---
Hello,

If you’re reading this, it means that you’re in the roughly 9% of people who will open this email.

body:
I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but I need your help.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956372/408557890/373057073?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.28_b1_njcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGU1YTI0Mi04M2ZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDzS4eD1uiUFc5Qjvq9wVw04FonoQjxxFMY6Om7k3Qg=)
---
Hi there, it’s Natalie here! I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but I need your help. As Andrea’s campaign manager, it’s my job to keep a close eye on our online fundraising and ensure we’re on track to hit our goals. I just refreshed our numbers to see where we stand on our **[$8,000 end-of-month grassroots fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956373/408557891/373057073?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.28_b1_njcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGU1YTI0Mi04M2ZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDzS4eD1uiUFc5Qjvq9wVw04FonoQjxxFMY6Om7k3Qg=) I’ll be honest, we’re behind, and we’re at risk of falling short of our goal.** This is not the news I wanted to share with you all. Not when election experts are calling our race one of the most competitive in the country, **and not when the GOP is spending buckets of cash to run attack ads in Oregon.** **The bottom line is: We can’t afford to fall behind._Especially not this early in the race._** **[So I’m asking – will you please chip in $6, or whatever you can spare, to help us get our online fundraising back on track? disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Chip in to our team to help chip away at the GOP machine.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956410/408558014/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.28_b1_cdfc_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQ3YTNhNC04M2ZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYMmxOvO1Lb3ZGKTRBJrw0M7DtpETI92ylma4Ez65fo=) Hi Derek,

We know you’ve heard from us a lot lately about the importance of reaching our monthly fundraising goals and protecting Chris’s seat. But the truth is that defending PA-17 is just one part of the plan to defeat the radical right and ensure Kevin McCarthy loses the Speaker’s gavel in 2024.

**And why is it so critical that Democrats take back the Majority next year? Well, just in the past 5 months, Kevin McCarthy and Republicans in the House have:**
* Passed legislation that attacks a woman’s right to choose,
* Plotted on how to cut Social Security and Medicare,
* Put veterans benefits on the chopping block,
* Prioritized the needs of the ultra-wealthy and big corporations over the needs of average Americans,
* Threatened to throw the American economy into default, which would put millions of folks out of jobs,
* And so much more, **all in the name of their extreme MAGA agenda.**

**_It couldn’t be more clear that Kevin McCarthy and his chaos caucus aren’t fit to lead._ It’s time to instill real leadership in the People’s House, and that starts with our efforts in western PA.**

**[Derek, when you chip in to help us re-elect Chris, you’re helping chip away at the GOP machine. Can you donate today to help us close our May fundraising gap and ensure our team is in fighting shape?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956411/408558015/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.28_b1_cdfc_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQ3YTNhNC04M2ZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYMmxOvO1Lb3ZGKTRBJrw0M7DtpETI92ylma4Ez65fo=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Chip in to our team to help chip away at the GOP machine. | = Hi Derek, We know you’ve heard from us a lot lately about the importance of reaching our monthly fundraising goals and protecting Chris’s seat. But the truth is that defending PA-17 is just one part of the plan to defeat the radical right and ensure Kevin McCarthy loses the Speaker’s gavel in 2024. And why is it so critical that Democrats take back the Majority next year? Well, just in the past 5 months, Kevin McCarthy and Republicans in the House have: Passed legislation that attacks a woman’s right to choose, Plotted on how to cut Social Security and Medicare, Put veterans benefits on the chopping block, Prioritized the needs of the ultra-wealthy and big corporations over the needs of average Americans, Threatened to throw the American economy into default, which would put millions of folks out of jobs, And so much more, all in the name of their extreme MAGA agenda. It couldn’t be more clear that Kevin McCarthy and his chaos caucus aren’t fit to lead. It’s time to instill real leadership in the People’s House, and that starts with our efforts in western PA. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress.
