name: Ruwa Romman
subject: Folks like me haven’t historically had a seat at the table in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
A core tenant of Islam is justice, and that’s what inspires me to continue caring for my neighbors and protecting the marginalized. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956556/408558531/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjYwOGI0MS04NWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-OE_tfty_D04jftzi7Bm1JTYv1pHqja-CWe1t9St0=&emci=78941aa3-42fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb608b41-85fd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Hi there, I'm Ruwa! I’m the first Muslim woman elected to the Georgia State House of Representatives, and the first Palestinian-American elected to any office in Georgia. **It’s not lost on me that folks like me haven’t historically had a seat at the table in this state.** I wholeheartedly believe that diversity in government isn’t just a box to check — it leads to better laws, more inclusive leadership, and more welcoming policies for all Georgians. In honor of AAPI Heritage Month, I want to talk to you about why Fair Fight’s mission of protecting the freedom to vote and electing diverse pro-democracy champions is so important to our community here in Georgia. When you think of Fair Fight, their work to stop Republican voter suppression is probably what comes to mind first. But their efforts go far beyond that. In the last election cycle, Fair Fight endorsed a slate of pro-voter candidates like me: including 9 AAPI candidates, 20 first-time candidates, 47 women, and 56 people of color. And it doesn’t stop there — they persuaded voters to support us, donated to our campaigns, amplified our campaigns through ads and social media, strategized to increase voter engagement, and offered training sessions on messaging, voter contact, and grassroots organizing. They’ve helped make running for office less intimidating and more accessible so that a first-time Palestinian-American candidate like me could make history. **It may seem like the last election cycle just ended, but the truth is, Fair Fight is preparing for the 2024 election now. And they need the full strength of this movement alongside us. **[_**Will you sign your name to say you support Fair Fight’s efforts to elect diverse pro-voter candidates?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956557/408558532/239790855?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjYwOGI0MS04NWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-OE_tfty_D04jftzi7Bm1JTYv1pHqja-CWe1t9St0=&emci=78941aa3-42fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb608b41-85fd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956558/408558533/239790855?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjYwOGI0MS04NWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-OE_tfty_D04jftzi7Bm1JTYv1pHqja-CWe1t9St0=&emci=78941aa3-42fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb608b41-85fd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
---
People constantly ask me what role my faith plays in my life and how it influences me, especially as the first Muslim woman in the Georgia State House. A core tenant of Islam is justice, and that’s what inspires me to continue caring for my neighbors and protecting the marginalized.
I’ve felt the impact of the lack of Muslim and Palestinian visibility from a young age, like when my classmates would call my family’s home a “bomb lab” as the bus dropped me off after school, when a teacher pulled me out of class to ask if my family had ties to militant groups, and the countless times I’ve been “randomly selected” by TSA. Even as I ran for office last year, my opponent used anti-Muslim lies to disparage my record and claim that I had ties to terrorism. It was the same type of bullying I experienced as a young girl, but this time, I wasn’t alone — so many people in my district reached out to me and said “This is unacceptable. How can we help? How can we support you?” There are so many times I could have let the discouragement wear me down, but I’m so grateful that I stayed in the fight.
Everything I’ve done has felt like uncharted territory for somebody like me, but Fair Fight helped me blaze my own trail — and I know they’ll continue to help other candidates do the same.
**[Please sign your name to support Fair Fight’s mission of electing diverse, pro-democracy candidates.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956559/408558534/239790855?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjYwOGI0MS04NWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-OE_tfty_D04jftzi7Bm1JTYv1pHqja-CWe1t9St0=&emci=78941aa3-42fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb608b41-85fd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)**
[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956560/408558535/239790855?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjYwOGI0MS04NWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-OE_tfty_D04jftzi7Bm1JTYv1pHqja-CWe1t9St0=&emci=78941aa3-42fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb608b41-85fd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

Together,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956561/408558536/241254?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230528_e_ruwaromman_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjYwOGI0MS04NWZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-OE_tfty_D04jftzi7Bm1JTYv1pHqja-CWe1t9St0=&emci=78941aa3-42fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb608b41-85fd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
Ruwa Romman

clean_body: A core tenant of Islam is justice, and that’s what inspires me to continue caring for my neighbors and protecting the marginalized. | | | Hi there, I'm Ruwa! I’m the first Muslim woman elected to the Georgia State House of Representatives, and the first Palestinian-American elected to any office in Georgia. It’s not lost on me that folks like me haven’t historically had a seat at the table in this state. I wholeheartedly believe that diversity in government isn’t just a box to check — it leads to better laws, more inclusive leadership, and more welcoming policies for all Georgians. In honor of AAPI Heritage Month, I want to talk to you about why Fair Fight’s mission of protecting the freedom to vote and electing diverse pro-democracy champions is so important to our community here in Georgia. When you think of Fair Fight, their work to stop Republican voter suppression is probably what comes to mind first. But their efforts go far beyond that. In the last election cycle, Fair Fight endorsed a slate of pro-voter candidates like me: including 9 AAPI candidates, 20 first-time candidates, 47 women, and 56 people of color. And it doesn’t stop there — they persuaded voters to support us, donated to our campaigns, amplified our campaigns through ads and social media, strategized to increase voter engagement, and offered training sessions on messaging, voter contact, and grassroots organizing. They’ve helped make running for office less intimidating and more accessible so that a first-time Palestinian-American candidate like me could make history. It may seem like the last election cycle just ended, but the truth is, Fair Fight is preparing for the 2024 election now. And they need the full strength of this movement alongside us. | People constantly ask me what role my faith plays in my life and how it influences me, especially as the first Muslim woman in the Georgia State House. A core tenant of Islam is justice, and that’s what inspires me to continue caring for my neighbors and protecting the marginalized. I’ve felt the impact of the lack of Muslim and Palestinian visibility from a young age, like when my classmates would call my family’s home a “bomb lab” as the bus dropped me off after school, when a teacher pulled me out of class to ask if my family had ties to militant groups, and the countless times I’ve been “randomly selected” by TSA. Even as I ran for office last year, my opponent used anti-Muslim lies to disparage my record and claim that I had ties to terrorism. It was the same type of bullying I experienced as a young girl, but this time, I wasn’t alone — so many people in my district reached out to me and said “This is unacceptable. How can we help? How can we support you?” There are so many times I could have let the discouragement wear me down, but I’m so grateful that I stayed in the fight. Everything I’ve done has felt like uncharted territory for somebody like me, but Fair Fight helped me blaze my own trail — and I know they’ll continue to help other candidates do the same. Together, Ruwa Romman Georgia State Representative, District 97 | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: The Untold Story: A Mother's Defiance and the Birth of a Pro-Life Icon

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956666/408558870/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.28_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjg0M2M1ZC04NmZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lwVVhmtWhUumpjm84Zr-0GDenoESAeEFDQKeuSO0yz0=)
Peter, do you have a moment? I wanted to take a second to reach out and explain why you may be hearing from my team more than usual this week.

At the end of this month, our team will face yet another critical deadline: Our May end-of-month fundraising deadline. **And with only three days to go, we’re still running about $6,000 short of where we absolutely have to be.**

[**I’ll explain more in a moment, but first: Is there any amount you’d be willing to chip in to our campaign before Wednesday night? Every dollar we raise now allows us to reach that one extra person, knock that one extra door, and turn out that one extra vote that will make the ultimate difference next November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956667/408558871/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.28_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjg0M2M1ZC04NmZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lwVVhmtWhUumpjm84Zr-0GDenoESAeEFDQKeuSO0yz0=)
| [**Donate**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956668/408558872/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.28_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjg0M2M1ZC04NmZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lwVVhmtWhUumpjm84Zr-0GDenoESAeEFDQKeuSO0yz0=)
---

I know I’ve said it before, but I’ll say it again.** The other side may have millions in dark money and may not have to worry about end-of-month deadlines, but we have something they don’t: The grassroots power of folks like you who believe Northeast Ohio is worth fighting for.**

And if we all stick together and pitch in a little bit here and there, we’ll have what it takes to bring home another win for the Birthplace of Champions.

So now, ahead of our critical end-of-month deadline, I need to know if I can count on this grassroots team to come together when it matters the most. Because in a race as competitive as ours, we can only win this if we stick together.

[**That’s why I have to ask: Peter, can I count on you to make a contribution before the month ends on Wednesday night? clean_body: = Peter, do you have a moment? I wanted to take a second to reach out and explain why you may be hearing from my team more than usual this week. At the end of this month, our team will face yet another critical deadline: Our May end-of-month fundraising deadline. And with only three days to go, we’re still running about $6,000 short of where we absolutely have to be. = | = I know I’ve said it before, but I’ll say it again. The other side may have millions in dark money and may not have to worry about end-of-month deadlines, but we have something they don’t: The grassroots power of folks like you who believe Northeast Ohio is worth fighting for. And if we all stick together and pitch in a little bit here and there, we’ll have what it takes to bring home another win for the Birthplace of Champions. So now, ahead of our critical end-of-month deadline, I need to know if I can count on this grassroots team to come together when it matters the most. Because in a race as competitive as ours, we can only win this if we stick together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you so much for being on this team, Emilia A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. name: Katie Porter
subject: Derek, there are a lot of millionaires in Congress for the same reason there are a lot of tall people in the NBA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I joined Seth Meyers to talk about this.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23752%2E3422442%2EuNV8Ug)
**There are a lot of millionaires in Congress for the same reason there are a lot of tall people in the NBA—it makes it easier to get there.**
Both parties like to recruit candidates who can dump hundreds of thousands, if not millions of dollars, into their own campaign.
I'll be real, that's not me. I'm a single mom of three school aged kids, who like most Americans passes on the $6 blueberries and dreads filling my minivan up with gas.
I don't need a whiteboard to explain why having millionaires be such an over represented group in Congress is bad for our country. **I talked about this with Seth Meyers earlier this month, check it out.⬇️**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230528-1?refcode=EMAH28_1_NBA_20230528_V1_F&refcode2=23752_3422442_uNV8Ug&akid=23752%2E3422442%2EuNV8Ug)
I'm proud our campaign is funded by millions of people chipping in $10 or $20 at a time. We're building the biggest coalition of grassroots donors in this race, and I'd love for you to be a part of our team. **[Can you join us?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17474?refcode=EMAH28_1_NBA_20230528_V1_F&t=2&akid=23752%2E3422442%2EuNV8Ug)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230528-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH28_1_NBA_20230528_V1_F&refcode2=23752_3422442_uNV8Ug&akid=23752%2E3422442%2EuNV8Ug)**
Thanks, Derek!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH28_1_NBA_20230528_V1_F&t=3&refcode2=23752_3422442_uNV8Ug&akid=23752%2E3422442%2EuNV8Ug)**

Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

Abigail Spanberger says**_

_\- CBS News_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956778/408559161/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230528-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWUzZDcyYzUtODdmZC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5_Jl8q8Q1MpJwz36Zs_CgOacLsWNXJNUJ-wyqv-N-CU=) _**Spanberger: bill would ban China, Russia, Iran from acquiring American farmland**_

_“As the only Virginian on the U.S. House Agriculture Committee, I’m committed to protecting America’s farms and farm families from foreign threats,” [Spanberger] said. “If buying up American farmland is a tool for eroding our nation’s food security, economic security, and national security, then we need to be prepared to take steps to push back against these efforts.”_

_\- Culpeper Star Exponent_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63956779/408559162/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230528-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWUzZDcyYzUtODdmZC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5_Jl8q8Q1MpJwz36Zs_CgOacLsWNXJNUJ-wyqv-N-CU=) _**Rogers, Spanberger retain treatment providers for Substance Use Disorder**_

_“In an effort to save more lives and increase access to treatment for substance use disorder (SUD) and mental health resources, U.S. Representatives Hal Rogers and Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger introduced a bipartisan bill reauthorizing and increasing funding for the Substance Use Disorder Treatment and Recovery (STAR) Loan Repayment Program (LRP)”_

clean_body: Abigail has prioritized results since she flipped VA-07 blue for the first time in 50 years in 2018. | = | Peter, We know that among the shuffle of campaign updates, it can be hard to keep track of all the good work Abigail is taking up in Congress. We’ve compiled a recent round-up of her latest projects to make it easy for you. = | = Here’s a sampling of Abigail’s recent work: | | = Congress shouldn't get paid until debt ceiling is addressed, Rep. Abigail Spanberger says "If the American people and the American economy are suffering as a result of congressional inaction, then Members of Congress should not be rewarded with their pay," Spanberger wrote...” \- CBS News = Spanberger: bill would ban China, Russia, Iran from acquiring American farmland “As the only Virginian on the U.S. House Agriculture Committee, I’m committed to protecting America’s farms and farm families from foreign threats,” [Spanberger] said. “If buying up American farmland is a tool for eroding our nation’s food security, economic security, and national security, then we need to be prepared to take steps to push back against these efforts.” \- Culpeper Star Exponent = Rogers, Spanberger retain treatment providers for Substance Use Disorder “In an effort to save more lives and increase access to treatment for substance use disorder (SUD) and mental health resources, U.S. Representatives Hal Rogers and Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger introduced a bipartisan bill reauthorizing and increasing funding for the Substance Use Disorder Treatment and Recovery (STAR) Loan Repayment Program (LRP)” \- Commonwealth Journal Abigail has prioritized results since she flipped VA-07 blue for the first time in 50 years in 2018. She has no plans to change course, = | = With appreciation, Team Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg, VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. | **[DEAR PETER, THE FUTURE OF OUR GREAT NATION IS HANGING BY A THREAD!](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9oXVgc1GgoI4fmXJnDdxhIkMMwCmLCCNTMcbJA4J-3yQeHY3zjpNs8H9rzhP1Hg8RrguGkb78v5ry4TujxgRpw6ytKbcGKP7cYmb3XY86pnYbcKMKX-7bTsYMi5ZV84IcuK0-2cxVgAgcL7Gx-FfXSoBdtr8CYFCyreC0AFsf1UmZ9Mby85cvVtL-KSPvWUEtHQ4rQIwrJVaiyE2e0k_I4hy-qCV84w7bH8igIMxAXxwa5NQNYQ_88OGuXKFssg8QHFuz1NHbg5fZRkxAmUmNCpdemO9uPvSA4tK0r7u0SJj-dinRRtlOZXqbE-xJht4p0KeLiu67uprYIc3Kx2-Gjf3WddGsJIlb05gNn2sIbVz4VI5y5rV1IsIxdDX0Q-3Q1SGPvrV3V1OOV5BVGSXBcV1DZEBIcPx-JRWzM_xFIFJd4nRdqwAAevqpdIhXaBzS&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230519_hd_defeat_joe_b_24_57&n=1)** Every single day we're witnessing our country's core values and principles being ERODED under the weight of Joe Biden's DISASTROUS far-left policies. We're on the brink of a crisis, and we must ACT NOW if we want to prevent a calamity. [_The time for passive observation is over._](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9oXVgc1GgoI4fmXJnDdxhIkMMwCmLCCNTMcbJA4J-3yQeHY3zjpNs8H9rzhP1Hg8RrguGkb78v5ry4TujxgRpw6ytKbcGKP7cYmb3XY86pnYbcKMKX-7bTsYMi5ZV84IcuK0-2cxVgAgcL7Gx-FfXSoBdtr8CYFCyreC0AFsf1UmZ9Mby85cvVtL-KSPvWUEtHQ4rQIwrJVaiyE2e0k_I4hy-qCV84w7bH8igIMxAXxwa5NQNYQ_88OGuXKFssg8QHFuz1NHbg5fZRkxAmUmNCpdemO9uPvSA4tK0r7u0SJj-dinRRtlOZXqbE-xJht4p0KeLiu67uprYIc3Kx2-Gjf3WddGsJIlb05gNn2sIbVz4VI5y5rV1IsIxdDX0Q-3Q1SGPvrV3V1OOV5BVGSXBcV1DZEBIcPx-JRWzM_xFIFJd4nRdqwAAevqpdIhXaBzS&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230519_hd_defeat_joe_b_24_57&n=2) It's time to take up the mantle and BE THE HERO our country needs. We're on the brink of a crisis, and we must ACT NOW if we want to prevent a calamity. It's time to take up the mantle and BE THE HERO our country needs. If we do not step up, our beloved nation will be reduced to nothing more than a shell of its former self. But with YOUR support, we CAN prevent this catastrophe. The stakes have never been higher, and your contribution will be the difference between a saved nation and a ruined one. | | | | | Can we count on YOU to be the hero America needs in these desperate times? If we don't ACT NOW, we'll be forced to watch our country sink under the crushing weight of these destructive policies. THE TIME TO ACT IS NOW! Your generous donation will fuel our fight against this reckless administration and pave the way for a brighter future for our great nation. | Thank you, Peter, for standing strong with us in these critical times. Your unwavering dedication to our cause is what keeps us going in this arduous battle. Jason Simmons Executive Director, North Carolina GOP

Dear Friends,

In observance of Memorial Day, our campaign office will be closed on Monday, May 29.

Tuesday, May 30, is the last day to register for this election. If you haven't registered yet, or need to update your registration, [then click on this link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014dCfzYScYCoC58GKO5B7ZqoPqEu8RtZRTa1kpBg8MkD2dFjs9X-Z_XDu6AUCevlK0U1Lx7E_XxTL-OC29EOsmi_4bvgEo8Jcj08SC3N2_wnGLkjY8nE0AmOzzJryBw3FpAq_7whkimNy8SC55mjjfCUweLJ3-eY3V5TYYwfKO-BJrb92KxHlM2VyaesO39FmBv2VmeSiuA0=&c=C8MU5zy83HbfJUHU7-8qG-rg8lCubzyHCqzlucY5z3--F6mHX3ocXw==&ch=R-69PqykzgPncDkXdssTCGL8JUeBNYipifAsMzeNZtl-S95udTklLg==).

Once again, this week our focus is to hit as many doors as we possibly can. I'll be out walking every day this week (except for Memorial Day) and I need volunteers to join me. Sign up today for an afternoon shift, [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

For next week, we have the Chesterfield VA Tea Party on Monday, June 5, and we are having a Special Event on June 8th with Bishop E.W. Jackson. More information to follow.

Come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

We look forward to seeing you this week.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

Come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door. We look forward to seeing you this week. clean_body: | | | | \- - - | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Team Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: Colin Allred
subject: Peter, this race is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8fZlsug3EY3FMcqJ_WtQ_la6nvq050XfJGM4iCOA-1rT07iaKMtaJ7jM7-Gn1obPBgIvBBMeg2OAdtTGaAQt5m5CAJ7rtMaW7lIDbk3PEZTtdty6soWW6JCSWh3C_Y3KGKUGz_UdB4AZJa_L-Cl36QMYACvWiSqPlAAjKx6YIaGUhG4AohAdinVPE2Y8DR92rEhTi6g7B8aismT8swmiR_Ij9KJDQS9a6-KepWqoWr0X1x2DdSQy5NMHHPFrtfFss8LMm4lk2ac4wGyt-OKwOgkJr7SJ2ER0QmgfETm_WHqhOGvfu2ofMU8VD-PNSM5bC5nXZMBlHtJnyDWkBfgc2-_USaMlfQ-Q1xTPJlbpvwHFNp_nI0nK3nLWq06o5zQrNz6qmCVbfBlJO36focwqp1o/3wk/2RSfSwbIS9G7NB_u-NnOTw/h0/a1fQcHKOCHlKF72ZqYx2hN45w4aob-yBEJZRnt_ubOc) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cRYguM6dPmz-ie5ttM77WmgAPmVIfjRQ-iU_VXXnWFVXMhsPSA8KkORHxDuPOAOGeEDLh1w08ZDHSQkglBOdL7xU-LM-fcXP1sjQlU4_zClYJfJ7Vo_r0HlajKJNO9ehUaR7oOX6lLMWzw5zHQdfpkjSmhuoSjDv3kAbI8O2Wu0TIT8eVQsy3W17VJR7jBznzLzO7geJEDrWpFETZpZMCnoKHD4kwIecZxsYx3Wfuezt4k2QzlxMs9aGRcgbbUwXS-Vm9HR3msFZ_u42zLk3vZxbpdp2xtL3VFjwFBeCLa6-eFhMAJV0vnlyEfdKHpZ5AcvLWPz7cM_Mf3F_1AjFFSD1ZGk_I_17-L7M7Yf4L1xKxiShiTnKC4QTTfWINAHu4Lbjm9cpxdil5UKL2phuKdqaHu3bHVdTaV_q6rNBpLCvKKfqgO0zbR8XEiUnEePp2LSSf8PKBaM8dODSGnUxPQjUaTC692K1KuX4A6Jlrash2aH7ee2dLBS1-3m6V_HnIMQX54AoaFUFCzb0-yWstS1LNtz9lzdnt_r0trf8bu70Vhn9DLiXnk4dyL5X-jcla/3wk/2RSfSwbIS9G7NB_u-NnOTw/h1/7yaSHJFvU-kvIJ1rWORMj6bCZsPbNAsTYTp9ci_spYY) Peter, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.

I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cRYguM6dPmz-ie5ttM77WmgAPmVIfjRQ-iU_VXXnWFVXMhsPSA8KkORHxDuPOAOGeEDLh1w08ZDHSQkglBOdL7xU-LM-fcXP1sjQlU4_zClYJfJ7Vo_r0HlajKJNO9ehUaR7oOX6lLMWzw5zHQdfpkjSmhuoSjDv3kAbI8O2Wu0TIT8eVQsy3W17VJR7jBznzLzO7geJEDrWpFETZpZMCnoKHD4kwIecZxsYx3Wfuezt4k2QzlxMs9aGRcgbbUwXSysrQH3_ua0LM315BPiQ1HEmr3Yag6c9X_aaKbqFipjFP1RSJSniHFWa_Rf0pzLxu1qzkDqj9Z8hq-YOWfeKYZ15772JuLUQJfRYQ_l8h8K4U3Hvh1iEHn-wqpjy90YhjRRJhAcbfggQbmi-Lof6Jp8vmgX1g1vnhx5-qMLrfM2OhwRRVqxUG9nav2atKgM-AiJGkz5aFIU1d9TO0MBs8glvpcGORJ31eWQ9f90U8QXdy5OJX9us81yO1yF5dg2gxqo4_ZeGV_s0NQ9fBnCi6kC7CciKcIST7YED-pelWXAMogVOWh5gHr6oY2x-IDax4/3wk/2RSfSwbIS9G7NB_u-NnOTw/h2/yc5xpuT-Icy3_y7kE1qi5sb_KxIS_EpEYyzPOWABdl4) Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people — whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cRYguM6dPmz-ie5ttM77WmgAPmVIfjRQ-iU_VXXnWFVXMhsPSA8KkORHxDuPOAOGeEDLh1w08ZDHSQkglBOdL7xU-LM-fcXP1sjQlU4_zClYJfJ7Vo_r0HlajKJNO9ehUaR7oOX6lLMWzw5zHQdfpkjSmhuoSjDv3kAbI8O2Wu0TIT8eVQsy3W17VJR7jBznzLzO7geJEDrWpFETZpZMCnoKHD4kwIecZxsYx3Wfuezt4k2QzlxMs9aGRcgbbUwXSasW8cjWUTTb4cyM-GrtRI5s0l21aXw7_3iDJ02thoQg5Y7GD_GZIWSZMoq639DnE5Gz-mNfXVFuKnTd_CtcGoY970tKDv3xyF6lKaafhy4NIVLWdzGY0GCt3OreVqRHrbVSS9JwLKUBBuUzRrQo_do5w9yHCONm-soOyi9Wk1DkI90RQ94J8zNqClLEDs1jC1UjSY_98VDxa5k8qnSWzXvTcnU5NAoqG44i8v4Q210YXGOSGp5OfYWtuNKfDK6Q2iP9_x6AcNGswC8T8aAD12a8GXyUcU742bSswX9cEMBpfVDxdcSg0pDegyD9Ocwkm/3wk/2RSfSwbIS9G7NB_u-NnOTw/h3/RPYHuYZjGQ7pLvl_DAMxC9ynHiqRYvINs1sFiU2bMVg) After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people — whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life — right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds — and an 11-term GOP incumbent — to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate — but I need your help. We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thanks for reading my story — and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: This We’ll Defend
body:
| | | Peter, **_This we’ll defend._**

It’s the U.S. Army motto, and as a Special Forces Green Beret, it’s the words that went through my head before every mission.

It’s our mission to defend everything America stands for: democracy, freedom, and opportunity.

**Today, I still live by those words, and I try to defend American ideals in everything I do from the beaches of Florida to the halls of Congress.**

_But I can’t defend America on my own, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter._

**Our team’s end-of-month deadline is in just THREE DAYS, and right now, we’re not at our goal yet.**

[**Please, will you pitch in now to help us meet this critical goal?**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e92338fe65704877b75fbe70ae5528c5&_e=UfhPFQ9QjjwlhlKH22UzK-0AbJlElXjzFtb8jyI3ry0NKzxjfE9EuhPjjnUphlpX5seNVNMixsQI5XeUVYztOPgNjZ1g5Xhkcs-5k-i2TuusFu97jma39BEQLlAV1pOaQ57CH0YrJJH8mOdXDg4EIAk6ttPjv7v-mzlbtil8ie_ZFS9bYtHwUi2jZF2EqX3cM_gSYogjDbtJk9g_H4M7waP0fAjiUo8QkgwaT9ci-4y3fvqVXyhNiJGvGPZVoQTMh9Kb40Sl2KfaboEs_39tSovq4MC1uy-RsG1qJwRzlinnK-aJye8fJN0Htt2zNnWjc1Y-hb4cTrCt0TcUmlwqzhwLwA-B8YR3E3IuNj3_o9Y%3D)

My time as Green Beret put my mind and body to the test in ways that I never imagined.

_But it was all worth it, because I got to be a part of defending the greatest country on Earth._

I’m so grateful for everything this country has given me, and now, I’m working to defend it for my children.

After the sacrifices I’ve seen my fellow men and women in arms make for this country, I’m not about to let the Left take away everything they fought for.

[**I need YOU on my team to help us meet this goal to defend America from the Left. clean_body: | | | Peter, This we’ll defend. It’s the U.S. Army motto, and as a Special Forces Green Beret, it’s the words that went through my head before every mission. It’s our mission to defend everything America stands for: democracy, freedom, and opportunity. Today, I still live by those words, and I try to defend American ideals in everything I do from the beaches of Florida to the halls of Congress. But I can’t defend America on my own, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. Our team’s end-of-month deadline is in just THREE DAYS, and right now, we’re not at our goal yet. My time as Green Beret put my mind and body to the test in ways that I never imagined. But it was all worth it, because I got to be a part of defending the greatest country on Earth. I’m so grateful for everything this country has given me, and now, I’m working to defend it for my children. After the sacrifices I’ve seen my fellow men and women in arms make for this country, I’m not about to let the Left take away everything they fought for. | | In Service, Col. Mike WaltzSpecial Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (R-FL) | | Paid for by Servant Leadership Fund, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Michael Waltz for Congress, Warrior Diplomat, Frontline Patriots, and NRCC. | | 824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101, Athens, GA 30605 Contributions to Servant Leadership Fund, or any of its participating committees, are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: Before the weekend ends!

body:
HER Time PAC [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP46/1/102543/images/HerTimePrimary.png]
Hey Peter,

My team just checked our numbers, and we’re still a bit behind our end-of-month goal. That’s why I wanted to shoot you a quick personal message asking if you’d be willing to chip in any amount before our deadline in 3 days . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-may2023]

The good news is, we’re close — and your donation can get us even closer to reaching our goal before the weekend ends!

So I have a personal link for you to chip in and support amazing women and young people running in close races all over the country. You can use it right here:

Here’s a personal link for you to use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-may2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-may2023]

Thanks in advance!

— Katie

Sent from my iPhone

Berkeley, CA 94704
United States

_Give a dollar._

Give whatever is comfortable for you.

I don't care about the amount we raised between now and May 31st - I care about the number of donations we can secure before midnight on Wednesday.

This is a unique grassroots movement. We aren't afraid to say what others think - but I need your help to cut through the BS.

**[Your support today will help make sure we kick off the summer ready to secure the number of grassroots donors we need to make the presidential debate stage.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=083c8098d4b74a5e880fa05084ea9176&_e=MX7T9VP0JHr5LWH9m1dYjKZ3YJ9a2l24YTgvXEdu_Ir_toeinMYVyQl-VHeSGsrO-15uMDRKVd6bIkZx198VyReEx_iP1F6jajeTXEd_n2KgNbp6qAZAUpduJF1dYINg7qGz_uvVejOVc1C9W02GzM9IOU6Rayla9AKCEjxWJ1biIMnmf1iCikCpu2lQUJ_5FTnUN8OdABBa5xtwtUtJgV2oluELXgCt3CLpj1xNKkFKH1pua0P_r6vv0SCr4jshFVPmn97k3pRpq73-xpkw2P3dQ1S5Ed_j5KxDjtSwntpiFxfyt8UBMgDCJBedgx6Jumrve2Y581LCo8DgW59NeRb1JX9ad0QFP71IYpnsTssEhUq1xXaoxPQetms_PoXEzf3V6xai4FUt1NF7jVMMJA%3D%3D)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: We aren’t afraid to say what others think - but I need your help. | | Peter, I need your help to put us in a good position going into the summer. We only have a few days until the end of May and I need your help: | Give a dollar. Give whatever is comfortable for you. I don't care about the amount we raised between now and May 31st - I care about the number of donations we can secure before midnight on Wednesday. This is a unique grassroots movement. We aren't afraid to say what others think - but I need your help to cut through the BS. Please don't wait until May 31st - Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Will you please pitch in today to support my re-election and make these plans possible?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Right now we have a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo while also ensuring billion-dollar crypto firms wouldn’t lose a dime in deposits. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63969575/408581152/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13R_EGR_E_20230528_V1S2_NOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmJjNjRlMi1hZmZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUqbbpMrSnDeTnGzJGffySsjzXW2Pqo7dYpWiKWr1i4=&emci=0fa42c89-adfd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f2bc64e2-affd-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

Throughout my time in Washington, I’ve learned that when you start talking about policies that help working people instead of wealthy people or big corporations, plenty of critics will be quick to tell you what you can’t do and what’s not possible. It’s like clockwork. Take student loan cancelation for example. Cynics said we could never put our government on the side of working-class and middle-class people and get something like that accomplished. But we got organized, we got in the fight, and we got this policy to the president’s desk. I’ll stay in the fight to get student debt cancelation over the finish line. Because that’s a case where we still see how the rules work differently for different groups of people: Right now we have a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo, but that same system worked overnight to ensure that big banks and billion-dollar crypto firms wouldn’t lose a dime in deposits during recent bank failures. **The difference between these two scenarios? The willingness to fight for them.** I’m running for re-election to continue to use my voice to advocate for big, structural changes that help working people. Changes like canceling student debt, taxing the rich, reining in big banks, and making child care affordable. **But I need you by my side in this fight.** [_**A contribution of $15 or anything you can will power my re-election campaign and help show the naysayers that these plans have strong support in your area and across the country. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: May is AANHPI Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I have never forgotten where I came from, who I fight for, and why I fight for them. |
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63958605/408566526/-1724265499?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_EOM_AC60_20230528_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYyMDg0MC05MmZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LefG0Lx18Cp56OaYn-0Efiug0i6llY4p1ACv0HksSUA=) Aloha friend, May is AANHPI Heritage Month, when we recognize and honor the significant historical, social, and cultural impact that generations of Asian Americans, Native Hawaiians, and Pacific Islanders have made to our country. Our country’s AANHPI community includes over 45 ethnicities and more than 100 language dialects, and continues to be the fastest growing ethnic group in the United States. **As the first Asian American woman elected to the Senate — and the only immigrant currently serving in the chamber — I have never been more aware of the importance of representation.[I’ll explain more in a moment, but first, will you split a donation of any amount between my reelection campaign and Tina’s work to preserve our razor-thin Senate majority so we can continue fighting for justice and equality for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63958606/408566527/-1724265499?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_EOM_AC60_20230528_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYyMDg0MC05MmZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LefG0Lx18Cp56OaYn-0Efiug0i6llY4p1ACv0HksSUA=)** For most of my career, I engaged in this work stolidly and without much fuss. In the cultures I was raised in, we were not rewarded for speaking up, or speaking out. So I focused on doing the work, and letting the work speak for itself. This led many to say, when I began speaking out about the awful actions by the Trump Administration, and the awful behavior by Trump himself, that I had “found my voice.” **This could not be further from the truth. I _chose_ to use my voice.** I couldn’t stand by while the Trump administration ripped children out of the arms of their parents, incited white supremacists, and packed the nation’s courts with demagogues who would later overturn _Roe v. Wade_. His bullying behavior, and his interest in tearing our country apart by our differences, instead of investing in the diversity that makes us stronger, had to be called out. This interest in exposing our differences was never limited to Donald Trump. This is the GOP’s agenda. It was there in the way they embraced calling COVID-19 “the China virus,” it was there when they spoke out against President Biden’s intention to nominate a Black woman to the Supreme Court, and it is still there now, as they stonewall Julie Su, an Asian American woman immigrant nominated to serve as Secretary of Labor. **As long as Republicans — whether in the House, the Senate, or the supermajority of right wing ideologues on the Supreme Court — continue to try to tear us apart, I will continue to speak out bluntly about the danger they pose to the AANHPI community, immigrants, and other vulnerable groups.** [**My work has always been powered by grassroots supporters like you, and I wouldn’t have it any other way. Please consider splitting a donation between my reelection campaign and Tina’s work to protect our razor-thin Democratic majority so we can keep fighting together in the U.S. Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63958607/408566528/-1724265499?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_EOM_AC60_20230528_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYyMDg0MC05MmZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LefG0Lx18Cp56OaYn-0Efiug0i6llY4p1ACv0HksSUA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Mazie Hirono and Tina Smith:_ **** | | **[CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63958608/408566529/-1724265499?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_EOM_AC60_20230528_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYyMDg0MC05MmZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LefG0Lx18Cp56OaYn-0Efiug0i6llY4p1ACv0HksSUA=)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans could've shown they had some ethics last week, as a vote was held to expel George Santos from Congress on grounds of being indicted on 13 counts of money laundering, theft of funds, fraud, etc... But naturally, a Democrat is going to have to chase him out of government.
body:
Seeing the back of George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1294f84-d14d-42b4-9add-7c197b7515a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Republicans could've shown they had some ethics last week, as a vote was held to expel George Santos from Congress. Yet, as their highest power is ...power, NOT ONE GOPer voted to toss a criminal. NOT. ONE._ [**_Former State Senator Anna Kaplan, a Democrat ready to take out Santos, had something to say about this_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58399850-755f-4ea4-a112-6814baf47196/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) as you can probably imagine: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc432aa42-9000-4518-8968-d4017ba3b160/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Kaplan knocked a Republican out of his NY State Senate, seat delivering Democrats a majority for the first time in decades. She co-sponsored bills to codify Roe and ban "ghost guns." _** [**_Santos, indicted on 13 counts of money laundering, theft of funds, fraud, etc., doesn't have the stuff to withstand a well-funded Kaplan. Will you give her $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to flip the seat and the House, sending Anna Kaplan to Congress and sending George Santos packing?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta95e4df3-c50c-4c13-8f46-d67a63a74525/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for staying attuned to this race to make sure George Santos is gone from Congress one way or another._ Cliff
---
|

|

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ff80188-d6f7-4e05-bf6f-694cf0f67c53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Lee?=
subject: All Hands on Deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Michael Lee for Sheriff
body:
| | |
---
| | Friend, I wanted to take a break from campaigning today to give you a quick update on our race.

Our army of volunteers have been busy helping us make sure our message reaches every voter across the county.

As of today, we have knocked hundreds of doors, delivered thousands of yard signs, launched our first commercial (**[watch it here](https://patriotsheriff.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e192d03dbabea8b9cfbe452c&id=c89b796ead&e=ebc42def15)**), and put up our 236th BIG sign in DeSoto County - and the requests keep coming.

But there is more work to do.

>From assembling yard signs to distributing them to making calls to walking your neighborhood, we could use your help to get us across the finish line on August 8th.

We have just 73 days left until election day. So, I want to personally ask you to help us enter the final stretch in a strong position, by volunteering to help spread our message that is resonating with patriots across our county.

We're building something special here and want you to be a part of it. **[Help us secure DeSoto County's future by getting involved today - here.](https://patriotsheriff.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e192d03dbabea8b9cfbe452c&id=e293339afb&e=ebc42def15)**

Thank you for your continued support - it means the world to Mary Helen and I to have grassroots supporters like you standing with us.

Speaking of being with us - we are opening our campaign office Wednesday, May 31st, and would love for you to join us for the grand opening at 2556 Highway 51 South, Hernando, Mississippi 38632 (east side of the square) at 5:00 pm.

We will have campaign swag and signs on hand.

---
| Thank you,
Michael Lee
Republican Candidate for Sheriff

---
| | **This email was sent from:**
Friends of Michael LeePO Box 961Hernando, MS 38632-0961
[Add us to your address book](https://patriotsheriff.us14.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0e192d03dbabea8b9cfbe452c&id=a981cbf0dc)

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding our campaign, and we are glad you are on the team.

If you believe you received this email message in error \- or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team, you can [update your preferences](https://patriotsheriff.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=0e192d03dbabea8b9cfbe452c&id=a981cbf0dc&e=ebc42def15&c=8fa13d630e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://patriotsheriff.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0e192d03dbabea8b9cfbe452c&id=a981cbf0dc&e=ebc42def15&c=8fa13d630e).
| Paid for by Friends of Michael Lee for Sheriff
---

subject: A race to watch

Sinema’s team refuted the complaint as ‘a political attack,’ but an independent ethics expert says the complaint has merit:**“When I read this FEC complaint, I was shocked – and I’ve seen a lot of political corruption in my life,”** said prominent Arizona attorney Tom Ryan, who is a past president of the Arizona Association of Justice. **“You don’t get to mislead donors. You don’t get to take money that’s intended for a public use and turn it into a private benefit, and she has clearly done that in spades.”**

Because Sinema’s spending isn’t sporadic or minimal–it’s not just a dinner here and a hotel stay there: **our report outlines over $180,000 in campaign, PAC, and Senate funds spent on luxury hotels and resorts, car services, expensive charter flights, high-end restaurants, and wine.**
If this sounds out of the norm...that’s because it IS! Sinema is cashing big money checks from special interests to fund her luxury lifestyle, all while obstructing our most basic rights and dodging any accountability from constituents.**We’ve had enough.**
Sinema is required to respond to a complaint filed against her with the FEC. She is constantly practicing the art of the dodge–but she sold out and we’re going to make sure she answers for putting Arizona second time and again.
**When you have no moral high ground you’ll take checks from anyone–which is why Sinema’s war chest is so big. Our campaign has been fueled by 17,000 small dollar donors.** Your support grants us the tools necessary to do research like this on Sinema’s potentially illegal and unethical behavior and bring it to light.
[**If you can, please help fund our fight to hold Sinema accountable.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_gpOvD9yv6LcjZkfCiUFHrmgSPOcKMs2rM9yGrRE_lv6R1sCIqLpS7eSlOauDWTrewCEM0AOcMFeGFmQQC7_BWhUz0L_2rS_jyJ1S-iDU9MO_hsMzJSYJTeUb56ZYEeSaPuKEzj6McMwKawuQOIjcFmvsJaDt3q_bhgD0NadoV1dOqo7k41j1nAvUMvDskAQxKH9WTUWGPPhD1OxcUzBovQ3LK4IVyqQLKf1SEEqBguFfglsmrhrYnARfCUNF0P_NqDx8nYCwKRtXM0RuIhZDbej9sQJZLkk3igdakID8_VHkosoQOaj2PY8jIfNH2gyzKgsngZyEhIAchm5BEOtuOJqjENrUgHx8ySdwAUwEGQ/3wk/BaCy9muaS0eKTmUA-aTLAg/h17/fN75itGPnPH3EsEAEgAL5y49sWZTcmernf-d-SdP93A)

[**May 28, 1923:** Allowing women to wear trousers marked a significant milestone. However, the ban on women wearing trousers persisted due to societal norms and laws. [**May 28, 1929:** “On with the Show!” is a musical film from 1929 that was produced by Warner Bros. It is recognized as the first full-length film to feature both sound and color, using two-color Technicolor. This movie holds the distinction of being Warner Bros.' second color film release, following The “Desert Song” (1929), which combined partial color with black-and-white elements.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f5936a9f99f84fe9907dc7fda857f25d&_e=NDXfu_EicbKtLHGD7Ltlh3iKzG1xCdWpVyYnnMiqd6D2MuXh_8a13eBi7UmAIntCxK2bwxgqibnPS7lW89RBBXgxYPv8ZGfy3OZ-c19tB_yJA1nD_tKTiPJOlHdxBg_v4cLne6uoBhxfMkUJjCp8-vw2-0AyvfxCELv1Dh_fYJuR5PXXYgCGkY0GasZXLbv7mjzMmnzRmRlUqrCag3koRKRGC2bQTLpczdT6DHeQ7w2yTtTrnOOB2wrAhZw47O7f) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f5936a9f99f84fe9907dc7fda857f25d&_e=NDXfu_EicbKtLHGD7Ltlh3iKzG1xCdWpVyYnnMiqd6D2MuXh_8a13eBi7UmAIntCxK2bwxgqibnPS7lW89RBBXgxYPv8ZGfy3OZ-c19tB_zKjL-_AN15KMsiqDRJ87TH45Uh6JI83Qjn9aatlMrTc4C383BSEpsozqETTfh1I31LJT5IywJto7So_3AK-EtCArNCwXmEQliBWUvWQvOxNVkI1iIYlXC5eboE3xKNiRfUT2kkQm92EUyscTJcShgc)**

clean_body: = Peter, We’re just a few days away from our May end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re falling short of where we need to be. This is a make-or-break moment for our campaign – Election Day will be here before we know it, and we can’t fall behind now. There’s too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. Louisiana is counting on us to win this race and keep up the progress that we’ve been able to accomplish with Governor John Bel Edwards. Critical policy decisions from health care to our children’s education to infrastructure will be decided in this election, and we can’t leave it up to an extreme governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Wilson | | = | = = Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Paid for by Wilson for Louisiana

_... A Republican primary that drags on all the way into the summer of 2024._

_**And as we speak, shadowy Swamp forces claiming to be “Republicans” are working behind the scenes to make this a reality – spending $200 MILLION to try and stop us from winning the nomination.**_

body:
| | | Peter, It is Bennett from Team Rick Scott.

We have just three days left until our critical [**end-of-month deadline**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=a80ccf918175432e9ec83fe6ffcca11e&_e=4gVhpZ81YWRur-GqrxwT5CBFcqBfjdR4eI5oJ6JszxGaIHQG0bQS4syLK-SzbZTtIpBmdBDOBaU9G7GbvL8Hg3XNoZsrgJt0Pnu19NugRSK5lIKoPXH3Exy5FtbxvV3U3BMmW4jwl4i5mssyrQ9dfqgDXzM3SacO78MHlBm2-nF1pJy4s4CJdI_vLM1HOPb_aNiEWgG-wgDuDvdeh77NbB3uTj0KxWLGwKyQIZJzDLRiI_Mrx39zitirMPOytRxNiuF09lmWJYpJstISDpz-sYSXKnNaJNm2RYuFxt38Xc96zwCEUIGTEH6Ht30st0hxzwvqGVH9GsC5I2ruFQpKq5ajYimo3bCgVng4BkYf6zU%3D) , and I wanted to share some final thoughts with you as we wrap up this push.

The Democrats are raising _RECORD_ amounts of money to infiltrate Florida.

If we’re going to hold the line and defend this seat, we can’t wait for 2024 - we need to get started now.

_As one of our most dedicated team members, I’m trusting you, Peter._

If we lose this seat, we won’t be able to take back the Senate, and the Democrats will have two more years to tear apart our country bit by bit.

**This goal is critically important. clean_body: | | | Peter, It is Bennett from Team Rick Scott. We have just three days left until our critical , and I wanted to share some final thoughts with you as we wrap up this push. The Democrats are raising RECORD amounts of money to infiltrate Florida. If we’re going to hold the line and defend this seat, we can’t wait for 2024 - we need to get started now. As one of our most dedicated team members, I’m trusting you, Peter. If we lose this seat, we won’t be able to take back the Senate, and the Democrats will have two more years to tear apart our country bit by bit. This goal is critically important. | | Thank you, BennettTeam Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. | **BREAKING: Ted Cruz worried 2024 race will be a "firefight"** [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17598?t=6&akid=1828%2E564421%2E21EtUg) Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm.

**There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – _and he knows it._**

Polling showed more Texans _disapprove_ of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred.

**We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. So we set a rapid-response goal to raise $250,000 by midnight, and we're urgently asking for your help, Friend:**

body:

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63961507/408576748/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2634-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZTdkOGIxLWEzZmQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nGtuH67kZha0sR8Ebj0d3KZlOetemG26jz0W1Sop8I0=)
Hello,

Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.**

It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024.

Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors.

I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $250,000 before our critical end-of-May deadline so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:**
**[Please, if you’re able to, will you split $15 or more right now – any amount you can afford – between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help us hit our goal and defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63961508/408576749/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2634-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZTdkOGIxLWEzZmQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nGtuH67kZha0sR8Ebj0d3KZlOetemG26jz0W1Sop8I0=)**

clean_body: | | | = Hello, Well, it didn’t take long. The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began. It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies. We’ve set a goal of raising another $250,000 before our critical end-of-May deadline so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Frisch and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Lauren Boebert may have the special interests behind her, but I have something even more powerful: You. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots campaign. With gratitude - Adam | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Plastics vs. Baby Sea Turtles
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794130?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Don’t let plastics KILL any more baby sea turtles!** **[Sign the petition NOW>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794131?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** _**Today is the big day!**_ You’ve been in the warm sand waiting to hatch where your mama laid her eggs. And now, you and your hatchling siblings are ready to venture down to the ocean _for the very first time._ You’re just a tiny little creature, so you must be careful not to get **trapped** in the **GIANT MOUNTAINS of plastic debris** that are covering the beach. Otherwise, you could **_DIE_** before ever even setting your tiny shell in the sea! _**Great job, Friend, you made it!**_ Now, the next challenge is navigating the water for food... Look out! It’s not a predator, but a plastic bag that could **entangle or suffocate you to death. ** _**Is that a jellyfish you see ahead? Yummy!**_ Excitedly, you flap your baby flippers and swim over to take a bite. But as soon as you swallow it, something isn’t right. You’re having trouble breathing. The piece is stuck in your little throat and you begin trying to hack it up to no avail. You’re in pain now, panicking and flailing your small body around underwater. You have accidentally eaten a piece of _**PLASTIC**_ , and soon, you will __**CHOKE TO DEATH.**__ **Not that happy ending you were hoping for on your big day, huh, Friend?** Sadly, this is the reality for too many baby sea turtles and other marine animals who are mistaking plastic for food. Plastics are overrunning our oceans with an _entire garbage truckload_ ending up there _EVERY MINUTE._ In fact, scientists predict there will be **more PLASTIC THAN FISH in the sea by 2050!** **Marine animals are DESPERATE for help, and they’re counting on activists like you today, Friend.** **[Don’t let baby sea turtles keep dying. Sign the petition to STOP plastic pollution NOW!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794132?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794133?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Look, Friend, it’s not just sea turtles who are suffering from the plastic crisis. Ocean pollution _**KILLS OVER A MILLION MARINE CREATURES**_ per year.
And plastic production itself is harmful to the entire planet. Industrial plastic factories, which in many cases are located in low-wealth and BIPOC communities, burn through fossil fuels, emit massive amounts of greenhouse gases into the atmosphere, and release toxic pollutants that end up in our water, food, and air supply.
But the federal government has _**FAILED**_ to hold Big Plastic and their friends in Big Oil accountable for the environmental destruction caused by plastics and for **putting marine life, people, and the planet at risk.** If we don’t do something to curb plastic pollution soon, we’ll be facing a __**PLASTIC APOCALYPSE!**__
_**Please, Friend, we’re counting on you to do your part before plastics completely pollute the Earth and damage life as we know it.**_ [**We need 5,301 more signatures by MIDNIGHT: Will you add your name NOW to tell the Biden administration that we DEMAND bold and immediate solutions to the plastic crisis?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794134?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794133?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking action to END plastic pollution,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D239409&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: What I’m fighting for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=9NRc651J5MwV6Wzs24O6f0C0EM6w4dLfp5vd5v0pBBJ7giEIDxWqPMjGiMNKYMwp6qain%2Fp%2F5lLcIRboXz7nwK49xFQxmVSVJyGA%2BZOHfZXaV45tQQKOHa5BLCCmrjJlfnkmSf%2B2knYKeuQ7DHo1UZioVeUNmDdqfQwu6QSLp2q2Nrkv1h11OGhO0Udk7xKQJ%2F1l1j6vD8uEc5lyofqbpPW6UbRWDAU3j9OxlZf0mcLDyHfmkh0Xyn7w9FsBk985AbcAla%2FP6CKagJi4dU2lQEThGE74WV0uFwLaCKO8ucNQxuUDLNuFU61kwEi1DfFxx%2BeWBjtKwHK4rQyn6wyFS40pDGAygBvhrjQJgJRccy9N9jf1ZwvmytxRy8ruxuKRPwr8iDormE92u%2B8tDy3XwzdYeKYcHAcLbazP9jxxK4oqJUGbsIyNM71S0xpT%2BER2)

| |
---
Peter,

The GOP desperately wants to defeat me next year. In 2022 they spent $7 million trying to win here in Rhode Island, **but grassroots supporters like you helped us fight back and win our competitive race.** We know they’re getting ready to spend even more against us next year.

They don’t like that I’m fighting for the middle class. They don’t like that I want to protect and strengthen programs like Social Security. And they don’t like that I want to make billionaires pay their fair share in taxes.

**But I’ll never stop fighting for these issues. That’s why I ran for Congress, and why I’m fighting every day to deliver for working people in Rhode Island.**

[As we approach another fundraising deadline on Wednesday night, can I ask you to support our campaign with a grassroots donation of $10 or any amount? We’re strongest when our grassroots team stands together, so I’m asking if you’ll stand with us today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63961980/408577456/2042294413?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230528_FR_eom.1.3_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFjNDI1OC1hN2ZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJCJtIsIEsVwBHc2V5AwNhi2-l6NtLwrPV_4BgzArxc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | [DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63961981/408577457/2042294413?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230528_FR_eom.1.3_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFjNDI1OC1hN2ZkLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJCJtIsIEsVwBHc2V5AwNhi2-l6NtLwrPV_4BgzArxc=)

body:
[Message Enclosed]

| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Dear Peter, Time is running out, and we need your help to ensure Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are held accountable for their failed socialist agenda. It has been clear since day one that their policies will hurt everyday Americans, setting us back instead of propelling us forward. It is crucial that we take swift action to make it known that the current administration’s policies will not be tolerated by the people. We need your voice to be heard in the upcoming Official Biden/Harris Performance Review conducted by State Republicans. The survey only takes a few moments to complete, and YOUR input is essential! Don’t let Joe Biden and Kamala Harris off the hook for their destructive policies. Help us make sure their performance is judged for what it really is! **[RESPOND NOW and share your views in the official Official Biden/Harris Performance Review. Your response will be recorded at State Republican HQ and will represent the views of all Republicans in Englewood, FL.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9h3YZGVABirVlF972vms2JGSlQnVT5tQ-wKH0InR5TYVO6_mzWyA91TjJJQ8Tz6HEAVRULTVkb2blqef3gN9q6dGb9Trt3OJV03OO8fsFROcajES08M2HtOJlGxwwlKPAf2qRFLQ_LwooTqM9YQZv0Lw02b9GlS_tV2R_iS2Yt_F6yIMg7naGeodLSyZSPdBUmRQLmizdcQ-WD2tiLQ40hTWWnuuXGCgENJnTnAQf_adB0P9eRkzS3MCY7t_EmyFPjKCYtf-PCGbCevmmKvEd_zGmJ861oacNxVtiIMI6uXPjiuuYaYoAzNF5x2Q36uAvCoI4S3Nm3X4AvkGPVNYElVzvE8KogttTNq5qmkQka5cJEaGI5hZFAHKjPoqG7VsgggYmsBm2pvzeMwJIVWJhqQ&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230129_hd_biden_harris_59_83&n=1)** |

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: A fun fact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our end-of-month goal deadline is around the corner.
#
Derek, our end-of-month goal deadline is around the corner, so we’re going to get straight to the point. 🎯
**We’re coming to ask you if you can step up to the plate + be one of the donors that we need from 18326.**
**[Derek, can you be one of the people we need to donate $5 or another amount today? We need as many people from 18326 as possible to help us reach our goal by May 31.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230528-1?refcode=em20230528-1-8391&refcode2=8391_434096_iVpDeD&akid=8391%2E434096%2EiVpDeD)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230528-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230528-8391&refcode2=8391_434096_iVpDeD&akid=8391%2E434096%2EiVpDeD)**
**Fun fact:** Folks all over the Commonwealth support John. The movement we built together has members in all 67 PA counties — and there’s even a Fetterman donor in over 50% of all general U.S. zip codes!!!
