name: Joe Biden
subject: I’m writing to let you know that Speaker McCarthy and I have reached a budget agreement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m writing to let you know that Speaker McCarthy and I have reached a budget agreement and to share some details of that agreement directly with you. | | |
---
Peter -- **You may have seen the news last night that Speaker McCarthy and I have reached a budget agreement. I wanted to share some details of that agreement directly with you.** This agreement is good news for the American people, because it prevents what could have been a catastrophic default and would have led to an economic recession, retirement accounts devastated, and millions of jobs lost. The agreement protects Congressional Democrats’ and my key priorities and legislative accomplishments, including the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, the CHIPS and Science Act, the PACT Act, and the Inflation Reduction Act -- the most aggressive action in our history to tackle the climate crisis, invest in environmental justice, and create millions of clean energy manufacturing jobs. This agreement also protects the economic gains we’ve made together:_12.7 million jobs created and the lowest unemployment rate in more than 50 years._ And, this agreement keeps my commitment to the American people. **No one will lose their health care, no one will be pushed into poverty, and we will continue to invest in programs that working families rely on.** Now, this agreement represents a compromise, which means not everyone gets what they want. _That’s the responsibility of governing._ Soon, the agreement will go to the House and Senate. I strongly urge both chambers to pass the agreement right away. Thank you for standing with Kamala and me throughout this process. It means the world. More soon, Joe Joe Biden

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
just when we thought it couldn’t get any worse...
| | President Biden is under full MAGA ATTACK — **Marjorie Taylor Greene just filed IMPEACHMENT articles against him!**

[50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign our EMERGENCY petition to show President Biden we stand with him »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230528_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=7981%2E878179%2E1t8WiV) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden?refcode=VPP_20230528_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=7981%2E878179%2E1t8WiV) | [**SIGN NOW: STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN AGAINST BASELESS REPUBLICAN ATTACKS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230528_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=7981%2E878179%2E1t8WiV)

And now, she’s doing everything she can to TANK Biden’s approval rating... _right as the presidential race is heating up!_

**Don’t abandon President Biden when he needs us most.**

[We need 50,000 signatures by tomorrow to show Democrats EVERYWHERE stand with President Biden »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230528_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=7981%2E878179%2E1t8WiV)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Right to the point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter,

We know it’s Sunday night, so we’ll keep keep this short, so far we’ve
raised $65,482 towards our $95,000 fundraising goal this month.

Imagine Congress without AOC, Cori, Jamaal, or Summer — we recruited each
one of these leaders to run for Congress and were with their teams from
day #1. We’re one of the only organizations that recruits progressive,
working-class candidates to run for Congress and take on the establishment
to fight for the people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134714?refcode=em20230528-29173&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29173%2E1203867%2ESyLBuI ]Every dollar we receive is critical to our work. Will you make
your first
contribution right now to help us raise $95,000 before our end-of-month
deadline on the 31?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134714?refcode=em20230528-29173&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29173%2E1203867%2ESyLBuI ]Contribute $3

Thank you for being with us,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=29173%2E1203867%2ESyLBuI ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=29173%2E1203867%2ESyLBuI ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230528-29173-footer&t=1023&refcode2=29173_1203867_SyLBuI&akid=29173%2E1203867%2ESyLBuI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29173%2E1203867%2ESyLBuI

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
